Description: Nivoda's mission is to make global jewelry trade simple and accessible by empowering our partners with an all-in-one solution to run and grow their businesses.

Name: Bafleh Jewellery
Description: Bafleh Jewellery is one of the leading wholesale jewellery company in UAE. Mr. Ramesh Vora and Mr. Quwaider Bafleh has established the company since 1992. The company deals in 18kt, 21kt, 22kt of gold and Diamond jewellery, as well as loose and certified diamonds. The company has emerged from being a mere wholesaler to an icon in the jewellery market in this region. The Managing Director of the company, Mr. Ramesh Vora, who has over 40 years of experience in the gold and jewellery market. The strength of the company lies in providing a perfect combination of classic traditional as well as fashionable modern jewellery and accessories. The company operates wholesale and bullion out of three offices, located at the prestigious Gold centre building. The company has a very strong database across the Middle East, Africa, Europe, U.K, America and Australia regions. Understanding the clients need and providing quality and unique products to develop long sustainable relationships, have proven to be our key success factor in the business. Amidst the booming regional economy, with greater emphasis on the retail sector in Dubai, the company has entered into the retail jewellery while leveraging its expertise and success in the wholesale jewellery business. The company currently has 11 retail showrooms across U.A.E with 9 outlets in Dubai, 2 in Sharjah.

Name: KP Sanghvi and Sons
Description:
Founded in 1965 by Late Shri Hajarimal Ji and Late Shri Babulal Ji Sanghvi sourcing single cut diamond where today KP Sanghvi has grown from humble roots into a globally respected name in diamond manufacturing. Built on the pillars of Ethics, Morals, Foresight, and Hard Work, our journey is defined by innovation, integrity, and impact.

With ventures in jewelry (KP Jewels) and real estate (KP Infra), including landmark projects like KP Epitome, we continue to shape the future while honoring our legacy.

Operating in India, USA, UAE, Belgium, China, Hong Kong, and Botswana, our 7,000+ strong team supports partnerships with global names like Simply Vera Wang and Serena Williams Jewelry. Recognized as a De Beers Sightholder, Rio Tinto Diamantaire, and RJC-certified, we lead with trust and transparency. Powered by cutting-edge technology and a patented ERP system, we ensure traceability and quality in every stone.

Beyond business, our commitment to social good is core. We've built hospitals, colleges, an animal sanctuary, and led extensive COVID relief efforts. We also pioneered the industry’s first all-women’s diamond factory and aligned our mission with the UN Sustainable Development Goals.

KP Sanghvi where passion meets precision, and purpose shapes progress.

Name: MadaLuxe
Description:
MadaLuxe is a diversified global luxury company and growth partner for the world’s most coveted brands and retailers.  
 
Across our fashion, lifestyle, and venture tech sectors, we distribute premium brands to major retailers around the globe. We build and invest in brands and products to meet the evolving needs of luxury consumers. We give brands the ability to reach new audiences and grant retailers access to sought-after goods.  
 
MadaLuxe also invests in disruptive technologies in the retail fashion space and beyond.

Name: Kiran Gems Pvt. Ltd (Official)
Description:
Kiran Gems Private Limited is the world’s largest manufacturer of ethically sourced natural diamonds and India’s premier diamantaire. As a Sightholder of the De Beers Group, we are committed to excellence across the diamond value chain—from sourcing rough diamonds to cutting, polishing, and delivering superior quality gems to clients worldwide.

Established in 1985, Kiran Gems has grown into a global leader, recognized for its scale, precision, and innovation. Our manufacturing facilities, spanning over 1 million sq. ft., employ advanced technologies to produce a diverse range of diamonds in various shapes, sizes, colors, and clarities.

Our clientele includes some of the most esteemed jewelry and watch brands, retailers, and manufacturers globally. We pride ourselves on our ability to offer a comprehensive inventory, making us a one-stop destination for polished diamonds.

Key Highlights:
- Over 2.13 million polished carats sold in FY24
- 16-time winner of GJEPC's 'Highest Exporter of Cut & Polished Diamonds – FIRST' award (2007–2019), and again from 2020–2024
- Recipient of GJEPC's 'Highest Turnover' award for 2020–2024
- Global presence with offices in Mumbai, Surat, Antwerp, Dubai, Hong Kong, Shanghai, Thailand and New York

At Kiran Gems, we are dedicated to integrating technology, upholding ethical practices, and fostering social responsibility, ensuring that our legacy shines as brightly as our diamonds.

For more information, visit our website: www.kirangems.com

Name: Loto del Sur
Description:
Loto del Sur is a Colombian brand of cosmetics, made with botanical ingredients that capture the richness, glamour, and exuberance of the South American continent.

Our Founder: An architect with the soul of a perfumer 

Johana Sanint was born in Bogotá, in an atmosphere of architecture and perfumery. Her great-grandfather, representative of the PFW fragrance house, passed on the family a taste for perfumes and a refined nose. Her childhood was marked by memories between aromas and travel stories. Her father, an architect and thinker, transmitted to her the passion for architecture, the love for nature, the search for balance between man and the space he inhabits, and a deep reflection on the American continent, as an invitation to rediscover it. 

Soon after she graduated from Architecture, Johana traveled to Italy and France where she learned the traditional methods of extracting perfumes and making vegetable soaps. It was there that she discovered her true calling. Back in Colombia, she decided to continue the family tradition and found La Jabonería in 1999, a brand of botanical soaps that used ancestral manufacturing processes. Those were The first steps of what is now Loto del Sur.  

At Loto del Sur we believe that good design can considerably transform the way we enjoy life. We believe in all the power of plants and we rely on a rigorous scientific research process. We cultivate simple pleasures by putting effort and dedication into every detail.

Description:
Welcome to our company page, your ultimate destination for everything related to jewelry manufacturing! As a leading jewelry manufacturer, DWS Jewellery takes immense pride in crafting exquisite pieces that stand the test of time. Our company is designed to give you an exclusive behind-the-scenes glimpse into our intricate craftsmanship process.

Discover the artistry and dedication that goes into every piece we create. Learn about the various techniques utilized, from casting to setting stones, and witness first-hand the meticulous attention to detail that makes our jewelry truly exceptional.

Learn about ancient techniques that have been refined and passed down through generations, up to modern innovations shaping the industry today. Our videos offer a unique opportunity to gain valuable insights and knowledge about jewelry making.

Whether you are a jewelry enthusiast, aspiring designer, or simply curious about the craftsmanship behind the jewelry you wear, our company page has something for everyone. Explore our collection showcases, where we highlight our latest designs and provide an in-depth look at the materials used.

We also delve into the world of gemstones, sharing interesting facts and information about various types, their origins, and unique characteristics. Uncover the beauty and symbolism behind these precious stones.

Name: Gallant Jewelry
Description:
Responsible jewellery manufacturer, wholesaler and exporter of fine quality gold & sterling silver with certified gemstones and diamonds since 2001. Now a proud member of RJC (Responsible Jewelry Council).

Our mission is to offer sustainable jewelry that does not harm the planet. We offer recycled silver, fair-mined gold and lab-grown diamonds. All our metal and gemstones suppliers are certified.

The roots of ‘Gallant Jewelry’ dates back to 1975, when expert jeweller Jugal Kishor Gupta started the business of precious and semi-precious gemstones which soon became renowned for gemstone sourcing among global brands and retailers.

Carrying forward his father’s legacy, Arvind Gupta, the heir to the empire and a diamond graduate from the prestigious GIA (Gemological Institute of America) led Gallant to reach new heights of success.
Since then, Gallant has established itself as an industry leader in quality and ethical manufacturing, wholesale and export of fair-mined gold, fine silver and brass jewelry with certified gemstones and authentic diamonds. 

Our complete range of products includes sterling silver rings, earrings, pendants, bracelets and necklaces with genuine gemstones & ethical diamonds. We have extended our strength with 10K & 14K gold & diamond jewelry with an emphasis on diamond anniversary rings/bands. Apart from jewelry and gemstones, we also export volumes of single cut diamonds and black diamonds.

Name: Greenlab Diamonds
Description:
Greenlab Diamonds is the world’s largest lab-grown Diamond Cultivator. Driven by 2000 employees with 1000 reactors, Greenlab has established itself as a pioneer in the diamond industry. Constantly striving to explore new aspects of technology and innovation. The company started as a diamond cutting and polishing company in the 1960s. Enjoying a proud heritage of over 50 years, it is instrumental in pivoting the outlook towards production of diamonds in a more sustainable way. The facility harnessed 25MW solar power spread across 90 acres of land. Working tirelessly to translate the diamond industry into a CO2 emission-free world. Without compromising on the cultivation of the finest grade and cleanest diamonds. Greenlab Diamonds are IGI and GIA certified, and hold preference for their unmatched quality.
Greenlab aims to constantly deliver towards a greener supply chain through their expert team.They create unique products of high quality lab grown diamonds for everyone with a vision of offering sustainable luxury that nurtures the people and planet. The ultimate goal is to create a better product and seamless B2C pipeline, with least impact on the environment.

Name: GHANSHYAM DAS KOTAWALA
Description:
In the bustling heart of New Delhi stands a name that echoes across ten generations— GHANSHYAM DAS KOTAWALA, a brand under GDK Jewels Pvt. Ltd., rooted in heritage, steeped in artistry, and fuelled by innovation. But this story doesn’t begin here. It begins centuries ago, in the historic city of Kota, Rajasthan, where the Kotawala family laid the foundation for a legacy destined to redefine jewellery craftsmanship. 
In 1955, amidst an era of post-independence optimism and cultural revival, the late Shri Ghanshyam Das Kotawala, son of the late Shri Madan Lal Ji Kotawala, set out with a vision—to create jewellery that transcends time. A pioneer of his era, he inherited not just a craft but a passion for trading precious gemstones: the shimmering Basra pearls and fiery rubies that once adorned royalty. His journey began humbly in Kota, but the pursuit of excellence led him to Jaipur in 1965, where the city’s age-old gemstone traditions breathed new life into his aspirations. Ten years later, with his sights set on a broader canvas, he moved to New Delhi in 1975 and planted the seeds for what would become a celebrated name in gold and diamond jewellery.
Today, the brand is helmed by Ashish Kotawala, grandson of Shri Ghanshyam Das Kotawala and a 10th-generation jeweller. A graduate gemologist from GIA, California, Ashish embodies the perfect harmony of tradition and modern expertise. His meticulous eye for emeralds, diamonds, and rare gemstones has elevated the brand to new heights, expanding its presence from India to the shimmering souks of the Middle East and beyond.
From a young apprentice immersed in diamond grading and jewellery manufacturing to a leader in B2B sales and retailing, Ashish’s journey mirrors the brand’s evolution—steadfast, innovative, and unwavering in its commitment to perfection.Ghanshyam Das Kotawala excels in the wholesale of gold, diamond, and colored stone jewellery, with a distinctive focus on high-end couture and bridal collections.

Name: Dholakia Lab Grown Diamond
Description:
Founded in 2018, Dholakia Lab-Grown Diamonds stands at the forefront of the lab grown diamond industry with its flagship brand, Craft. As a vertically integrated enterprise, we take pride in processing every stage of diamond jewelry—from growing and cutting to polishing, designing, manufacturing, and distributing jewelry under one roof.

Our commitment to sustainability is reflected in our 100% renewable energy use across all our operations, including diamond growth, cutting, polishing, and jewelry manufacturing. Additionally, we prioritize environmental responsibility by utilizing 98% recycled metal in our jewelry production.

With a skilled workforce of over 9,000 professionals in the group, we are one of the largest diamond jewelry manufacturers globally. We proudly serve a diverse clientele, including renowned brands, multi-store retailers, and wholesalers. Holding multiple brand licenses, we are equipped to manufacture and distribute a wide range of high-quality products, consistently meeting the demands of our partners and customers. 

At Dholakia Lab-Grown Diamonds, we blend craftsmanship with innovation, delivering exceptional value and superior products to the global market while championing sustainability.

Name: Choron Group
Description:
The Choron Group was established in 1985 by Rajesh Gandhi in Antwerp, Belgium; the diamond capital of the world. Over the years, Choron developed relationships with the major rough diamond producers in order to secure direct supplies and this has solidified our position as a leading diamond house in the industry. Parallelly, Choron broadened its sales network by increasing its footprint with offices across the globe enabling an extensive distribution network for polished diamonds. 

Today, Choron is a leading international diamond Group primarily focused on the sourcing, assortment & sale of rough diamonds, the manufacturing of exceptional rough diamonds and the sale of polished diamonds. Choron is led by a skilled management team under the leadership of Anshul Gandhi and Parag Gandhi. 

Choron has implemented dedicated efforts for corporate social responsibility initiatives with a keen attention to supporting the communities in and around the business operations. The harmony of economic growth, social inclusion and environmental protection is embedded into the fabric of our DNA. Further to this, Choron has prioritized its corporate governance and introduced measures to improve transparency and sustainability.

Name: Mohini Gems N Jewels
Description:
At Mohini Gems and Jewels, we are honored to be a leading manufacturer of exquisite gold and diamond jewelry. Each piece we create stands as a testament to our unwavering commitment to unparalleled quality and meticulous craftsmanship. Our journey, deeply rooted in a rich legacy of tradition, is fueled by a passion for crafting timeless elegance that resonates with the modern connoisseur. Every design is carefully brought to life, ensuring it embodies the intricate beauty and precision that define our brand.

Name: DVNJEWELRY
Description:
DVN JEWELRY, a sustainable customized jewelry manufacturing company that creates unique and beautiful pieces while minimizing its impact on the planet and its people.
DVN JEWELRY was founded with a mission to create customized jewelry that is both beautiful and ethical. The company's founders recognized that many consumers are looking for unique and personalized jewelry that reflects their values and style, but are also concerned about the environmental and social impacts of traditional jewelry manufacturing. To address these concerns, DVN JEWELRY uses sustainable and ethical materials, as well as responsible production practices.

DVN JEWELRY uses a variety of sustainable and ethical materials in its jewelry production, including recycled metals, lab-grown diamonds, and ethically sourced gemstones. These materials are carefully selected for their quality, durability, and environmental and social credentials. Recycled metals, for example, are obtained from scrap metal and reused in the manufacturing process, reducing the need for mining and minimizing waste. Lab-grown diamonds are created using advanced technology that mimics the natural process of diamond formation, without the environmental impact of mining. Ethically sourced gemstones are obtained from mines and sources that prioritize fair labor practices, environmental sustainability, and community development.
DVN JEWELRY also employs responsible production practices that minimize its environmental impact. The company uses energy-efficient lighting and equipment, and recycles or reuses materials whenever possible. 
DVNTRADERS provides verified India import shipping guidelines through DHL and Aramex courier accounts. Based in Mumbai, we ensure smooth customs clearance, accurate documentation, and cost-effective logistics for global clients since 2006.

We specialize in creating an extensive range of diamond jewelry, ranging from engagement rings to statement necklaces and everything in between. Our skilled craftsmen bring together their decades of expertise and state-of-the-art technology to produce pieces of exceptional quality that are unmatched in their brilliance and beauty.

Our manufacturing facility in India utilizes the finest quality diamonds sourced from trusted suppliers to create jewelry that reflects your unique style and personality. Whether you’re looking for classic designs or modern creations, our wide selection of diamond jewelry is sure to impress. From elegant stud earrings to glamorous cocktail rings, our jewelry is designed to be worn on any occasion and to complement any outfit.

We take pride in providing our customers with an unparalleled level of service, from initial consultation to final delivery. Our experienced team of jewelry professionals works closely with you to understand your needs and preferences, helping you to select the perfect piece of diamond jewelry that will last a lifetime. With our attention to detail, exceptional craftsmanship, and commitment to quality, you can trust that our jewelry will exceed your expectations.

At Jain Diamond, we believe that every piece of jewelry should tell a story. Whether it’s a symbol of love, an expression of gratitude, or a celebration of life’s special moments, our diamond jewelry is designed to capture the essence of your unique journey. Join us in creating lasting memories with our exquisite diamond jewelry.

Name: AURARIA GIOIELLI
Description:
Auraria nasce nel 2003 dalla creatività dei suoi giovani titolari, Marcello Fradiani e Alessio Tirinato, entrambi diplomati all’Istituto d’arte di Roma. Una grande passione li unisce: creare gioielli unici, ricercati ed originali.

Ai tratti innovativi della loro preparazione si avvalgono dell’esperienza e la maestria di Luigi Cerino Badone, che tuttora collabora con la società per ciò che riguarda lo sviluppo artistico e tecnico dei progetti.

La magia della natura e l’amore per il bello sono fonte d’ispirazione per creare pezzi unici, capaci di soddisfare le esigenze più raffinate. Immagini, sensazioni e forme che danno vita ad una sontuosa collezione dedicata alle donne che amano osare.

Creare gioielli è un’arte e Auraria unisce passione ed esperienza nel trasmettere l’amore per l’oro e le pietre preziose. Attraverso i suoi gioielli esprime la storia del Made in Italy, la preziosa esperienza dei nostri Maestri, la tradizione elegante degli orafi e degli antichi mestieri dei più grandi ed abili artigiani.

Name: Crysdiam
Description:
Established in 2013, Ningbo Crysdiam Technology Co., Ltd. is specialized in industrial production and high-end applications of CVD single crystal diamonds.

Crysdiam has built an R&D center with Ningbo Institute of Materials Technology & Engineering, China Academy of Sciences and has established long-term strategic alliances with many multinational companies, universities, and research institutes in Japan and the United States. We have multiple core intellectual property rights including domestic and international patents. We got the title of “National High-tech Enterprise” and “National Little Giant” (SME specializes in a niche market and boasts cutting-edge technologies).

As a leading producer in terms of production scale and technological level, Crysdiam offers large-sized CVD diamond seeds (40mm*40mm below), high quality CVD polished diamonds (DEF color, VVS or above clarity), and CVD diamond materials (thermal management/ mechanical/ optical/ electronic grade/ quantum material), as well as customized products.

Headquartered in Ningbo China, Crysdiam is establishing sales and service platforms in Shenzhen, Hong Kong, the UAE, the US and India, etc.

Ningbo Crysdiam, we grow New Brilliance for you!

Description:
Now celebrating 75 years, for three generations, Grandview Klein has been renowned for its diamond cutting expertise and devotion to its clients.

Our dedication to craftsmanship, trust, and integrity has led us to become one of the largest diamond manufacturers and direct suppliers worldwide, boasting sales offices in New York, Tel Aviv, and Hong Kong.

Description:
Euro Meccanica Preziosi è leader nella progettazione e realizzazione di chiusure, moschettoni e ganci per la fascia medio-alta del mercato internazionale dell’oreficeria e della gioielleria.
Ogni chiusura interpreta lo stile del designer e nasce come pezzo unico di artigianato industriale, ad alto tasso di innovazione: un “Gioiello nel gioiello”.
Euromep si pone come partner dedicato per i brand che operano su scala globale, rispondendo in tempi estremamente contenuti alle loro esigenze in termini di creatività, progettazione, prototipazione e produzione.
Sviluppa modelli personalizzati, di eccellente fattura, fino a creazioni in esclusiva, caratterizzate da grande cura del dettaglio e alto pregio delle finiture.
Euromep nasce nel tessuto industriale dell’oro di Vicenza, ne eredita le doti del “saper fare” e l’alta qualità artigianale, sempre più apprezzata dal mercato del lusso e del design. Artigianalità in cui i processi produttivi sono industrializzati, per consentire anche produzioni di grandi quantitativi.

Description:
Wholesale account management firm, were we proudly offer over two decades of expertise in business-to-business sales and account management within the realm of multi-line women's contemporary apparel and accessories brands.



For the past 20 years, we have been committed to forging meaningful connections between retailers and premier brands in the industry. Our showroom serves fashion buyers and boutique owners can explore an expertly curated collection of apparel and accessories.

Our seasoned team of account managers stands ready to leverage their extensive experience, ensuring you gain access to the latest trends and essential pieces for your clientele. 

At the heart of our ethos lies a commitment to sustainability and ethical practices, aligning seamlessly with the evolving landscape of responsible fashion. As a firm with two decades of dedication to nurturing enduring partnerships between brands and retailers, our track record speaks to our passion for the industry.

Whether you are a brand seeking expansion or a retailer in search of the perfect additions to your inventory, our showroom and account management firm, fortified by 20 years of industry experience, stands ready as your trusted collaborator in the ever-evolving world of women's contemporary apparel and accessories.

Name: Authentic Gem Imports, Inc. (AGI)
Description:
AGI was originally founded by Pete Vaidya, starting out as a loose gemstone distributor in the Southwest region only. AGI has expanded over the last 4+ decades to establish its dominance in the wholesale B2B market as a fine jewelry and gemstone powerhouse. AGI has two core divisions – loose precious color gemstones and finished jewelry, and exclusively supplies to independent retail stores all across North America. AGI is a vertically integrated wholesale manufacturer and distributor. 

AGI’s finished jewelry line is a combination of high quality materials (14K, 18K, or platinum), genuine/mined diamonds and luscious, rich-in-color gemstones (never synthetic or lab-grown), and most importantly, an ever-evolving curation of the latest trends and fashion statements at attractive, sellable price points for our retail partners. 

We also pride ourselves on our gemstone expertise and detailed curation. With on-staff gemologists to assist, we will always provide subject-matter expertise on rare and expensive gemstones for our retail partners.

To learn more about our product offerings, please visit us at www.shopagi.com.

We offer a diverse range of fine lab-grown diamond jewellery in 9k, 10k, 14k & 18kt in Rose Gold, White Gold and Yellow Gold with new additions every month. Our large collection of jewellery settings and co-development options ensure that we match the diverse needs of our customers.

Since our establishment in 1993, we have been a complete value chain enterprise, committed to ethical sourcing, manufacturing, and distribution of all types of lab-grown diamond jewellery.

Name: JASANI Group
Description:
Since 1966, the Jasani Group has been a trusted name in the diamond industry, known for our commitment to excellence. As a vertically integrated company, we carefully oversee every step of the diamond's journey—from selecting rough stones to crafting polished diamonds and exquisite jewellery. Our dedication to sustainability is reflected in our green-certified manufacturing facilities, which account for over half of our operations. We also promote equality, with women making up about 25% of our workforce.

Our long-standing partnership with De Beers as sightholders since 1973 underscores the trust and progressive values that guide us. For over 50 years, Jasani Group has been your partner in bringing ethically sourced diamonds from mine to masterpiece.

Headquartered in Mumbai, we have a global presence, reaching major markets in the USA, Europe, India, the Middle East, China, and Hong Kong. As pioneers in lean manufacturing within the diamond industry, we focus on optimizing resources and minimizing waste, producing melee diamonds from 0.60mm to 4.25mm in Clean to I1 clarity.

At Jasani Group, we do more than sell diamonds; we turn your vision into a promised reality. Our team of over 5,000 skilled professionals is dedicated to providing exceptional service, offering custom diamond selections and precise millimeter cuts tailored to your needs.

We are a future-ready business sensitive to the needs of our customers, people, and the environment. Each diamond we craft is created with care, resulting in jewellery that tells a story as unique and special as you.

Name: Heyaru Group
Description:
Based in Lommel, Belgium, near the Diamond capital of the world “Antwerp” and founded in 2016, Heyaru is a Material Development Company. The Company is active in the business of Advanced Materials diamond applications with zero carbon footprints through Chemical Vapour Deposition and synthesizing for producing super-hard advanced materials for various industries worldwide, e.g., Gems, Semi-conductor, Tunneling, Mining, and Drilling applications.

By replicating the same process of how a natural diamond gets created in a controlled environment in a laboratory, diamonds are grown without hurting the environment.

We at Heyaru Engineering have broad experience in processing diamonds. We supply both single-crystal diamonds and polycrystalline diamonds in several qualities. All our diamonds are high-quality, lab-grown, Chemical Vapour Deposited as our customers require the highest standard and often tailor-made diamonds. Therefore, we can meet these requirements with a wide range of production techniques.

Heyaru’s polycrystalline cubic boron nitride (PCBN) produces cutting tools for materials like grey & hard cast irons, hard steels & high-temperature super-alloys.

We call our diamonds “The material of the future,” which is disruptive material and will revolutionize material technologies soon.

Heyaru offers lab-grown diamonds that are chemically, physically, optically, and atomically identical to diamonds mined from the earth.

# FOREIGN INVESTMENT TROPHY 2020 # FLANDERS INVESTMENT AND TRADE of Belgium has nominated Heyaru.

# Government Grant # Strategic transformation support of 2 million euros was granted by the Flemish government to aid Heyaru Engineering.

We are a Founding Member of  “Lab-Grown Diamond and Jewellery Promotion Council India”. We are a pioneer in introducing CVD and HPHT technology in India and advocate for the development of technology that is sustainable and eco-friendly.
We are dedicated to the development of new and innovative applications for diamonds. We are a team of scientists, engineers, and entrepreneurs with a passion for pushing the boundaries of what is possible with diamonds.
Sonani Industries is currently building many types of new systems: 1)2.45 GHz system for ultra-High Purity Diamonds 2)2.45 GHz System for Boron Doped diamond 3) 6 Design of 2.45 GHz MPCVD 4) 4 Design of 915 Mhz system for large area growth 5) We are already in the plan to make 5 new types of reactors in-house to grow diamonds from Gem to Scientific applications
Our Work: We are currently working on a variety of diamond applications, including:
●	Diamond sensors for medical diagnostics
●	Diamond lasers for industrial applications
●	Diamond coatings for wear resistance
●	Diamond electronics for high-performance computing
●	Diamond quantum devices for secure communication
Our Mission: Our mission is to develop new diamond applications that will improve people's lives and make the world a better place. We are committed to conducting cutting-edge research and to translating our findings into real-world products and services.
We believe that diamonds have the potential to solve some of the world's most pressing problems. We are committed to making this happen, and we invite you to join us on this journey.

Description:
House of Jewellery, located in Toronto, Ontario, has established itself as a leading company in the dynamic jewellery industry. Our commitment is to offer a comprehensive range of fashionable and competitively priced jewellery pieces, addressing the demands of today's selective and well-informed consumers.

Over the past 30 years, House of Jewellery has proudly served the retail jewellery market in North America. Our dedicated team of buyers scours the globe to source unique jewellery designs, meticulously selected to meet the distinct preferences of our diverse clientele and their customers.

Our clientele is as diverse as our product lines, spanning from DIY designers to well-established independent retailers and longstanding chain stores. Our extensive inventory features an array of trendy designs in sterling silver, some of which incorporate exquisite cubic zirconia. We also embrace minimalistic aesthetics with our recently expanded lines of 10K and 14K gold jewellery, complemented by a substantial collection of conflict-free diamonds.

To better connect with our valued customers, House of Jewellery actively engages on various social media platforms. We encourage you to follow us on your preferred platform to stay informed about our latest product offerings and trends. With our commitment to staying on-trend and delivering exceptional value, House of Jewellery is here to help you shine in the ever-evolving world of jewellery fashion.

Name: L'ORCHESTRE PARFUM
Description:
Amplifying emotion
The alchemy between fragrance & music has the power to amplify emotion. 
More than 10 years ago, this intuition became a conviction. 
By interpreting for the first time on stage a musical composition simultaneously sharing the perfume inspired by this melody. The reactions and enthusiasm provoked by this live experience are unanimous.
Since then, we have never stopped exploring the links that unite these two artistic materials that share the same existence, obey the same laws: music like perfume are born from the hand of an artist, live in the air of fleeting way and then vanish, creating an emotion in their sillage or reviving a memory.

Augmented Fragrances
We went in search of the "smell of music" with the greatest craftsmen & luthiers around the world. Essences of guitar wood, trombone brass, kora leather... Great perfumers have associated these scents with the most beautiful perfume materials and virtuosos from all over the world have composed the melody in total freedom. 
The result ? A new perfume experience, unique and unforgettable. 

Compositions with a commitment
All our musical fragrances are responsibly created & made in France. 
100% vegan, they are made with natural alcohol from French beets.
We believe that learning music is life changing. We have therefore engaged in major music-educational program called Démos (La Philarmonie Paris). 
The goal ? Give access to as many children as possible to the study and practice of music.

Name: Grover Jewells Limited
Description:
From Gold Chains to Premium Jewellery – "A Legacy of Trust and Craftsmanship"
Founded in 2010 by Mr. Deepak Kumar Grover, Grover Jewells began as a humble venture with just two machines and a vision—to craft jewellery that resonates with emotion and enduring value. We incorporated as a Company in Year 2021 formerly known as Grover Chain Private Limited, the company has since grown into one of India’s leading names in the manufacturing and wholesale of gold chains, casting jewellery, and Italian Jewellery.
With a strong foundation in the heart of Delhi’s jewellery markets , our state-of-the-art manufacturing unit at Lawrence Road and wholesale showrooms in Karol Bagh and Chandni Chowk serve thousands of B2B clients across India. Our in-house production capabilities, powered by advanced Italian and casting technology, allow us to maintain consistency, quality, and innovation across every piece.
At Grover Jewells, we believe jewellery is more than just metal and stones—it is a symbol of love, legacy, and connection. 
We are proud to be active participants in India’s most prestigious jewellery exhibitions, including IIJS, DJGF, and AIJS.
Our excellence in design and innovation has been recognised through the JMAIIE Excellence Award, and we are proud members of the Gem & Jewellery Export Promotion Council.
In 2024, we embraced the digital age with the launch of our official Grover Jewells mobile app, offering real-time access to collections, offers, and updates, bringing the wholesale jewellery experience to our clients' fingertips.
Our Mission
To craft jewellery that celebrates love, tradition, and life's milestones, while nurturing lasting relationships built on trust.
Our Vision
To be India’s most trusted name in wholesale jewellery, known for craftsmanship, innovation, and excellence.
Led by:
•Mr. Deepak Kumar Grover—Managing Director & Promoter
•Mr. Lavkesh Kumar Grover— Director & Promoter
•Mr. Sunny Grover—Chief Executive Officer

Name: RATNAKALA EXPORTS PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
Ratnakala is a natural diamond manufacturing company with more than forty-five years of experience serving both Indian and international markets.

The company operates across the full diamond manufacturing cycle, from the sourcing of rough stones to the cutting and polishing of finished diamonds. Its business is structured around disciplined processes, technical precision, and consistent quality, enabling long-term relationships with partners in major global trading centers.

Ratnakala produces over 200,000 carats of polished natural diamonds annually, ranging from 0.18 to 7.00 carats, with grades spanning D to M color and FL to I2 clarity. Manufacturing is supported by modern infrastructure, skilled artisanship, and rigorous quality controls aligned with international standards.

Innovation is approached pragmatically, with an emphasis on reliability, scalability, and value creation for trade partners rather than novelty for its own sake.

Ratnakala is a member of the Responsible Jewellery Council (RJC) and adheres to internationally recognized principles of responsible business conduct, ethical sourcing, and operational transparency. Its sustainability efforts include the use of renewable energy generated by three windmills with a combined capacity of 2 MW.

The company’s growth has been guided by continuity, professional stewardship, and a long-term view of value in global diamond manufacturing.

An international presence
We work with the biggest jewellery brands in the world and are present in more than 30 countries including the USA, Germany, the UK, Spain, South America, Australia, Norway, Sweden and Finland. We regularly participate in various international exhibitions in Italy, Germany, Switzerland and Hong Kong.


Our values
As ethical and responsible jewellers, we want to build a relationship with our customers based on trust. We see ourselves as accountable to our customers, our employees and the environment, with a holistic approach to improving the lives of all those around us.


Our strengths
Quality, reliability, know-how, price and professionalism; these are all assets that enable us to gain the trust of our customers and build long-term partnerships. Thanks to our financial strength, we are able to invest in state-of-the-art equipment that frees our craftsmen from most technical constraints. Name: United Precious Metal Refining, Inc.
Description:
United is a leading supplier of master alloys, de-oxidized sterling silver, solder and wire products. In addition United is a full-service refiner for your precious metal needs. United's success in the precious metal industry is due to exceptional levels of detail and uncompromising customer service. The technical expertise at United is unparalleled in the jewelry industry.

What drives us at United is quality.  What this means to you is the confidence to know you have purchased the finest product available.  But the finest product is just the beginning, behind these products are the technical expertise to make them work.

We understand manufacturing processes and equipment used in jewelry manufacturing.  Our background is jewelry manufacturing.  Our skills however, are in research and development.

United was granted two patents for de-oxidized sterling silver which revolutionized sterling silver manufacturing productivity.  We were the first to develop a usable product, with improved formulations continuously being developed.

The United Team was the first to commercialize Silicon de-oxidized gold alloys 25 years ago.  These non patented alloys first developed by Tony Eccles of Apecs Investment Casting Limited, Australia, made their way through England and to the United States where the first commercial alloys were developed.  Silicon de-oxidized gold alloys are the reference standard for the world, for jewelry investment casting.

United's principals were the first gold solder manufacturers to substitute Indium for Cadmium in gold solders.  We are very proud to have removed a very dangerous metal from many jewelry benches.

Our philosophy is that our success can only come from your success.  We will continue to strive to make your company more productive with improved products and innovative services.

United's mission is to achieve profitable growth through superior customer services, innovation and a commitment to product quality.

Name: Saban Onyx Inc.
Description:
Saban Diamonds (founded in 1977) and Onyx Diamonds (founded in 1987) made a name for themselves separately as pioneers in the manufacture of square and rectangular diamonds. The two companies combined their individual expertise in 2014 to form Saban Onyx.

Today we serve the jewelry industry as a manufacturer of responsibly sourced polished diamonds, from traditional cuts to fancy shapes. We support our retail clients from behind the scenes, producing white label goods that help our clients build their brands.

Since our merger we have expanded worldwide, with offices in New York, Belgium, Tel Aviv, Los Angeles, Hong Kong, and Thailand. We offer a wide range of services to the jewelry and watch industries, from jewelry design to manufacturing to wholesale services and support.

About 1
Our diamond-cutting plant in Thailand has a workforce of more than 150 employees. There we specialize in meeting the precise standards of the watch industry, and can produce diamonds with precise cutting in the range of 0.03 to 1.00 ct. Our ability to produce round brilliant, fancy shapes, and special cut diamonds is unparalleled, and has earned us the trust of prestigious watch and jewelry brands and independent retailers around the world.

The fifty-employee operation in our New York factory support the supply of diamonds and the design and manufacturing of bridal and fine jewelry. Our dedicated presence in the US makes it possible for us to provide dedicated, personal support to our North American retailers.

Together with our offices around the world, we operate our own vertically integrated supply chain, ensuring uncompromising quality, exceptional value, and reliable fulfillment.

As well as designer diamond jewelry.

Our commitment to deliver excellence has kept us striving for quality, creativity, and customer satisfaction. With integration of technical innovations and expert craftsmanship, we produce a variety of finest cut diamonds, catering to unique needs of each customer.

Our prospective and vision is to became a trustworthy supplier to our valued customers and make sustainable mark in the diamond industry.

Name: Jewelry Repair of Atlanta
Description:
Jewelry Repair of Atlanta (JRA) is a premier full-service jewelry repair, manufacturing, and restoration company based in Atlanta, GA. We specialize in a broad range of high-quality services, from delicate repairs and complex restorations to custom manufacturing for both individual clients and global luxury brands. At JRA, our mission is to bring unparalleled craftsmanship and expertise to every piece we handle, preserving its value, sentiment, and beauty for years to come.

Our services extend beyond traditional repair. 

As a full-scale operation, we offer:

Luxury Jewelry Repair & Restoration: 
Trusted by top luxury brands, JRA provides high-quality repair and restoration services, ensuring each piece regains its original brilliance and charm.

Custom Manufacturing & Design: 
Our skilled artisans work with clients to create one-of-a-kind pieces and offer white-label manufacturing for brands seeking exclusive, private-label designs.

Warranty & Insurance Partnerships: 
We collaborate with leading insurance companies and retailers to offer comprehensive warranty management and appraisal services, making JRA the preferred choice for quality and reliability.

Workforce Development & Training Programs: 
Through partnerships with institutions like Savannah College of Art and Design and the New Approach School for Jewelers, we develop the next generation of jewelry artisans, ensuring a steady pipeline of top talent.

At Jewelry Repair of Atlanta, we are committed to becoming the trusted name for individual consumers and the go-to manufacturing and repair partner for luxury brands worldwide. We combine tradition with innovation, embracing advanced technology and ethical practices to deliver sustainable, top-tier service. Every piece we handle is treated with precision, expertise, and a commitment to excellence.

Name: Aqua Technics Pools UK
Description:
Would you like to be a local authorised Aqua Technics Pools UK installer? If you'd like to add the world's no.1 one-piece pool to your offer and benefit from the best product in its global market, backed by the most comprehensive dealer support, and benefit from an exclusive local territory, we'd like to hear from you.

For almost fifty years, homeowners in Australia and many other countries worldwide, have relied on Aqua Technics Pools for quality outdoor entertainment, health, and well-being.

Founded in 1976 by Perth entrepreneur Lew Beale, Aqua Technics Pools aimed to create top-tier one-piece swimming pools, emphasizing product quality and customer service. The company is owned and operated by the same family to this day, maintaining its position as industry leader.

Traditional pool construction involved time-consuming processes, leading to increased costs and risks. However, Aqua Technics Pools revolutionized the industry with its one-piece pools, manufactured off-site and transported for swift installation, eliminating common construction challenges.

The availability of Aqua Technics Pools in the UK and Europe through Aqua Technics Pools UK brings convenience to British and European homeowners. With ample stocks kept in our Kent HQ and efficient delivery direct to customer on our own purpose-built truck, installation can be completed in weeks rather than months, allowing customers to enjoy their pools sooner.

With over 230 awards worldwide, Aqua Technics Pools is renowned for its quality and innovation. Features like Graphene Nano-Tech and PoolColourGuard ensure superior durability and ease of maintenance.

By prefabricating pool components off-site, Aqua Technics Pools streamlines the installation process, reducing risks and saving time for homeowners.

A video with background on Aqua Technics Pools and some beautiful footage of award-winning UK installations can be viewed on YouTube by going to this link: https://tinyurl.com/34cacecx

We have received several awards since our inception from local and global industry bodies for the transparency and sustainability that we rigorously uphold in our sourcing, refining and supply of precious metals in the Indian market. MMTC-PAMP is the only LBMA-accredited Gold & Silver refinery in India, and is accepted across global commodity exchanges and central banks.

Name: RAJVI DIAMONDS
Description:
Rajvi Diamonds, a beacon of excellence in the world of diamonds, where innovation meets tradition. Founded in 2020 by Bhaudikkumar Jadavbhai Kevdia, Rajvi Diamonds has swiftly become a distinguished name in the diamond industry, specializing in Alphabet Cut Diamonds and Lab Grown Diamonds. Our headquarters are nestled in Surat, Gujarat, the heart of India’s diamond manufacturing hub, enabling us to leverage the city's rich heritage and advanced technological prowess.


Our Journey
Rajvi Diamonds was born out of a passion for precision and a commitment to quality. Bhaudikkumar Jadavbhai Kevdia envisioned a company that would not only uphold the highest standards of craftsmanship but also innovate in ways that redefine the diamond industry. From our humble beginnings, we have grown into a trusted name, known for our dedication to perfection and our innovative approach to diamond cutting and manufacturing.


Our Commitment to Quality
Quality is the cornerstone of Rajvi Diamonds. We adhere to stringent quality control measures at every stage of the manufacturing process. Our team of skilled artisans and technicians use state-of-the-art technology to ensure each diamond meets our high standards. From the initial cutting to the final polishing, every step is meticulously executed to produce diamonds that are nothing
short of perfect.


Innovation and Technology
Innovation is in our DNA. We constantly explore new techniques and technologies to enhance our products and processes. Our investment in advanced machinery and software enables us to achieve precision and efficiency in diamond cutting and shaping. By staying ahead of industry trends and adopting the latest advancements, we ensure that our products remain at the pinnacle of quality and innovation.

Name: MAA SATTI JEWELS PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
Established in 2003, Maa Satti Jewels (MSJ) was founded with a humble vision — to bring India’s jeweled heritage and luxury craftsmanship to the world.

From Jaipur’s royal artistry to modern innovation, we have mastered the art of creating fine jewelry that reflects elegance, exclusivity, and timeless design.

Our legacy of excellence has been recognized by the Madras Jewelers & Diamond Merchants Association (2018) and celebrated with the Jewellery Eminence Award for “Polki Necklace of the Year” (2025) — honoring our commitment to heritage and innovation.

At Maa Satti Jewels, every creation tells a story of tradition, craftsmanship, and passion. Guided by generations of expertise, our skilled artisans meticulously handcraft each piece, preserving centuries-old techniques while infusing modern sophistication.

By intentionally limiting our annual production to 850–1250 exclusive sets, we ensure every design remains a rare masterpiece — crafted for connoisseurs who value authenticity, precision, and enduring beauty.

Trusted by 200+ esteemed B2B partners across India and beyond, MSJ continues to redefine the landscape of luxury Polki, Diamond, and Fine Jewelry, bringing Indian artistry to a global audience.

 *Maa Satti Jewels — Where Heritage Meets Modern Luxury.*

Each creation reflects a harmonious blend of advanced technology, master craftsmanship, and meticulous attention to detail.

Every order undergoes rigorous quality assurance, ensuring that each piece meets the highest standards of excellence.

Choosing Ishanta Jewels is a commitment to refined quality, trust, and enduring value.

SARAH AVALI - The Power of Pearl

Founded in the heart of Hyderabad – the City of Pearls – SARAH AVALI is a boutique jewelry brand dedicated to reviving timeless pearl elegance through heirloom-quality craftsmanship.

* Brides, wedding planners, and partygoers

Our Philosophy:
Pearls never go out of style. They embody strength, grace, and timeless beauty. At SARAH AVALI, we preserve this legacy for generations to come.

Let’s create elegance that lasts a lifetime.

SARAH AVALI

Name: LAC SPA
Description:
LAC S.p.A. was established in the province of Treviso in 1974 and in 1976 it moved to Romano d’Ezzelino (Vicenza province).

The company has over 100 employees and approximately the same number in outside workshops.

LAC’s customers are situated not only in Italy, but all over the world: Europe, America, all the Far East and the Arab Emirates.

If LAC's core business are gold chains with an automatic process in every purities (333 and 916 included), over the years a wide range of complementary services and products has been developed (i.e. Customer projects with dedicated tooling production, use of CNC machines, stamping and coining process) in order to be able to realize a wide range of products that can satisfy our Customers needs and wants.
It's quite a long time that LAC SpA has consolidated important international experiences with the main Brands of watches and jewelry industry, giving its technical expertise to Customer projects.

In today’s intricate market structure, LAC intends highlighting its principles (or distinctive characteristics) of flexibility, product and ongoing research for technical innovation, while always focusing on the quality and efficiency of the production process.

Whether you're looking for a stunning centerpiece for a piece of jewelry, a unique addition to your gemstone collection, or a special gift for someone dear, Ferrum International offers a personalized and seamless experience, backed by a passion for excellence and a deep appreciation for the natural wonders of Burmese gemstones.

Name: Reps Are Local Too
Description: Independent retail needs everyone’s help. It’s inspiring to see that supporting Main Street has become a rallying cry via the “Shop Local” movement aimed at consumers. But who else has an important role to play in supporting many of the 4.6 million retail establishments in the U.S.? Local sales reps. Often running their businesses from their kitchen tables, sales reps go the extra mile to meet the needs of retailers and their local shoppers — learning customer preferences, introducing unique products, and truly listening to consumer needs. Sales reps are the often-overlooked lifeline of their communities, working hard to fill stores with new products and helping create local revenue so that every Main Street may thrive. Communities don’t directly benefit from online shopping, but they benefit in countless ways from the loyal work of local sales reps. So let’s embrace our local sales reps — the unsung heroes of independent retail.

Commitments :

Compliance :

Name: Kanaya SIlver
Description:
Truly Artisan. Truly Bali. 

Founded in 2020, Kanaya Silver was born with a single vision — to preserve Bali’s centuries-old jewelry artistry while sharing it with the world. Today, we stand as one of Bali’s leading manufacturers of 925 sterling silver and gold jewelry, offering both plain and gemstone-studded creations.

What makes us different?

 Authenticity at the Core — Every piece is handcrafted by Balinese master artisans, carrying forward traditions passed down through generations.

 Ethically Sourced Gemstones — We carefully select gemstones to ensure sustainability and integrity.

 Empowered Artisans — Our team is paid fair, upright wages, reflecting our belief that true luxury comes with responsibility.

 Unmatched Design Library — With thousands of original designs and a world-class team of in-house designers, we cater to clients across the USA, Europe, and beyond.

From delicate daily wear to bold statement jewelry, Kanaya Silver is a one-stop solution for brands, retailers, and designers seeking authentic Balinese craftsmanship blended with modern global aesthetics.

At Kanaya Silver, jewelry is not just an accessory — it is a story of culture, heritage, and soul.

 Based in Bali, reaching the world.
 Always, Truly Artisan.

Karriere bei der AMOR Group
Nicht nur unsere Kollektionen sind attraktiv und abwechslungsreich – auch als Arbeitgeber haben wir einiges im Sortiment, das Ihnen gefallen könnte. Durch unseren nationalen und internationalen Erfolg eröffnen sich zahlreiche berufliche Perspektiven. So sind wir immer auf der Suche nach begeisterungsfähigen Persönlichkeiten, die mit neuen Ideen frischen Wind in den Wettbewerb am Markt bringen. Dies gilt für engagierte Einsteiger als auch für versierte Berufserfahrene. Aktuelle Jobangebote finden Sie hier und auf unserer Website.

Name: Maison GIOIA
Description:
Bienvenue chez Maison Gioia,
nous gravons les histoires du cœur en bijoux éternels. Votre histoire.

L’histoire de Maison Gioia débute en 2021, dans une chambre d’adolescente – celle de chez mes parents.
C’est là qu’est née l’envie de créer une identité unique : une marque qui permet à chacun de raconter son histoire de manière originale et personnelle.

Je décide alors d’allier ma passion pour la création de bijoux à cette envie de transmettre des émotions. (Je me revois encore, petite, en train de créer mes premiers bijoux en perles, les yeux pleins d’imagination.)

En 2023, Maison Gioia voit officiellement le jour.
Depuis, je mets un point d’honneur à ce que chaque pièce soit imaginée, créée et assemblée avec soin — parce que chaque détail compte, et que chaque personne est unique.

Je suis Lony, fondatrice de Maison Gioia,
et je grave les histoires du cœur.

Name: Gioielleriabylonss
Description:
Bienvenue dans l’univers de Gioielleriabylonss , un espace où le bijou devient le reflet de votre personnalité. 

Découvrez notre Bar à Charms, un concept exclusif qui vous permet de créer des bijoux uniques à votre image. Assemblez des charms qui racontent votre histoire — initiales, symboles, pierres… chaque création est une expression de vous-même.

Gioielleriabylonss, c’est aussi une collection de bijoux durables en acier inoxydable: bagues, colliers, boucles d’oreilles et compositions d’oreilles, vous trouverez votre bonheur.

—

Je m’appelle Lony, fondatrice de Gioielleriabylonss et étudiante le reste du temps.
Cette aventure a commencé en décembre 2023, dans ma chambre, avec l’envie de créer bien plus que des bijoux : une marque qui célèbre l’authenticité, l’individualité et le soin du détail. 

Je mets un point d’honneur à ce que chaque pièce soit pensée, créée et assemblée avec attention, car je suis convaincue que chaque détail fait la différence, et que chaque personne est unique.

 Retrouvez toutes nos créations en ligne ou directement à l’Institut Calys, en plein cœur de Grenoble.

Description:
With a legacy spanning nearly five decades, Santosh Jewellers stands as an epitome of luxury and craftsmanship in the world of fine jewellery. Founded in 1976, we have been synonymous with excellence, catering to the discerning tastes, our main strength is manufacturing timeless yet unique pieces of jewelry using the finest quality gemstones, due to which we have been able to create an elite HNI clientele around the globe, including the royal families in the middle east.

Description:
Kapit Mas is a foreign owned specialist silver jewelry manufacturing company based in Bali Indonesia, established in 1996. Bali was chosen as a home base for the company due to the wide range of traditional skills to be found on the island and the inherent creativity of the local artisans. These are skills which are not easily taught or acquired and which gives Bali a unique advantage in jewelry manufacturing.

At Kapit Mas these skills have been complemented by a well equipped and managed factory, incorporating international best practice standards for jewelry manufacture, and a systems based approach to production, quality control and customer services. We are fully integrated, we do not sub contract work out or use vendors, and this gives us a very strong competitive advantage and allows us to better support our customers. All works from design and development through to packing and shipping are carried out under one roof and under the full control of our management team.

We have a policy of continually questioning, researching, developing, and striving to be the best we possibly can be.

We welcome visits to our factory and encourage our customers to come and see for themselves the way we work.

Name: Australia Sapphire
Description:
About Us


Welcome to Australia Sapphire, a custom jewellery manufacturer nestled in the heart of the captivating Queensland Gemfields, Australia! Founded in 2016 by Eenos Henno, we create bespoke jewellery crafted with your vision in mind, transforming your concepts into high-quality, personalised pieces featuring carefully selected and expertly cut Australian Sapphires. Each piece is a reflection of the wearer, making it as unique as the story it tells.


Our journey began with Eenos Henno’s deep fascination for the exquisite gemstones found in this region, particularly the Australian Sapphire. From this passion, Australia Sapphire, also known as Gemestonia, was born—a jewellery manufacturer dedicated to transforming these natural treasures into timeless pieces of art.

Bespoke Jewellery

At Australia Sapphire, we believe that jewellery should be as unique as the individual wearing it. We specialise in bespoke jewellery, crafted with your vision in mind. Whether you’re dreaming of a custom engagement ring or a one-of-a-kind necklace, we work with you to bring your concepts to life. Our expertly cut Australian Sapphires are carefully selected to ensure the highest quality, and each piece is designed to reflect your personal story and style.

Ethics & Sustainability

We are deeply committed to ethical sourcing and sustainability. By maintaining close relationships with local miners, we ensure that our sapphires are responsibly and ethically sourced,contributing positively to the communities and environment.

A Personalised Experience

We understand that jewellery is more than just an accessory—it’s a personal statement and often a cherished heirloom. Our dedicated team is here to guide you through the process, whether you’re looking for a unique piece for yourself or a gift for a loved one. From the moment you step into our shop or browse our online collection, we aim to make your experience both memorable and enjoyable.

With warm regards,
Australia Sapphire Team

Our key strengths lie not only in directly sourcing competitively priced diamonds but also creating thousands of designs specific to the needs of each of our global clients.

Our main focus is on fulfilling demands of retailers and distributors all across the globe. We supply a variety of jewelry,  from bridal to diamond fashion and several other categories.

Our family owned company became a De Beers Sight holder in a short span of time is a rare feet and this was achieved within 11 years of its establishment. Direct diamond sourcing from other mining giants like Rio Tinto’s, Australian Argyle mine and Canadian Diavik mines in late 1990’s was another rare accomplishment.

Name: Maitri Diamonds Inc
Description: Maitri Diamonds manufactures the perfectly sustainable alternative to naturally sourced mined diamonds – Lab-grown Diamonds. By replicating the exact same natural process of how a natural diamond is formed in a controlled environment in a laboratory, diamonds are made without hurting the environment. These diamonds are chemically, physically and optically the same as natural diamonds, so much so that a Jewelers cannot distinguish between the two without a certificate and required instruments. Lab-grown diamonds by Maitri Diamonds are evaluated on their merit for the 4Cs – Color, Cut, Clarity and Carat and then certified by IGI, GIA, GCAL, HRD and the like – all renowned and credible Gemological Institutes. Maitri’s diamonds offer excellent value and are more affordable than natural diamonds of comparable size and quality. Following a humanitarian approach and an affinity towards a greener planet has been the driving force in the inception of Maitri Diamonds. When you choose to adorn diamonds offered by Maitri, you choose The Right Diamond – for you, for the planet.

At Kierand Consulting, we redefine luxury manufacturing with precision, expertise, and innovative design.

Name: C6 LabGrown Diamonds LLP
Description:
Welcome to C6 Lab Grown Diamonds, where innovation meets sustainability in the diamond industry. Based in Surat, India, C6 is at the forefront of revolutionizing how diamonds are sourced and produced.

Founded by Ashok Poshiya, an esteemed entrepreneur with over three decades of experience in the diamond sector, C6 Lab Grown Diamonds is committed to providing ethical, eco-friendly, and visually identical alternatives to traditionally mined diamonds. Our journey began with a vision to offer high-quality diamonds without compromising on ethical values or budget constraints.

At C6, we specialize in manufacturing lab-grown diamonds using cutting-edge technologies such as Chemical Vapor Deposition (CVD) and High Pressure High Temperature (HPHT). These diamonds possess the same physical, chemical, and optical properties as natural diamonds but are produced in a controlled laboratory environment, eliminating the need for environmentally harmful mining practices.

Our mission is to exceed customer expectations by offering personalized service, expert advice, and customized solutions tailored to individual needs. We prioritize sustainability and ethical sourcing, ensuring that our diamonds are free from conflict and produced in an environmentally sustainable manner.

By choosing C6 Lab Grown Diamonds, customers not only acquire exquisite gemstones but also contribute to the preservation of natural resources and ecosystems. Our commitment to responsible business practices and sustainable development is reflected in every aspect of our operations.

Join us in reshaping the diamond industry for a brighter, more sustainable future. Connect with C6 Lab Grown Diamonds on LinkedIn and discover the ethical, eco-friendly alternative to traditional mined diamonds.

Name: SENAVERA SRL
Description:
Senavera è più di un marchio di gioielli: è un'esaltaziine della bellezza, un sogno plasmato dalle mani esperte dei nostri artigiani. Ogni curva, ogni linea, è un'espressione di passione, amore e un innato senso estetico.

La nostra missione è semplice quanto ambiziosa: far sentire ogni persona unica e speciale, in ogni occasione. Che si tratti di una serata di gala o di un momento di pura gioia quotidiana, i nostri gioielli sono pensati per esaltare la tua individualità.

Ogni creazione Senavera è un capolavoro senza tempo, un'opera d'arte che trascende le mode effimere. I nostri gioielli sono pensati per essere tramandati, custodi di storie e ricordi preziosi.

Nati nel cuore dell'Italia, nelle incantevoli Marche, ci lasciamo ispirare dalla dolcezza delle colline, dalla forza del mare, dalla rigogliosa natura con il suo verde avvolgente e dalla ricca eredità culturale. Questi elementi si fondono in ogni nostra creazione, regalandoti un gioiello che riflette la tua anima e esalta la tua bellezza!

----------

Senavera is more than a jewelry brand: it is a celebration of beauty, a dream brought to life by the skilled hands of our craftspeople. Every detail expresses passion, every curve has an innate sense of aesthetics.

Making everybody feel unique and special on every occasion is our mission. Whether it's a grand evening out or a moment of everyday pleasure, our jewellery is designed to highlight your individuality.
Each Senavera piece is a timeless masterpiece, a work of art that goes beyond fleeting trends.

Our jewellery is crafted to be passed down through the generations, keepers of stories and cherished memories.

Born in the heart of Italy, in the charming Marche region, we draw inspiration from the gentle rolling hills, the rugged strength of the sea, the lush greenery of nature, and the rich cultural heritage. These elements come together in each of our creations, offering you a jewel that reflects your spirit and enhances your beauty!

Name: Vioro Design
Description:
Vioro Design: Crafting Legacy and Art in Every Piece

For over 50 years, Vioro Design has been synonymous with artistry, heritage, and innovation. It all began with Jozsef Konya, a master jeweller whose journey started in Yugoslavia, where his natural talent for painting and craftsmanship led to an apprenticeship with a local jeweller. Over the years, Jozsef honed his craft, mastering both everyday designs and high-end artistry.

In 1991, he opened his first jewellery store, Zlatara Konya, in Subotica, Serbia. After relocating to Hungary, he founded Vioro Design in 1999, merging ancient techniques with contemporary aesthetics. His iconic Imperial Collection, inspired by the Japanese Mokume Gane technique, became a hallmark of the brand’s legacy, showcasing the perfect balance between tradition and innovation.

As the next generation embraced this heritage, Vioro Design expanded internationally, founding Vioro Design Nederland in 2023. Today, we proudly collaborate with retailers and partners across Europe, showcasing our creations at leading trade shows and sharing our passion for artistry with the world.

Our Imperial and Essence collections reflect the family values of artistry, offering jewellery that transcends time. Each piece is a testament to our dedication to creating lasting heirlooms.

Name: Unleashed Platinum
Description:
About Unleashed Platinum

At Unleashed Platinum, we believe that blockchain is a powerful medium for expressing the beauty sought after by artists and collectors throughout history. Our mission is to address the unmet need for exclusive, luxury goods and fine art within the NFT space.

Reaffirming Art in NFTs

Art and luxury are the perfect match for NFTs. The NFT revolution began with art, exemplified by the success of digital artist Beeple, whose piece sold for $69 million. This demonstrates that NFT investors highly value art. While some NFT owners seek quick flips, many are looking for projects that retain value and grow steadily over time.

Fine art and artistry possess the quality of maintaining value, a trait critical for long-term NFT investments. Fashion is art, and art is essential for NFTs. Many projects focus on utility but forget the critical component of art. Unleashed Platinum offers unrivaled utility, but it is the art that sets us apart. Works of art and artisanal creations command value and endure through time, unlike trendy projects that fade into obscurity.

Blockchain technology also enables owners of physical art to validate the authenticity of their pieces, strengthening the convergence between art and NFTs. This is crucial for NFTs as an investment, attracting a large subsection of investors who focus predominantly or exclusively on art projects.

Our Vision

Unleashed Platinum aims to establish a permanent presence in the Virtual/Digital world, offering a unique blend of art and luxury that sets timeless trends and maintains value. We are not just participating in the blockchain space; we are taking a leading role in the digital art revolution.

#STAYUNLEASHED

Description:

woven brilliance of silver Zari – India’s silver traditions have always been 
canvases of patience, devotion, and mastery. Each creation is handmade, 
transformed from raw silver into jewellery, artifacts, and cultural heirlooms.

Today, this timeless heritage is being reimagined. With the world’s most 
advanced tarnish resistant and hypoallergenic silver, Padmesh bridges 
tradition with innovation. A craft once confined to local workshops now 
journeys across India and beyond, celebrated as a living investment in 
heritage. 
Padmesh’s products will be available soon in our shops across India and on our Web Boutique for our global audience.

Name: La Mina De Oro
Description:
La Mina Direct is a family-owned and operated fragrance distribution company with over 30 years of combined retail and wholesale experience, built through the operation of seven successful retail stores and a fast-growing wholesale division. From day one, La Mina De Oro has been guided by a simple but powerful foundation: honesty, integrity, value, and follow-through—principles that have earned us long-standing partnerships and consistent, sustainable growth.

Today, La Mina Direct is recognized as the largest fragrance distributor in California, specializing in authentic name-brand, Arabic, niche, and emerging fragrance houses. Our strength lies in understanding the full lifecycle of fragrance—from retail sell-through and consumer behavior to wholesale distribution, pricing strategy, and long-term brand building.

We work with a diverse network of partners, including independent retailers, national chains, resellers, and entrepreneurs, offering:

Curated fragrance portfolios across multiple price tiers

Protected margins and strategic pricing support

Reliable inventory access and consistent fulfillment

Retail-informed guidance rooted in real-world experience

Unlike short-term trend distributors, La Mina Direct focuses on long-term partnerships and sustainable growth. We support brands not only with distribution, but with market insight, structure, and strategy, helping them scale responsibly while maintaining brand integrity.

At our core, we are more than a distributor, we are a bridge between brands and retail success, committed to elevating the fragrance industry through trust, transparency, and experience.

Name: Amor Pırlanta
Description:
AMOR PIRLANTA

İtalyanca ve İspanyolca "aşk” kelimesinin karşılığı olan "amor” aşkla yapılan, büyüleyici pırlanta ürünlerin en iddialı markası…

Amor pırlanta, kuyumculuk sektöründe 20 yılı aşkın engin tecrübeye sahip pırlanta uzmanları tarafından 2015 yılında kurulmuştur. Kurulduğu günden itibaren yıldızı parlayan amor pırlanta, özellikle trend yaratan tasarımlar ile sektöre yön verip, toptan ve perakende satışlarda lider olma yolunda hızla ilerlemektedir. Pırlanta uzmanlığı, tasarıma verdiği önem, kusursuz üretim ve satış sonrası desteği ile müşterilerine en iyi hizmeti vermeyi prensip haline getirmiştir.

Türkiye’deki önemli firmalara, toptan pırlanta ithalatı ve montür üretimi yapan amor pırlanta, 400’den fazla toplu alım yapan bayii noktalarıyla perakende sektörüne de gereken önemi vermektedir. Geniş ürün yelpazesiyle birlikte, uluslararası Gia ve Hrd sertifikalı pırlantaların Türkiye’ye toptan satışını gerçekleştirmektedir.

Ürünlerini Avrupa, Balkanlar, Ortadoğu ve Asya bölgelerinde de satışa sunan marka, dünyanın en önemli mücevher fuarları ve Türkiye’deki perakende fuarlarına katılarak ürünlerini sergilemektedir.

This strategic expansion leverages their extensive industry knowledge, profound understanding of craftsmanship, and unwavering commitment to excellence.

As a family-owned business, Infiniti Fine Jewellery seamlessly blends traditional artisanal methods with cutting-edge manufacturing techniques. Every piece is a masterpiece, meticulously crafted from superior-quality materials and hand-finished to perfection, maintaining an uncompromising approach to excellence synonymous with their name.

Infiniti Fine Jewellery’s ambition extends beyond merely entering the market; the brand aspires to become a global powerhouse in luxury jewellery. Each design is thoughtfully conceptualized and skilfully executed, resonating with clients who appreciate sophistication and exclusivity. This pursuit of perfection, combined with innovative designs, distinctly positions Infiniti Fine Jewellery in a highly competitive market.

The mission is clear and ambitious: to set a bold standard of luxury, refinement, and exceptional craftsmanship. By carrying forward an esteemed family tradition in a refreshed and diversified manner, Infiniti Fine Jewellery honours its storied past while actively shaping a remarkable future. The brand is dedicated to creating extraordinary jewellery pieces that captivate discerning clientele, solidifying its place as a respected and sought-after name in luxury jewellery manufacturing.

Through a robust global network, we source and distribute an extensive range of high-end designer products to meet the demands of discerning retailers and consumers alike. Our unwavering commitment to authenticity, value, and exceptional service underpins every facet of our operations, making Luxe Supply Companies a trusted partner in the world of luxury resale.

Name: Suncrafts Gems & Jewellery
Description:
We at Suncrafts Gem & Jewellery, we bring over 22 years of in-store experience and more than 40 years of expertise from our founder in crafting exquisite gemstones and jewellery. Based in Negombo, Sri Lanka, we specialize in creating unique, high-quality pieces that blend timeless craftsmanship with modern design.

We have had the privilege of serving customers from over 25 countries, providing jewelry for all of life’s milestones, from weddings and welcoming a baby to celebrating achievements or gifting a loved one. With our skilled silversmiths and gem experts, we cater to bespoke requirements while maintaining the highest standards of quality.

Our mission is to bring the beauty and craftsmanship of Sri Lankan gems and jewelry to customers around the world. Whether you are looking for a classic piece, a custom design, or a sparkling addition to your collection, Suncrafts Gem & Jewellery delivers artistry, trust, and timeless appeal.

Connect with us to explore our collection and celebrate life’s moments with timeless jewellery.

Description: Mode Joyas India is a leading manufacturer, supplier and exporter of raw gemstones and fashion and fine jewellery.
