We are proud of our skilled workforce, our knowledge of the market in India and abroad, and our commitment to providing the very best in customer service.

Name: WATCHOYSTER.CH
Description:
WATCHOYSTER SA is Switzerland’s largest online luxury watch store, based in Geneva. We keep 2,500+ Swiss watches in stock—new, Certified Pre-Owned, and vintage—ready to purchase today, including rare finds. 

Authenticity is documented. Each watch is inspected in-house (movement, case, bracelet, serials) and independently verified with WatchCertificate, with full paperwork. Payment is secure and protected.

Operating from the Geneva Free Zone supports transparent, competitive pricing and clean cross-border processing. Orders are handled through our Swiss hub with insured worldwide shipment in 5–6 business days, or discreet pickup in the Free Zone. Communication is clear at every step.

Our scale is proven: 1,000+ clients served each year and steady monthly sell-through. Descriptions are accurate, after-sales care is attentive, and support is multilingual.

WATCHOYSTER is a large, reliable Swiss online store where selection is real, authenticity is verified, and delivery is insured and on time.

Name: RJ Bullion
Description: RJBullion is a division of Regal Jewels Inc. Regal Jewels is a family owned and operated corporation, established in 1987. Combining the best of exceptional individual customer service with the strength of a huge and varied inventory, we have developed into a pillar stone of the Chicago ethnic jewelry market. Education and honestly have always been deeply engrained in our policies, and our managers and staff are well trained and versed in gold, diamonds, and gem stones. We take pleasure in creating a personalized shopping experience. RJBULLION strictly sells precious metals like gold, silver, copper, platinum and palladium.

Name: Mystery Diamonds New York
Description: Mystery Diamonds, a leading player in the diamond wholesale market, thrives in providing unparalleled service to our customers and partners. With a large inventory of certified diamonds in all shapes, cuts and qualities, both in naturally mined and lab grown diamonds, our team is ready to provide you with an exceptional personalized service. From assisting you in your search to ensuring that our turnaround is no longer than 24 hours, you can count on us to deliver a seamless experience.

Name: CHP Caliber
Description:
At CHP Caliber, we believe that independent watchmakers deserve to be seen, chosen and celebrated. We partner with emerging and established heritage brands to unlock access to the very best independent jewelers and watch retailers, as well as help retailers discover exceptional watch brands they might otherwise never encounter.

For Watch Brands:
No matter where you are in your wholesale journey, whether you’re just beginning or looking to fine-tune your distribution, CHP Caliber is your guide. We help you:

- Craft a strategic entry into the wholesale market, from pricing and positioning to distribution strategy. 
- Create marketing and sales tools that resonate with buyers and reflect your brand’s unique story and craftsmanship. 
- Book and manage buyer meetings so you can focus on showcasing what you do best - designing and making watches. 

We offer flexible engagement models to meet your needs — from full-service partnerships spanning 6–12+ months to lean, project-based consulting for specific challenges. 

For Retailers: 
Introducing a new watch brand into your store can feel risky, but it doesn’t have to be. 
With CHP Caliber on your side, you gain access to carefully vetted, high-quality independent watchmakers whose craftsmanship, design and quality we have personally qualified. We enable you to test new lines with minimal upfront risk, gauge customer interest, and adapt your assortment dynamically - keeping your offerings fresh, unique and aligned with your clientele. 

Why it matters
The independent watch-making world thrives when creatives are given platforms and retailers of vision bring new voices to market. By working with CHP Caliber, you’re not just doing business...you’re helping shape the future of independent watch-making while offering customers something truly distinctive. 

Based in Brooklyn, NY and connected with partners, retailers and brands anywhere there’s WiFi.

Name: Anupama Gems
Description: We have always been the home of some of the finest gemstones in the Sri Lanka Gem industry. All gems are purchased as rough stones from gem miners and are then transformed into high-quality cut and polished gems all the gems are legal and each gem contains a laboratory-authorized certificate and distribute worldwide.

Name: Taç Zincir
Description: Taç Zincir is a "Gold Chain Manufacturer" located in Istanbul, Turkey. Since 1984, the year that we establish, our aim is to be the sole supplier to our customers. So, Our company offer not only chains but also semi-products like gold beads, locks, fine jewellery products like necklaces, bracelets, earrings, children bracelets and so on. Our product range varies from different carats like 8k, 10k, 14k, 18k, 21k, 22k to different colours as well. As of today, Our machine parkour has over 300 machines and produce over 75 different chain models and sizes. We pride ourselves of our production's independence of any outside factors. We produce every part that we used in our facility. Besides our factory, we have 2 wholesales stores that sell solely our products. They both located in Istanbul which we’d be delighted to welcome you.

Name: Constantin Wild GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Constantin Wild: the gemstone connoisseur from Idar-Oberstein is known all over the world for his exclusive stones. "My stones are especially well suited to extravagant jewellery. And particularly large stones are impressive eyecatchers as solitaires", says Wild, who has been familiar with the market for more than 30 years. 

As the owner of a family enterprise in the fourth generation, Wild selects all his stones personally. This individual and personal style is the recipe for the success of the Constantin Wild label: "Each stone is absolutely individual. Just like the desires and demands of those who are on the lookout for gemstones, following the trend towards colour which has been holding sway for some years", Wild adds. 

Wild's stones are 'more than just rare'. And for a long time now, there have not only been aesthetic reasons for wishing to possess these extravagant splashes of colour. "Many people realise that high-quality stones are extremely rare and very unique. And that makes them a very special, glittering investment", says the qualified gemologist.

Name: Sap Luxury Goods - S.L.G.
Description: Sap Luxury Goods (S.L.G.) is founded in 2016 and is the distributor of Christian Bauer (www.christianbauer.nl - high-end wedding rings) for the BeNeLux and Scandinavia, Georg Jensen for the BeNeLux and BIGLI for The Netherlands. Steven Sap, the founder and owner, is a jeweller's son and has a broad experience in the watch- and jewellery-industry, especially in the BeNeLux and Scandinavia. After having worked for brands of Richemont like Cartier and Jaeger-LeCoultre, but also for brands of the Swatch Group, he decided to start his own company in 2016, based in The Hague (The Netherlands). With a strong focus on high-end quality, service, 360 degrees marketing concepts, qualitative distribution and knowledge of how to build a brand, he will build SLG to a serious company that will be the distributor of nice brands in the area.

Name: Grovana Watch Company Ltd.
Description:
Grovana Uhrenfabrik AG ist ein unabhängiges Familienunternehmen mit Sitz unweit von Basel. Alle Uhren werden in den eigenen Ateliers von Hand zusammengesetzt und mit einer weltweiten Garantie von 3 Jahren versehen.
Grovana bietet seinen Kunden elegante und klassisch schöne Herren- und Damenuhren an, mit dem Ziel, der breiten Öffentlichkeit hochwertige Swiss Made Uhren zugänglich zu machen. Sie Überzeugt mit Uhren in gewohnt hochwertiger Schweizer Qualität zu erschwinglichen Preisen. Fast alle Uhren sind mit Quarzwerken des Uhrwerkherstellers Ronda angetrieben. Die übrigen Uhren sind mit Automatikwerken von Eta ausgestattet. Bekannt für die unfehlbare Qualität ihrer Uhren, wird die Marke Grovana heute in über 60 Ländern in aller Welt vertrieben.
Die Grovana vertreibt neben eigenen Uhren auch die Marken Swiss Alpine Military und Revue Thommen.

THE PHILOSOPHY

The research, style and creativity of the Brand, lead a deep process that combines great attention to detail, the secrets of skilled craftsmen and the selection of raw materials of the highest quality 
ITALIAN HAND MADE Creations

Name: Frisch Diamond Corporation nv
Description:
For over 100 years, the Frisch family has been a pivotal and dynamic force in the heart of the Antwerp diamond manufacturing industry.

Our legacy is rooted in a tradition of excellence, with a factory plant that specializes in polishing both round and fancy shaped diamonds. We offer a wide range of diamonds, spanning from 0.25 carats to impressive  over 10-carat stones.

At Frisch Diamond, we set the bar high. Our highly skilled technicians are entrusted with upholding the most stringent standards of craftsmanship. This commitment to precision ensures that our diamonds are polished to perfection, adhering to the most rigorous grading criteria.

Unearthing Brilliance, Responsibly

MANUFACTURING: Our expertise isn't just in polishing gems—it extends to the raw beauty transforming a piece rough diamond to a magnificent Gem. We understand that the journey from the mine to your collection is one of art and science. With each stone, we harness our experience to ensure that the potential of every rough diamond is fully realized, always with the highest respect for ethical considerations.

POLISHED DIAMONDS: At Frisch Diamond, catering to our clients' needs with utmost precision is our unwavering commitment.

Our range is as diverse as it is exquisite. We are proud to offer diamonds starting from as small as 0.007 carats, extending up to the most remarkable over 10-carat collection stones. Whether you're seeking the classic allure of white diamonds or the captivating charm of fancy colors, we have your desires covered in every facet.

ROUGH DIAMONDS: At Frisch Diamond, ensuring a consistent supply of rough diamonds is a commitment we hold in the highest regard.

Our dedication extends from 1-carat to substantial over 50-carat stones, allowing us to cater to a diverse range of preferences and needs.

Name: Madhushree Jewellers
Description:
Madhushree Jewellers – Crafting Timeless Elegance Since 1984

Based in Nalbari, Assam, Madhushree Jewellers is a trusted name in jewelry manufacturing and retail, blending traditional Assamese craftsmanship with modern, contemporary designs. For over four decades, we have delivered high-quality gold, diamond, and silver jewelry that celebrates heritage, style, and individuality.

Under the leadership of Mr. Deepak Jain, an award-winning entrepreneur and honorary doctorate holder in Sustainable Jewelry Design, we are committed to excellence, ethical practices, and empowering local artisans.

With a skilled team of 25–50 professionals, we provide complete in-house solutions, from design and manufacturing to retail, ensuring that every piece reflects precision, creativity, and timeless elegance.

Our mission is to make luxury jewelry accessible and meaningful, offering the lowest making charge in the region (7.5%) without compromising on quality. We cater primarily to customers across Assam and the North-East, combining modern trends with traditional artistry to create jewelry for weddings, festivals, gifting, and daily elegance.

Name: Khushi Gems
Description:
Khushi Gems is a distinguished natural gemstone and jewelry manufacturing company, renowned for its expertise in sourcing, cutting, and crafting high-quality gemstones since 2008. With over 15 years of excellence, we are committed to providing an exceptional customer experience through our meticulously crafted products and innovative solutions. Our global network enables us to serve clients from major hubs across India, the USA, Europe, and beyond.

At Khushi Gems, we process and craft a wide range of precious and semi-precious gemstones, offering customers a variety of colors, cuts, and carat sizes. Our state-of-the-art, eco-friendly manufacturing facility, spread over thousands of square feet in Surat, India, employs hundreds of highly skilled artisans working with the latest machinery and technology. The facility also includes advanced research and development centers, training sections, and quality control measures to ensure that every gemstone meets the highest standards.

We take pride in offering a wide selection of gemstones, from rubies and sapphires to emeralds and other rare stones, catering to bespoke designs and the demands of high-end jewelers worldwide. Our exclusive services include custom gemstone cutting, tailor-made solutions, and a comprehensive certification process for every gemstone we deliver.

At Khushi Gems, we remain committed to sustainability and social responsibility. We adhere to environmentally friendly practices and support various education, healthcare, and community development initiatives. With a vision to positively impact both the industry and society, we continue to innovate and grow while ensuring that our legacy is built on trust, quality, and ethical practices.

Name: Andreas Daub GmbH & Co. KG

Name: CHRISTIAN VILLA
Description:
The CEO Christian Villa grew up in a family active in the fashion industry. After a master in fashion design in Milan and few internships for renowned Italian designers, Christian Villa launched his first bags collection in 2010.

The essence of Christian Villa’s style is a perfect balance between classic shapes and contemporary design, elegance and glamorous touches, refinement and original pattern combinations; all perfectly matched thanks to the designer’s modern and innovative approach to fashion. Bags are designed for sophisticated and feminine women who enjoy changing their style as their inspiration changes and give importance to quality and fine details.

Concerned with the quality of his bags, Christian Villa chooses carefully Italian raw materials and works exclusively with highly skilled leather craftsmen who use traditional techniques. The whole production is internalized - from design to quality control – to guaranty high-end genuine leather handicraft bags Made in Italy.

Name: Siyari-Lab Grown Diamond Jewellery
Description:
Welcome to Siyari Jewellers – Your Wholesale Destination for Lab-Grown Diamond Jewelry
At Siyari Jewellers, based in Hyderabad, we believe that everyone deserves the beauty and elegance of diamonds—without the high cost. That's why we specialize in lab-grown diamond jewelry, offering exquisite pieces at wholesale prices. Our mission is simple: to make luxury accessible without compromising on quality, ethics, or sustainability.
Why Lab-Grown Diamonds?
Our lab-grown diamonds are real diamonds, created with cutting-edge technology to ensure they’re just as brilliant as mined diamonds. Not only are they more affordable, but they are also eco-friendly, making them a conscious choice for the modern shopper. With lab-grown diamonds, you get the same sparkle at a fraction of the cost, ensuring you never have to sacrifice quality.
Craftsmanship You Can Trust
Every piece at Siyari Jewellers is crafted with care and attention to detail. Whether you’re searching for classic elegance or modern designs, our collection has something for every personality and occasion. From engagement rings to everyday wear, we ensure each item reflects our commitment to craftsmanship and affordability.

We proudly serve customers not only in India but across the globe. With reliable worldwide shipping, your dream piece of diamond jewelry is just a click away. No matter where you are, we make it easy to shine with our lab-grown diamonds.

Cresciuta insieme alla sua arte, ha saputo coniugare nel tempo tradizione e tecnologia, forme e colori, materiali e design. Dopo aver maturato una lunga esperienza nel settore, si è affermata anche online, sviluppando il proprio store digitale in sinergia con i punti vendita fisici in Italia e all’estero. Solida realtà orientata alla continua crescita, la By Simon affianca quotidianamente i propri clienti con un servizio a 360°. Affidabilità, eleganza e passione sono i valori che contraddistinguono l'impegno quotidiano dell'azienda.""

‘"The By Simon Group is a jewellery company that has been designing and manufacturing jewellery with high craftsmanship and precision since 1970. Growing together with its art, it has been able to combine tradition and technology, shapes and colours, materials and design over time. After a long experience in the sector, it has also established itself online, developing its own digital store in synergy with the physical shops in Italy and abroad. A solid reality oriented towards continuous growth, By Simon supports its customers on a daily basis with an all-round service. Reliability, elegance and passion are the values that distinguish the company's daily commitment."’

Name: Distribuidora Americana del Reloj Suizo S.A.
Description:
D.A.R.S.S.A nació en 1986 fruto de la fusión de socios con extensa experiencia en el ramo joyero y relojero en la Argentina.

En sus inicios Darssa trabajo con éxito el desarrollo de marcas de reconocimiento mundial, pero escaso alcance local, logrando que se convirtieran en la Argentina en marcas aspiracionales para el cliente ávido de piezas de precisión y diseño suizo.

A lo largo de los años la empresa logro importantes asociaciones locales con proyección mundial para cada una de las marcas que representa desde ámbitos de la cultura y el arte, Con la Fundación Teatro Colon y Paloma Herrera o con Martha Minujín y pianistas como Ulises Maino para Movado, pasando por el deporte con la prestigiosa Admiral´s Cup en Punta del Este con Corum y la asociación con una figura como Juan Manuel Fangio a través de la  fundación Fangio, el TC 2000 y el Super TC 2000 con Tag Heuer.

Estas acciones han llevado a que cada una de las marcas, con las que se trabaja actualmente, se encuentren no solo en las mejores joyerías del país, sino que también tengan un posicionamiento y reconocimiento de marca superior al de otros mercados de la región.

En Darssa seguimos trabajando para adecuarnos a las nuevas exigencias y tecnologías del mercado local priorizando nuestra red de Agentes, a nuestros clientes finales y su identificación con las marcas.
Location: Ciudad Autonoma de Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires

Name: GrandBazaarJewelers.com
Description:
Grand Bazaar Jewelers is a wholesale Turkish jewelry manufacturer and private label specialist based in Istanbul, Turkey.

Our family has been crafting jewelry in the historic Grand Bazaar for over four generations, with roots dating back to the late 1800s. Today, we combine this heritage craftsmanship with modern manufacturing systems to serve brands, boutiques, designers, and online sellers worldwide.

What We Do

We specialize in:
	•	Wholesale handmade jewelry
	•	Private label & white label manufacturing
	•	Custom and made-to-order jewelry production
	•	Low MOQ wholesale programs (starting from $250 USD)

All jewelry is handcrafted in Istanbul by experienced artisans using traditional techniques supported by modern production workflows.

How We Work

Our proprietary production and cataloging systems allow us to:
	•	Manufacture and list new designs in real time
	•	Offer thousands of active and made-to-order styles
	•	Maintain consistent quality across repeat orders
	•	Deliver most made-to-order wholesale pieces within 2–3 weeks

This structure allows our craftsmen to focus on what they do best — designing and producing high-quality jewelry — while our systems ensure efficiency, transparency, and scalability for our partners.

Who We Work With

We proudly support:
	•	Jewelry brands
	•	Fashion boutiques
	•	Online sellers & live sellers
	•	Designers & influencers
	•	Retail chains and private labels

Whether you need a single wholesale order, ongoing production, or a fully private collection, we operate as a long-term manufacturing partner, not just a supplier.

Our Commitment
	•	Handmade, socially responsible production
	•	Transparent wholesale pricing
	•	Worldwide shipping
	•	Reliable lead times
	•	Design confidentiality for private label clients

 Istanbul, Turkey
 Worldwide shipping
 Wholesale & B2B manufacturing

 www.GrandBazaarJewelers.com

Name: Rockstoc LLC
Description:
Fifteen years ago our founder, Yvonne Jiew, made a radical shift from a successful digital marketer to global gem sourcing specialist….and has never looked back. 

Yvonne’s passion began with a jewelry engineering course in her homeland of Australia. She fell in love with the creative process immediately, rapidly progressing to lapidary work. As she sought out unusual specimens for her projects, the allure of searching for precious gems directly at the source became irresistible, and Rockstoc LLC was born.  

Today, you will find Yvonne traveling extensively each year in an exhaustive search to find the best and rarest stones available. Although we source fine stones worldwide, our emphasis is no-heat Burmese rubies, sapphires, and fine spinel. 

Rockstoc's company mission is to work directly with local lapidary artists and artisanal miners, ensuring that the profits made from the sale of our stones go back into the local community to enhance their way of life. As one of the few women in this aspect of the gem trade industry, Yvonne is keenly aware of the roles women play in local gem trade networks, and actively seeks to support and sustain their involvement.

In all aspects of Rockstoc, colored stones are our passion.

Name: AAOTE
Description:
At Aspiring Artists of the Earth (AAOTE) we believe in the healing power of creative arts and work to lift the love vibration here on Earth, one spirited-made piece at a time. We work from a place of unshakable inner faith to ensure our ancient, unbreakable practice of adornment and gifting Live To Uplift.

AAOTE, as we are more commonly known, has a 19-year tenure collaborating with makers and producers locally, nationally, and globally to keep up with customer’s growing demand for indie brands. Our tried-and-true, timeless designs are found at independent boutiques, museum gift shops, arboretum gift shops, and so many amazing supporting locations across North America. 

We are an 18-year veteran of the Local program at Whole Foods Market consistently providing the unique, high-vibing, indie-brand feel customers seek. 

We readily evolve to meet the changing landscape of needs. In 2020 we pivoted to create cotton masks supplying a comfy, locally made option our customers. Thank you to everyone who allowed our creative hands and hearts to contribute the best way we could during those times! Of which we also continued to create and supply our housewares and jewelry upholding gorgeous displays. At a time when many items couldn’t be sourced, buyers knew that they could call on us and we would show!

We connect with community via social media marketing to drive store traffic, and in doing so have seen strong interest in our products from customers across the nation and are actively growing our listing of wholesale accounts nationwide.

We love making ordering easy for buyers, can custom-tailor displays and assortments for specific store demographics. We look forward to creating for customers in your community! Please ask the managers or buyers of your favorite sourcing-compassionate, indie-brand-loving retailers to go fill out our wholesale form on either aaote.com or tzglass.com. Thank you. Be safe. Be well.

KIR Collection is a line of designer jewelry in sterling silver with 18k gold accents, semi-precious gemstones, Mother of Pearl and unique materials. Inspirations from travel and nature fuse to create an element of adventure in

KIR, formerly Kirsten Moorhead Jewelry, was founded in 2001 by Kirsten Boedecker and Jennifer Klein. Como fabricante de relojes, ofrecemos una amplia gama de relojes automáticos, mecánicos, digitales y analógicos diseñados para satisfacer las necesidades de joyerías y profesionales de la industria.

Nuestra misión es proporcionar relojes de alta calidad que representen lo mejor de la relojería tradicional y la innovación moderna. 

Características y Ventajas de los Relojes Micro:

1-Diseño Innovador y Personalizado:

Micro suele apostar por diseños únicos y frescos, que se alejan de las tendencias masivas para atraer a un público que busca exclusividad y originalidad en sus accesorios.

2-Materiales de Alta Calidad:

A pesar de su precio competitivo, Micro utiliza materiales de alta calidad como acero inoxidable, cristal de zafiro y movimientos automáticos suizos o japoneses, asegurando durabilidad y precisión.

3-Producción en Pequeñas Cantidades:

La producción limitada no solo asegura un mayor control de calidad, sino que también convierte a cada reloj en 

una pieza casi única, añadiendo valor y exclusividad.

4-Relación Calidad-Precio:

Los relojes de Micro suelen ofrecer una excelente relación calidad-precio, superando a muchos competidores en el mismo rango de precios gracias a su enfoque en la calidad y el diseño.

5-Atención al Cliente:

Las microbrands como Micro suelen destacar por su atención personalizada al cliente, ofreciendo un servicio postventa cercano y eficiente, algo que a menudo se pierde en las grandes marcas.

-Contacta con nosotros para conocer nuestras colecciones de relojes y descubre cómo podemos ayudarte a ofrecer productos excepcionales a tus clientes.

Name: Single Mine Origin (SMO)
Description:
SMO stands for Single Mine Origin. A new global standard, established in 2017 to offer fully traceable, responsibly sourced gold, at scale. 
 
SMO Gold is only sourced from ‘member mines’, those operating responsibly and with transparency, adhering to the highest ESG standards, who are independently audited, annually. Now jewellers, investors and customers can trace the origin of their SMO Gold to the source mine through a QR code or batch number.
 
SMO represents Traceability, Responsibility & Transparency.
 
By collating and analysing disaggregated ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) data from mining companies’ annual reports, sustainability reports, and other publicly available sources, the SMO ESG Benchmark offers ground-breaking insights into the gold industry’s responsible mining credentials. SMO only work with the ‘best in class’ of progressive corporate mines, those that excel in ESG performance, and those that protect & promote their environment & communities, through positive health, environmental, social & educational initiatives.
 
SMO is driving positive change within the mining industry.

Name: MaxMark, Inc.
Description:
About Us:
At MaxMark, Inc., we believe strong partnerships are built on consistency, transparency, and trust.
Founded in 2001, MaxMark is a Chicago-headquartered jewelry manufacturer and distributor working directly with wholesalers and major retailers across the United States and Canada. As the North American marketing arm of a globally established diamond and jewelry manufacturing group, we combine local market expertise with international production strength.

Our product portfolio spans bridal, fashion, and men’s jewelry, crafted using ethically sourced natural diamonds, gemstones, and precious metals. We are focused on high-quality manufacturing that supports scale, reliability, and long-term retail and wholesale success.
MaxMark’s manufacturing operations are supported by two dedicated facilities spanning 18,000 square feet in SEEPZ, Mumbai, equipped with advanced technology and a highly skilled workforce. This vertically integrated setup allows us to manage the entire process from design development to final delivery, ensuring consistent output, fast and dependable timelines, and flexibility at scale.

We specialize in the distribution and manufacturing of private label jewelry, supported by a robust custom jewelry program that enables tailored designs, rapid development, and efficient execution for both wholesale and retail partners.
Our commitment to ethical sourcing is central to our operations. All diamonds are procured through the Kimberley Process, ensuring transparency, traceability, and responsible practices throughout the supply chain.

With a strong focus on service, communication, and operational reliability, MaxMark partners closely with wholesale and retail teams to support assortment planning, private label initiatives, and long-term growth.

Our mission is simple: to deliver real value through excellent styling, superior service, consistent quality, and competitive pricing.

Une manufacture française d’objets d’exceptions.

Nous créons et fabriquons des produits entièrement dédiés aux secteurs de l’horlogerie de luxe et de l’industrie du cigare haut de gamme. Née d’une passion pour les garde-temps d’exception et la technologie de pointe, nous puisons nos inspirations dans les secteurs aéronautique, spatial, naval ainsi que de l’automobile de luxe.
Parmi nos créations, nous proposons des gammes connectées et autonomes de coffre-fort remontoir et caves à cigares, entièrement développées et fabriquées en France, ainsi que des garde-temps conçus et développés par les meilleurs artisans horlogers suisses. Mais également des produits inspirés de ces collections tels que des pièces de haute joallerie, en passant par les accessoires de mode.
D’après l’historien, Jean Castarède, le luxe ne date pas d’hier « Au début de notre ère, c’est-à-dire il y a plus de 2 000 ans, tous les produits luxueux étaient déjà inventés par nos ancêtres ». Nous avons la prétention de réécrire son histoire et de vous faire partager notre univers.

Bienvenu dans le monde de l’excellence, là où rien est impossible. 

Enjoy innovation

Name: JB Jewels
Description:
“Jewelry is more than just gold and stones, it’s about a feeling that’s attached to each piece. When I design it’s never about me. It’s what my clients want.”

Jane Becker, founder of JB Jewels, is a talented jewelry designer and gemologist.  She specializes in transforming heirloom pieces of jewelry into customized works of art that fit her clients’ taste and lifestyle.  Drawing on more than 35 years of experience in the fine jewelry industry, Jane has developed her own signature process for creating beautiful, wearable jewelry.

Jane specializes in redesigning gold, platinum, diamonds, and gemstones. She appraises each piece of jewelry and starts by creating sketches of what the client would like and will lovingly wear. 

“My process is very unique,” Jane explains, “I’ve been told repeatedly that no one else is that personal in their work.” Jane takes pride in her distinctive talent for recreating jewelry into artwork for the 21st Century.

Jane has years of sales experience with well known retailers such as Barney’s, H. Stern, and Bloomingdale’s.  In addition, she spent time in prestigious firms in Manhattan’s diamond district as a diamond and colored stone buyer, where she learned the manufacturing side of the industry.  

Because of Jane’s training at the Gemological Institute of America, she is uniquely qualified to appraise estates.  She continues to work with estate managers, trust and estate attorneys, and heirs to estates to appraise their fine jewelry.  If need be, Jane can further assist to sell the jewelry from these estates for the highest dollar value.

Jane insists that the greatest reward in her work comes when she makes customers smile by helping restore an heirloom or when she finds an engaged couple the perfect diamond ring – resulting in tears of joy.  Jane Becker’s guarantee:  if any jewelry is not something she herself would wear, Jane will not sell or deliver it to her clients. 

Schedule your virtual or in-person consultation today.

Name: SILK Jewellery B.V.
Description:
SILK Jewellery BV; a Dutch Jewellery company offering a wide variety of premium sterling silver collections. Designed in the Netherlands and brought to life by the hands of world's finest silversmiths in Asia.

SILK Jewellery was founded in 2004 by the dynamic and adventurous Dutch duo Heidi van Leeuwen & Maarten Smetsers. As if coincidence does not exist, two Dutch travellers meet in the creative small Australian town of Byron Bay; a real destination for bohemians, free spirits, surfers and artists. Not knowing that she would become his co-creator, his partner in business and life at the time, Heidi lives her adventurous traveler’s dream. Maarten also left his conventional life and travelled the world to discover it and be inspired by it. They magically connect and continue their journey along the SILK Route together.

Their creative spirits find each other in their shared dream, which will become their own brand SILK not more than a year later. In 2004 they officially start their business by designing their first pieces of jewellery. A jeweller falls in love with it and places a small order which was sold out immediately afterwards. The launch of the first SILK jewellery store is a fact. In 2022 their brand is sold in several countries around the world with over 300 jewellery stores selling their collection. 

The brand’s philosophy emphasizes authenticity by encouraging to live as real as you are. At the same time evoking joy and spirit of playfulness and rebelliousness. 

Today, the company evolved into a multi brand company, known for its massive, timeless, sturdy handmade designs with a refined finish.

The company holds the Solidarity, Honesty, Innovation and Progress as the spirit. It insists on Customer First, Contri-bution, Win-win Cooperation and Creating Value. Name: Dongguan HonHo Jewelry,.Ltd
Description:
Dongguan HonHo Jewelry is a professional jewelry manufacturer specializing in fashion jewelry OEM & ODM, helping brands, wholesalers, and retailers solve their most common manufacturing challenges — unstable quality, short color life, slow delivery, and inconsistent production.

We focus on stainless steel, titanium steel, brass, and 925 sterling silver jewelry, offering reliable mass production backed by strong technical control. Unlike many suppliers, we operate our own vacuum PVD plating factory, giving our clients full control over quality, color consistency, and lead time.

Our PVD coating thickness ranges from 0.03 micron up to 0.1 micron, with a titanium nitride (TiN) protection layer of 0.5 micron, significantly thicker than the industry standard of 0.1–0.3 micron. This structure ensures longer-lasting color retention and higher wear resistance, helping your products perform better in real markets.

For brass and sterling silver jewelry, we support palladium base plating up to 0.1 micron, combined with electroplating thickness from 0.03 micron to 2.5 micron, and up to 5 micron for special requirements, meeting both cost-sensitive and premium-quality demands.

To better serve global customers, we also operate our own jewelry manufacturing facility in Thailand, providing flexible production capacity, diversified sourcing, and stable long-term supply.

At HonHo Jewelry, we don’t just manufacture jewelry — we help our clients reduce risks, improve product durability, and bring competitive designs to market with confidence.

Name: BNA Jewellery
Description:
At the heart of BNA Jewellery lies a story of legacy, ambition, and transformation. What began as a modest partnership in 1972, under the banner of Vijendra Surendra Brothers , has today evolved into one of India's leading diamond jewellery manufacturing and export house.

Founded officially in 1999 by the visionary trio Bipin, Nitin, and Anita Jain, whose initials form the name BNA. The company’s journey is rooted in decades of trust, craftsmanship, and family values. From humble beginnings with cross-counter sales at trade fairs, BNA has expanded its global footprint to become a trusted name across the Gulf regions.

The spirit of BNA is fuelled by more than just business; it’s a belief in relationships, both with clients and its team of dedicated individuals who bring our jewellery to life. Our philosophy is simple yet powerful: people thrive where they feel secure, respected, and seen. That belief shapes everything we do.

Our vision? That everyone in the Gulf owns at least one piece of jewellery crafted by BNA. We don’t just supply jewellery, we partner with retailers, study their sales patterns, and help them succeed faster with smarter inventory choices.

Every piece we craft carries the promise of ethical sourcing, utilizing only conflict-free diamonds and ensuring that every jewel is certified by reputable laboratories. Our design ethos strikes a perfect balance between modern allure and timeless elegance, tailor-made for a clientele that values luxury with meaning.

From factory floors to global exhibitions, from handmade sketches to state-of-the-art production lines, BNA’s journey is a testament to the power of persistence to follow one’s path.

Welcome to BNA Jewellery! Where heritage meets ambition, and every jewel tells a story worth wearing.

Name: Sabrina Designs
Description:
My Darling Jewelry Lover,


My journey began in 1978 in England with my husband David. With my eyes always on the latest fashion, I decided to join my husband’s venture; opening two luxury jewelry shops in Hatton Garden, the heart of London’s jewelry market. Watching and listening to the posh European women, I developed a sophisticated sense for fine jewelry.

In 1994, we decided to move to New York with our four children and start a new life. My passion for fine jewelry carried me through uncertain times. and led me to open Sabrina Designs, a collection of my own unique and trendy Gold and Diamond designs. We flourished with flattering success by reaching out to a new fashion consumer in the United States. In December of 2001, my life would change forever.  My husband David unexpectedly passed away. The responsibilities of raising and providing for my children fell solely on my shoulders. With Gods help and the love my children, I was able to pass through these difficult times. 

Today,  I am a proud Mother and Grandmother. To see my own children, Linda, Sharon, Elaine, and Matthew joining me on this journey, brings me tremendous joy. They too carry an immense positive energy for life and for Sabrina Designs.

My collection is dedicated to all women who have gone through the ups and downs of life. I hope, you too, will find your inner love, strength and beauty through my designs.

Sincerely Yours,
Sabrina

Description:
Notre réflexion a débuté avec l'affirmation "Black is Black", mais nous avons voulu créer une rupture, quelque chose d'inattendu. 

En barrant le "B" du deuxième "Black", nous créons un nouveau mot, "lack" qui signifie "manque" en anglais. Ce petit changement transforme complètement le sens de la phrase.

Au lieu d'une simple affirmation, "Black is Black", nous posons une question : qu'est-ce qui manque ? Nous suggérons que le noir de nos bijoux n'est pas simplement une couleur, mais une absence de quelque chose. Cela peut être interprété de différentes manières : une absence de couleur conventionnelle, une absence de compromis, ou même une absence de normes.

Ce "manque" crée un certain mystère, une intrigue qui va inciter les clients à en savoir plus. Nous voulons que nos clients se demandent ce qui se cache derrière ce noir si particulier.

En utilisant des matériaux tels que le tantale, le zirconium noir et la fibre de carbone, nous créons un noir unique, un noir qui a une histoire. Nous ne nous contentons pas d'une couleur, nous offrons une expérience.

Nous incitons au questionnement de l'évidence : En barrant le "B", nous invitons à repenser la notion même de noir. C'est une couleur qui est souvent associée à des concepts négatifs (le deuil, le mal) ou à une absence de couleur. Nous proposons ici une réappropriation de cette couleur, en la sortant de ces associations classiques.

" Le noir, c'est plus qu'une couleur. C'est une émotion, une promesse. En barrant le "B" de "Black", nous vous invitons à redécouvrir le noir. Notre noir, c'est un noir unique, un noir qui manque de convention, un noir qui intrigue. Chaque bijou est une pièce d'exception, créée avec des matériaux nobles pour ceux qui osent affirmer leur individualité" Les Créatrices de la marque.

Une demande de plus en plus croissante de bijoux noirs, en l'occurrence pour des alliances.

Name: EverJade Jewellery
Description:
About EverJade Jewellery, where passion for craftsmanship meets a journey of transformation.

EverJade Jewellery, specialising in bespoke designs, bridal, and fine jewellery using precious metals, diamonds and gemstones.

I am Jade van Heerden; the founder and designer of EverJade Jewellery. I’m thrilled to share my story with you—one that blends adventure with artistry, culminating in the creation of EverJade Jewellery.

My journey began far from the world of jewellery in architectural lighting design, where I eventually found myself in the jewellery industry for a couple of years. For almost four years after that, I thrived as a safari guide in the Sabi Sands, South Africa, immersing myself in the breathtaking landscapes and diverse wildlife of Africa . This role allowed me to connect with people from around the globe, sharing the beauty of nature and the thrill of discovery. It was a profoundly rewarding experience, one that fueled my love for exploration and storytelling.

However, amidst the savannahs and wildlife, my heart yearned for my other passion—jewellery. With a solid foundation in the industrial and jewellery design industry and a deep-seated love for crafting exquisite pieces, I decided to transition back into the jewellery industry.

In 2024, I founded EverJade Jewellery, a reflection of my dedication to quality, elegance, and timeless beauty. At EverJade Jewellery, we create more than just jewellery; we craft personal stories and memories through our designs. Our pieces are carefully made to embody the essence of elegance and sophistication, drawing from my experiences and the intricate details of nature that have inspired me throughout my career. I am proud to bring a unique perspective to EverJade Jewellery, blending my background in guiding and nature with my expertise in design to offer you jewellery that is as distinctive and captivating as the adventures that inspired it.

Vijay and Lavin have actively contributed to the company's success by conducting research and development initiatives on gemstones, participating in trade shows, and broadening their expertise through travel across Asia. Their commitment to staying abreast of new practices and methodologies has proven beneficial for India's gemstone community.

Punisha Gems remains dedicated to giving back to the industry that has played a pivotal role in its success. Over the years, the company has made substantial contributions to gemstones and jewelry. As Punisha Gems continues its significant growth, the company actively participates in events such as the IIJS & JJS Gems and Jewelry Show in India. Plans are to participate in other renowned gem shows in India and worldwide. The journey of Punisha Gems is marked by a commitment to excellence, innovation, and a vision for a prosperous future in the gemstone industry.

Name: Gadoury Numismatics
Description:
Editions Gadoury buys and sells ancient and modern collectible coins as well as market coins and ingots. Every year, we organize a large Prestige Auction in the Principality of Monaco and we are also the author and publisher of numismatic books. Gadoury was founded in 1972 in Germany by Victor Gadoury. In 1973, he published the first edition of the book “Monnaies Françaises”, which lists French coins from 1789 to the present day. Since then, this book has been published every two years. Moved to the Principality of Monaco in 1978, then bought under the name of Editions V. Gadoury by two Italian numismatists, Mr. Vescovi and Mr. Pastrone in 1994. The company is now managed by Francesco, Federico & Giovanna Pastrone. Since then, Pastrone family has become a member of the Consultative Commission for Philatelic and Numismatic Collections of H.S.H. The Prince of Monaco, of the AINP, of the SNENNP and has joined the Professional Chamber of Experts of Monaco.

Editions V. Gadoury in Monaco Monte Carlo offers free valuations of coins, as well as the purchase and sale of collector's coins.
The Gadoury website should serve as a support for a better knowledge of coins, but also as an information point for numismatic collectors.
Gadoury Numismatics is also an Auction House for Exceptional Coins. The many online auctions it offers, as well as its major annual auction, which is held in Monaco, offer numismatists around the world a very wide choice of high quality coins.

L’esperienza accumulata personalmente in più di 40 anni consente all’azienda di porsi in relazione con le più importanti firme della gioielleria nazionale ed internazionale.

Il giusto mix tra artigianalità e tecnologia porta la C.G.S. alla costante ricerca di nuove sfide, che vanno dalla creazione del gioiello unico studiato “ad hoc” su richiesta del cliente fino alla produzione in serie di elevati quantitativi di oggetti realizzati principalmente mediante la tecnica della microfusione.

Name: Rothschild Trading Company
Description:
𝐖𝐞 𝐓𝐫𝐚𝐝𝐞 𝐒𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞, 𝐀𝐦𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐧 𝐃𝐢𝐚𝐦𝐨𝐧𝐝𝐬.

At Rothschild Trading Company, sustainability isn’t a trend, it’s a commitment. 

Founded by Henry Rothschild and shaped by generations of family experience in the diamond trade, our business is built on principles that matter: integrity, accountability, and thoughtful leadership.

We specialize in post-consumer natural diamonds. These diamonds are recut and responsibly sourced within the United States. Our work supports a more sustainable ecosystem within the jewelry industry while preserving the brilliance and legacy of natural diamonds.

𝐖𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐖𝐞 𝐎𝐟𝐟𝐞𝐫

- Recut post-consumer natural diamonds, American-sourced and GIA-graded.

- Ethical sourcing through vetted networks of estate, pre-owned, and private sellers

- Purchase and resale of gold, diamonds, gemstones, and fine jewelry

- Transparent, value-led partnerships with jewelers, pawnbrokers, coin dealers, and industry professionals

𝐖𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐒𝐞𝐭𝐬 𝐔𝐬 𝐀𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐭

- Certified in both the Code of Practices and the Chain of Custody by the 𝐑𝐞𝐬𝐩𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐉𝐞𝐰𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐫𝐲 𝐂𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐢𝐥

- Registered Supplier of the 𝐀𝐦𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐧 𝐆𝐞𝐦 𝐒𝐨𝐜𝐢𝐞𝐭𝐲

- Dedicated to ethical conduct, exceptional service, and long-term client relationships

At Rothschild Trading, we believe progress and preservation can coexist. By collaborating with like-minded businesses, we’re helping reshape what responsible diamond trading looks like.

Perfect geometry, linear lines and mesmerising curves studded with scintillating diamonds in 18K gold presenting a visual epiphany  ‘Fascinating Facets’ by Walsons.
Space, moment and time stands still in structural harmony creating a dreamy and visually catchy pattern in the form of a jewellery piece. Fascinating facets have been inspired by our brand identity making it a truly iconic collection.

Colours of Joy  
Vibrant enamel colours fused in 18k gold with sparkle of diamonds presenting a whimsical creation ‘Colours of Joy’ by Walasons. 
Combination of enamel, real diamond & gold jewellery creates a beautiful and timeless piece for those who are looking for a unique and elegant piece that makes them stand out. Our signature collection is inspired from Hong Kong's neon skyline, truly representing the soul of the dreamy city.

For 'Colours of Joy' production getting enamel smooth silky finish and the consistent pastel pallets was one of our biggest challenges and we managed to work on this aspect during the covid period. Today we are confident enough to say that our finishing in enamel, gold & diamond combination is one of the best in the market.

Since time immemorial diamonds have fascinated humankind. No wonder then, they have been tagged as miniature stars, tears of God and fortune changers. Estrella Jewels, through its innovative designs, impeccable workmanship and stunning finish has added yet another tag to this long list - divine beauties.

Our confidence stems from our reservoir of creativity, from our spirit of artistic adventure and yearning for perfection. We are fearless when it comes to customized designs, and therefore tread the path which has never been travelled before. It simply means we create trends instead of following one.

Our inspiration has always been “nature” and its stunning elements while the hunger for flawless detailing keeps the creative juices of our design team flowing, in perpetuity. Even our mass produced diamond jewelry reflects class and unique character. As for our signature diamond jewellery, our customers will vouch for our craftsmanship.

We consider diamond jewelry designing an art. It is this belief which allows us to walk that extra mile along the creative path to produce designs which at times are a fusion of classic and contemporary fervour and at times reflection of a compelling emotion.

All this is possible because of our dedicated craftsmen, unrelenting pursuit for excellence, fine machinery and a development team which has never encountered the word “Impossible”. Our artisans understand just one language - the language of perfection. Therefore, Estrella Jewels offers not just rings, pendants, earrings and bracelets; it offers a legacy which can be left behind with great pride.

Custom design is our forte. It pumps up our adrenalin and brings out the best in us. Get in touch, and we promise to sow the same seeds of excitement around your customers too. We don't just export diamond jewelry, we build metaphors of beauty.

Name: GoGreen Diamonds
Description:
GoGreen Diamonds offers a new choice in diamonds. Since its conception in 2015, GoGreen Diamonds has become one of the world’s largest and most trusted producers of grown diamonds. Our success has been due as much to the integrity of our environmentally conscious approach, as to the exceptional quality of our diamonds. Our diamonds are now distributed worldwide, and we continue to strive to deliver a consistent supply of the highest quality diamonds directly to our customers.

Vertically Integrated
GoGreen Diamonds is a completely vertically integrated company. We control the quality of every diamond from growing the rough diamond to the sale and delivery of the finished product to the finest jewellers around the world. From our laboratory, to our cutting factory, to our retailers, the diamond never leaves our hands. This gives us a level of quality control and traceability that is unparalleled.

Our Product
Located in Surat, India, our state-of-the-art rough growing and manufacturing facilities are unrivalled. We are proud of our infrastructure that has the capability of handling large volumes of diamonds. We have been able to achieve our lauded quality control in no small part due to our experienced and hardworking staff who have a thorough understanding of assortment.  
 
GoGreen Diamonds offers a vast range of certified and non-certified stones. Our certified diamonds are graded by the world’s leading diamond certifying laboratories—GIA, IGI and HRD. We produce over 10,000 stones each month, available in round and fancy shapes with 98% of stones being triple excellent in cut, symmetry and polish. In addition, our technology now allows us to grow coloured diamonds and offer an even wider product range to our
consumers.
 
Our on-line detailed web-based inventory of certified goods is available
at www.gogreendiamonds.com

Charlotte Kruse Dewaele is a jewelry and accessories designer based in Los Angeles, California. She graduated from Rochester Institute of Technology, where she majored in Medical Illustration and honed her skills in jewelry bench work and fabric manipulation.  Moving to Los Angeles, she then went on to earn a degree in Fashion Design at the Fashion Institute of Design & Merchandising.

Upon relocating to California to attend FIDM, she found her way to the jewelry industry and was hooked.  She's designed, developed and produced jewelry in-house for brands such as AREYOUAMI, Ariel Gordon Jewelry, Vrai, Diamond Foundry and MICHAEL M.   She has now gone on to found CKD Design Studio to combine her creativity, market expertise, and business savvy to help brands expand their fine jewelry collections, grow into new categories and bring their visions to life through product design!

Name: Mattia Maffei
Description:
Siamo un’azienda torinese di gioielli nata da un’idea particolare: il nostro prodotto principale, le collane profumabili. Questo progetto nasce nel 2015 a Venezia, città a noi molto cara, a una mostra di profumi: le donne dell’800 portavano il proprio profumo in piccole boccette appese al collo. Da qui, l’idea di modernizzare questa originale usanza per permettere a ogni donna di indossare la propria fragranza preferita grazie a un prezioso oggetto: il gioiello. "IL TUO PROFUMO NEL TUO GIOIELLO: un nuovo modo di vivere ed indossare il profumo", una frase semplice ma estremamente rappresentativa e significativa. Dunque le collane profumabili sono il nostro prodotto distintivo: ideate, disegnate e brevettate da noi, all'interno del ciondolo contengo un polimero organico in grado di trattenere e rilasciare il profumo gradualmente, proprio come la nostra pelle! Come funziona? 1) APRI IL GIOIELLO ED ESTRAI IL POLIMERO Apri il ciondolo nella zona della calamita ed estrai lo speciale polimero interno profumabile. 2) SPRUZZA IL TUO PROFUMO SUL POLIMERO Applica la tua fragranza preferita direttamente sul polimero: ne basteranno poche gocce o spruzzi (l'intensità della profumazione varia in base alla fragranza stessa). Ripeti questa operazione ogni qual volta lo desideri! 3) INDOSSA LA TUA COLLANA E VIVI UN'ESPERIENZA UNICA Riponi il polimero interno e chiudi bene il ciondolo avendo cura che la calamita aderisca perfettamente. Ora sei pronta per indossare il tuo profumo nel tuo gioiello: un nuovo modo di vivere ed indossare il profumo.
Il profumo per noi è comunicazione: una comunicazione silenziosa che dice più di mille parole.
Il profumo ci descrive ed esprime il nostro desiderio di essere percepiti dagli altri attraverso di esso. In quanto tale, secondo noi, merita di essere riconosciuto ed espresso in modo unico, personale ed originale.

Name: Pregiata
Description:
Pregiata was launched in 2015.

Although frames are impeccably crafted and fittings are designed maniacally, eyewear itself is not at the core of Pregiata’s universe. More important are the human attitudes and his clash of cultures and beliefs, which magnified in the digital age, where everyone has a voice yet no one is to be heard. 

That’s why moods, images and cultural references play an important role in the whole package.

Working within the archetypal frameworks of the optical industry - pursuing to create eyewear in its supreme synthesis between useful object and style statement - Pregiata explores the intersection of analogue and digital, capturing iconic nuances from the everyday surroundings and blending these with notions of tradition and roots.

Old-school manual craftsmanship meets digitally-controlled techniques; evergreen and familiar shapes fuse with unhortodox, one-of-a-kind finishings made by hand, e.g. real rust on acetate, going to depict a symbiosis of minimalism and grunge.

‘Timeless avantgarde’ eyewear, inspired and designed for people who like to cultivate an independent reputation.

The jewellery brand EVOKE by KA was co-founded by Norwegian childhood friends Kristina & Andrea (KA) in 2020. Their pieces are based on a selection of Norse & modern Nordic symbols, culled from different Scandinavian eras & cultural periods. Combined, they form an inclusive language that appeals to all individuals who celebrate a set of shared values & heritage - aiming to highlight the golden thread that connects us all.

As a result of EVOKE's carefully selected symbolic translation, it is more than just jewellery. It is a collection of modern heirlooms that allow you to share a piece of yourself with the world. Name: Silverpink
Description:
SilverPink jewellery is no ordinary jewellery.

The piece you get has its roots in far-flung places, steeped in positive energy. It’s crowning glory is it’s homecoming; the crafting from our own British sterling silver, forged in Coventry – SilverPink UK’s hometown.

Our journey began whilst exploring the local markets and workshops of Indonesia, Thailand and Turkey. The sheer beauty of the gemstones, pearls, and craftmanship left us enchanted as we got lost in the culture.

There was nothing affordable like it in the UK, so back in 2016 we started sourcing the very best quality we could find. And, thanks to the proud vendors and traders we met in these mystical corners of the world, here we are.

From these beginnings, it was our mission to marry pan-Asian beauty, meaning, and inspiration with British craftmanship – specifically, high-quality 925-stamped Sterling Silver.

Description:
Ravstedhus is Denmark’s leading supplier of jewelry tools, goldsmith tools, precious metals, stones, beads, semi-finished products, and finished jewelry for wholesale, with a particular focus on professional craftsmen, goldsmiths, and B2B customers across the Nordic region. Since our founding in 1987 as a course-based business in Ravsted, we have combined professional expertise, inspiration, and personal service, offering a complete range for everyone working in jewelry making, from workshop to store.

Our history is rooted in innovation and education, from the first courses in stone cutting, casting, and jewelry making to the development of specialized tools and machines under the DanVirke brand. Today, Ravstedhus is a dynamic universe where ideas become finished jewelry, and where both professionals and creative hobbyists can find materials, tools, and inspiration.

We do not only deliver products – we also offer courses and guidance, enabling our customers to develop their craft and stay up-to-date with current trends. Our dedicated team ensures high professional standards, personal advice, and reliable service, and we always strive to meet our customers’ needs with competitive prices.

Based in Ravsted, with customers in Denmark and Norway, we combine traditional craftsmanship with modern e-commerce, making it easy for both businesses and private customers to access a wide range of jewelry components, semi-finished products, finished jewelry, jewelry tools, and goldsmith tools. Ravstedhus is the place where quality, inspiration, and professional expertise meet – and where creativity turns into beautiful results.

Name: GIUNGLA
Description:
GIUNGLA
Al leer esta palabra muchos os preguntaréis: ¿qué es?, ¿qué significa? o ¿qué transmite? Para nosotros se trata justo de eso, de transmitir. Con GIUNGLA queremos que puedas expresar tu forma de ser y que lo puedas mostrar a la sociedad. 
Está demostrado que no todos los humanos somos iguales. Hay millones de variantes que, a medida que creces, te convierten en un tipo de personas u otra. Este es un hecho fascinante ya que cada individuo crece con distintas virtudes, pensamientos y acciones que poco a poco construyen su forma de ser.
Desde GIUNGLA hemos trabajado mucho para poder representar tu personalidad en una joya. Tras mucha investigación y horas filosofando, hemos llegado a la conclusión de que la mejor manera de reflejar una forma de ser en una joya es a través de algo físico, algo tangible, algo que, de manera inconsciente, asociemos a una actitud. Eso, querido mundo, eso son los animales. Seres que transmiten, seres que viven entre y con nosotros desde siempre, seres que tienen su propio ecosistema y sus propias leyes. Nosotros, las personas, tenemos muy definidas sus capacidades y aptitudes, y por eso nos es tan fácil asociar una forma de ser con un animal. 
Des de GIUNGLA, una vez tuvimos claro que queríamos representar las personalidades del ser humano a través de los animales, nos pusimos manos a la obra a diseñar y crear hasta llegar a lo siguiente:  www.giunglabrand.com

Welcome to the world of Steven Royce. We are a family-owned and operated manufacturer of fine gemstone jewelry made with a curated selection of the most stunning gems in the world. We have become a trusted source for colored stone jewelry produced to meet our two unwavering standards: highest quality expert craftsmanship and excellent value for our retail partners. Our success has always centered on our client commitment and our dedication to personalized customer service.

Steven Royce brings a modern twist on classic gemstone jewelry offering thousands of styles and variations to choose from. We are proud to have our pieces available at fine jewelry retailers across the United States and around the world.

Name: Ezeia Jewelry
Description:
When I first wandered through the bustling markets and luxury boutiques of Dubai, I was struck by how every piece of jewelry told its own unique story. In the UAE, especially in Dubai, custom jewelry is more than just an accessory—it’s a personal narrative, a blend of tradition and modern elegance that feels very close to home.

A Gentle Blend of Tradition and Modernity
In the UAE, custom jewelry design is a beautiful dance between old and new. Local artisans honor age-old Arab traditions while welcoming fresh, modern ideas. This mix creates pieces that are not only elegant but also deeply personal. If you ever decide to buy custom jewelry in UAE, you’re stepping into a world where every piece is made with love, care, and a rich sense of history.

The Art of Personal Touch
There’s something incredibly special about owning a piece that’s made just for you. Imagine a necklace or bracelet that reflects your style, your memories, or even a milestone in your life. That’s what custom jewelry is all about. It’s a way to express your individuality in a world where mass-produced items often leave little room for personal stories. When you buy custom jewelry, you’re choosing a piece that resonates with who you are.

How Custom Jewelry is Evolving in the UAE
The world of custom jewelry design in the UAE is undergoing a fascinating transformation, where heritage and innovation come together to create masterpieces of unmatched elegance. While traditional craftsmanship remains at the heart of many designs, artisans and luxury brands are embracing modern technology, new materials, and global influences to craft unique, one-of-a-kind pieces. From handcrafted gold filigree inspired by Arabian heritage to sleek, diamond-studded contemporary designs, the UAE’s jewelry scene is redefining personalization like never before.

Name: SGDX Singapore Diamond Exchange
Description:
SGDX Singapore Diamond Exchange, the world’s first 100 percent physically backed for diamond and gold exchange, is a marketplace to deliver price transparency and liquidity for our customers. Our registered members have access to over 200,000 GIA, IGI, HRD certified natural diamonds using SGDX market platform for traders, investors, wholesalers and retailers to buy, bid and sell diamond and gold. SGDX market platform is driven by real time data transactions base on matching supply and demand in connection with international market.

Our team at SGDX is made up of gemologists, diamond cutter and precious stone specialists. For many years, our gemologists have travelled across Africa and many countries to bring us the most beautiful precious stones from the mines. Some of our gemologists are proud to have been in the profession for over 20 years. SGDX has extensive experience in cutting of rough diamonds. Our best rough diamonds are collected and sent to Antwerp, one of the world’s famous diamond capital. We work closely with cutting companies in Antwerp that handle our rough diamonds. We will hand select all our diamonds with great care in order to keep only minimum grade of H/SI2 for good clarity and color.

We work closely with GIA for natural diamond grading report to ensure our customers the quality of their diamonds. Our reputation in gold and diamond industry have enabled us to partnership with some of the major international players. We appreciated all these trusting relationships and this increase our selection of diamonds offering to our customers worldwide. Our customers include jewelry manufacturers, diamond wholesalers and retailers.

As the sole intermediary between the mine and the wholesaler market, SGDX can offer our customers the best wholesale price and service for diamonds and precious metals in the market.

Name: BRERA MILANO Watches
Description: The BRERA MILANO brand was born in January 2021 as an extension of the founding concepts of BRERA OROLOGI, a brand created in 2008. The desire was to create a watch that combined the high standard of quality with a unique design at a non prohibitive cost to the public. The need to be able to identify a BRERA MILANO watch at first glance was fundamental, both for its aesthetic characteristics and for the quality of the product, which had to be of a higher standard. All this inevitably led to Milan and the ancient Brera district, a symbol of artists and designers who were able to conquer the world with their creations and who made Milan the world capital and the ultimate reference of an iconic and inimitable lifestyle. But style and fashion are not enough to guarantee success if they are not supported by the quality of the mechanics, construction and assembly. A watch that bears a name as noble as it is demanding must express superior levels of quality and reliability. Hence the decision to adopt mechanics of guaranteed reliability, cases created with craftsmanship in which the stylistic choices are closely related to the technical ones and summarize the three aspects that a watch designed in Italy must necessarily have: modernity, quality and appeal. Each BRERA MILANO watch is the outcome of a meticulous Italian study grafted onto the best design and craftsmanship, resulting in the quality of a unique product capable of satisfying the wearer over the years.

Name: Gemcraft
Description:
Welcome to Gemcraft, the global leader in ethically sourced colored gemstones. We specialize in the manufacture and commercialization of the world's finest emeralds. Our approach is innovative and out of the ordinary, working with cutting-edge designers and renowned companies to encourage raw, developing talent whenever possible.

Our commitment to transparency, authenticity, and ethics is what sets us apart from the rest. Transparency, for us, means providing complete visibility across our business and processes, shining a light on an industry that has long been plagued by "gray areas" and complexity. We believe in going above and beyond conventional procedures, always pushing the industry forward, and making sure our operations comply with international and national rules.

Authenticity is another key value for us, and we're devoted to implementing tangible operational activities throughout our organization. Our internal policies serve to guide our moral ideals and aid in making honest decisions. Our technology gives our partners reliable treatment evaluation and treatment declaration, ensuring that our customers can trust the emeralds they purchase from us.

At Gemcraft, our objective is to be the world's leading manufacturer of African emeralds, encouraging transparency, trust, and responsible manufacturing processes. We believe that green gemstones should have a positive impact on the country and community from which they originate. By working together, we can maintain a considered balance between people, profit, and the environment.

We're passionate about what we do, and we invite you to join us on our journey to a more sustainable and ethical future. Discover the beauty and elegance of our exquisite emeralds and see for yourself why Gemcraft is the industry leader.

Name: SilverAmber Jewellery
Description:
Welcome to SilverAmber Jewellery, a small family business that has been making its mark in the industry since 2007. Nestled in the charming town of Corby, Northamptonshire, we take pride in importing exquisite sterling silver and Baltic amber pieces from manufacturers certified by the prestigious International Amber Association (IAA).

At SilverAmber Jewellery, we are committed to providing our customers with unparalleled craftsmanship and superior quality. In addition to our renowned amber collection, we expanded our offerings in 2015 by partnering with a 925 Sterling Silver Manufacturer in Italy. This collaboration allows us to source an array of high-quality and beautiful plain silver products, including chains, bracelets, anklets, and necklaces. Italy, renowned for its exceptional silver craftsmanship, serves as a world-famous destination for sourcing the highest possible quality silver products.

In our continuous efforts to align with sustainability practices, we introduced eco-friendly packaging in approximately 2020. We recognized the importance of minimizing our environmental impact while still ensuring an appealing presentation of our products. With our eco-friendly packaging, you can enjoy the beauty of our jewellery while knowing that we are doing our part to contribute to the well-being of our planet.

The heart and soul of our brand lie in the hands of skilled artisans in the picturesque north of Poland. These talented individuals meticulously handcraft each of our bespoke items, ensuring that every piece is unique and of the highest standard. With over 5000 designs to choose from, our extensive range offers a wide variety of options that cater to diverse tastes and preferences.

Templier est une maison de joaillerie fondée en 1849, qui puise sa singularité dans l’héritage moderniste de Raymond Templier, créateur visionnaire des années 1920-1930.
Ses bijoux audacieux, aux lignes géométriques et aux contrastes puissants, ont marqué une rupture dans l’histoire de la joaillerie, en faisant entrer le bijou la modernité.
Aujourd’hui, la famille Templier écrit une nouvelle page de cette histoire en rééditant les pièces iconiques de Raymond Templier, avec la même exigence d’excellence. Fidèle à l'intention du créateur, la maison propose des créations intemporelles qui résonnent avec l’avant-garde d’hier et l’élégance contemporaine d’aujourd’hui.
Templier 1925 : l’année où le langage moderniste de Raymond Templier s’affirme et devient la signature de la maison.

Name: POLE WATCHES
Description:
Pole Watches es una marca española de relojes únicos y diferentes que permiten leer la hora con una sola aguja.

Partiendo de los primeros relojes del mundo, los solares, en Pole hemos dado continuidad al arte de medir el tiempo sólo con la aguja de las horas, sin minutos ni segundos.

De esta original manera puedes saber la hora de forma aproximada (sin distinguir si son las 17.36 o las 17.39 horas), sin estrés, sin exceso de control, sin prisas. Por este motivo Pole es el reloj perfecto cuando llevas una vida desenfadada, cuando tienes tiempo libre, estás de vacaciones o disfrutas de la jubilación.

Pole Watches se creó para liberarnos del estrés de los minutos y segundos, con el propósito de mejorar nuestro bienestar cambiando la manera de relacionarnos con el tiempo.

La palabra Pole proviene del Suahili. Donde "pole pole" signifca "vive tranquilo, con calma, sin agobios ni prisas".

Los relojes monoaguja son muy preciados por los amantes de la relojería, por los que quieren un reloj de pedida de boda original y romántico, por aquellos que gustan de vestir con personalidad artículos diferentes y por aquellos que buscan un regalo único, con historia y con mensaje.

Cada reloj se entrega con una tarjeta con los datos del árbol que se ha plantado en su nombre gracias a la campaña "1reloj=1árbol", un plan de reforestación internacional que desde hace 3 años se realiza con la organización sin ánimo de lucro "Tree Nation".

Más allá de la originalidad y el propósto, los relojes Pole están confecionados con una maquinaria y unos materiales primera calidad: movimientos suizos, cristales de zafiro, cuero italiano, etc.

Revistas como "Muy Interesante" o "Squire", periódicos como "El Español" o "ICON" y expertos en relojería como "ProWatchvan" o "ElRelojeromx" han hablado públicamente sobre nuestra marca...
"Son más que relojes, son el símbolo del Slow Life"
"Un soplo de aire fresco en relojería"
"Una declaración al tiempo para encontrar la felicidad"

From 22K traditional kundan bridal sets to 18K polki-diamond fusion lines, our collections are crafted for modern bridal, festive and occasion wear as well as lighter, contemporary designs for daily use. All jewellery is conceptualised and manufactured in our own designer studio in Ahmedabad, with in-house design, master artisans and stringent quality checks at every stage. Using real gemstones and hallmarkable gold, we focus on consistent finishing, structural strength and comfort, so our pieces perform reliably in showcase and on the customer.

As a B2B-focused brand, V.M. Ornaments offers catalogue-based and custom development for retailers, wholesalers and private labels, supported by MOQ-based production, sample development, dependable delivery timelines and export-ready documentation. Whether you are building a curated bridal segment, a polki-jadau capsule, or contemporary diamond lines, our team works closely with you to create collections tailored to your market and price points.

- Diamond jewellery manufacturing
- Kundan jadau and polki bridal jewellery
- 14K, 18K and 22K gold designer collections

Name: Ramon Joiers
Description:
¿Qué ofrecemos? 

Más que una manufactura, brindamos un servicio completo que abarca desde la creatividad y el desarrollo de productos hasta su industrialización y producción. Nuestro compromiso con la calidad se refleja en cada pieza que creamos, gracias a nuestra metodología de trabajo basada en la flexibilidad, la capacidad de respuesta y la optimización de la producción. Con un sistema ERP en funcionamiento y una producción «Just in Time», garantizamos eficiencia y trazabilidad en cada proceso.

Nos adaptamos a diferentes volúmenes de producción, ofreciendo tanto piezas a medida en pequeñas cantidades como series industriales en grandes volúmenes. Además, estamos certificados en el Código de Prácticas del Responsible Jewellery Council desde 2014 y CoC desde 2024, asegurando el cumplimiento de los más altos estándares de ética y sostenibilidad en nuestra industria.

Desde la preparación hasta la pieza terminada, en RAMON garantizamos calidad y precisión en cada etapa del proceso. Nuestra pasión por la excelencia sigue impulsándonos a combinar tradición y vanguardia para crear joyas únicas que trascienden el tiempo.

Description:
FLAMINI, one of the first companies that come to mind with its quality and reasonable price in leather products (exotic leather, etc.) today, was founded by Kaya Brothers in 1995 in Zeytinburnu, a modest and quiet district of Istanbul.

In this sector, which he started in 1995, he became a pioneer in the sector in a short time by prioritizing quality and customer satisfaction and became a role model for many companies.

Until 2015, it focused on women's leather and fur jackets and acted in this line.

After 2015, it started to produce other leather products, inspired by both the demands from the foreign market and the advantage of the production center in which Turkey is located. (Leather belt, Bag and wallet) has achieved its purpose in the future and gained a great momentum.

Flamini, which handled the production of Exotic leather products in 2018, has since started to produce exotic leather products, mostly Python leather; Python leather bag, python wallet, python belt, python hat, etc. Flamini, who gained more knowledge and experience in exotic leather products day by day, produced premium quality products with first-class workmanship.

In addition, it started to produce iPhone accessories from python in line with the demands in 2021 and continues today.

 Over the years, Flamini, which has been kneaded with experience, patience and dexterity, has acted with the understanding of "Quality + Satisfaction + Reliable = Success" and continuous innovations that it has adopted as a life philosophy since the first day of its establishment, and today it follows this path of success and will continue to do so.

Name: Van den Bosch & Van Ranst
Description:
Van den Bosch & Van Ranst (VdB&VR) is a leading family-owned manufacturing company. We specialise in making wedding and friendship rings in all kinds of materials: gold, platinum, silver, (black) steel, titanium, etc.

We control almost the entire production process, from raw material to fully finished product. Despite the many machines, people and manual work are crucial in this whole process, they go hand-in-hand, so to speak. This makes every job with us versatile, no matter where you are, from production to the office.

Our production does not focus on serial work: we produce individual rings (almost) to size. In doing so, we apply the JIT principle: everything is made Just-In-Time, at very short notice. Despite bringing our rings to life at very short notice, this does not mean that we compromise on quality! On the contrary, quality and superior workmanship is something we strive for with our entire team, something we want to profile ourselves in.

Our permanent collection, built up over the years, has more than 300,000 ring varieties, spread over a number of collections such as Traditions, AURODESIGN, tessina, Mémoire, AMICI, etc., each with their own individuality. We also make custom-made rings, or derivatives of existing rings; internally we call these our specials.

Would you like to know more, or is your interest piqued?
Be sure to visit our websites:
- https://www.vdbvr.com (very informative)
- https://www.ringconfigurator.eu (fun to play with)

Name: Diasun Fine Jewelry
Description:
The name Diasun was first established in the mid-1980s, with their first diamond trading office in Hong Kong. It now has offices in Surat, Mumbai, Taiwan, China and the US. With over 30 years of experience in the diamond and jewelry field, Diasun can now provide a product comparable to none.

The Diamonds are sourced from the city of Surat, which is where most of the world’s diamonds are still polished, as well as the hometown of the founders of Diasun. Diasun knows that the greatest cost of any jewelry lies in the diamonds, thus we go right to the source and are updated daily with the market prices. 

As we still wholesale loose diamonds, the right price and the right quality are both of the utmost importance.

The jewelry is manufactured in our facility in Hong Kong (China), which is still the world’s largest producer of high-quality fine jewelry, where the founders have resided for over 26 years. Having a presence in Hong Kong for over 2 decades provides us with an insight of future trends in Fine Diamond Jewelry.

These two major advantages allow Diasun Fine Jewelry to provide high quality diamond jewelry at the most affordable prices.
