Name: Quality Casting Inc.
Description: Quality Casting has been family owned and operated since 1982.  Our customers and employees have enabled our growth and have established our reputation for always delivering the highest quality castings at a competitive price.  Every client from designer to the largest manufacturer is treated with the same individual care and attention.  Our specialists individually evaluate each project, large or small to provide you with optimum results and trouble free castings.  Our state of the art facility in Long Island City is not only modernized with the latest casting and 3D equipment, it is also completely computerized and allows us to supply accurate information on all the styles you cast with us.  Whether it is a free product card with weights, style numbers, images, and prices or a detailed itemized invoice, Quality has you covered. To support our customers growing demand for CAD and 3D printing, we have invested in state of the art machinery, and hired the most experienced and knowledgeable CAD engineers.   Our Cad department will work with you to optimize production of your project to obtain the best results. Our goal is to provide a smooth transition into cad and supply you with the best castings.When you upload your files onto Quality’s website, you are ensured a quick 3D print, as well as a high quality casting.  Your files will be kept secure, and castings will be delivered in as little as 48 hours.  By never having to take ownership of a fragile wax, you eliminate the risk of breaking it, and save time sending it back and forth.  We are committed to providing fast accurate pricing, quick 3D prints, and only the highest QUALITY Castings.

Name: Excellent Facets Inc
Description:
For over 25 years, Excellent Facets has excelled as a premier supplier of top-quality natural Mêlée and fancy color diamonds to elite jewelry and timepiece maisons globally. Our operations in New York and Geneva ensure prompt service and maintain near-zero return rates through strict quality control.

Our product lines include:
- Round Brilliant Melee Diamonds
- Fancy Shape Melee Diamonds
- Cut-to-Plan Melee Diamonds (Baguettes, Tapered Baguettes, Custom Cuts) 
- 8 x 8 Melee Diamonds
- Fancy Color Melee Diamonds (Pink and Yellow) 
- Fancy Color Certified Diamonds (Pink, Red, Blue, Orange, Green) 
- Argyle Pink Diamonds 
 
The majority of our polished inventory meets the following: 
- Polished Size: 0.0025 ct to 0.18 ct 
- Clarity: IF – VS 
- Color: D to I 
- We custom grade per the customer’s color, clarity and cut requirements  
- Cut: Excellent to Very Good 
- Polish: Excellent to Very Good 
- Symmetry: Excellent to Very Good 
- Provenance: Mine of origin must be disclosed; acceptable mines are located in countries such as Botswana, Canada, South Africa, Australia, Namibia, Lesotho. 

Ethical Sourcing & Manufacturing: We directly source rough diamonds from environmentally responsible mines and process them in our socially compliant facility in India, ensuring 100% synthetic-free products. Each diamond's origin is fully traceable via blockchain.

Sustainability & Community Engagement: As a Responsible Jewellery Council member since 2009 and committed to the Watch & Jewelry Initiative 2030, we aim for sustainability, achieving net zero emissions in 2023. We support charities like Diamonds Do Good, UNICEF, and Doctors Without Borders.

Excellent Facets is built on a foundation of quality, trust, and responsibility, continually striving to meet and exceed industry ethical standards for a lasting positive impact.

Name: Azotic LLC
Description:
Azotic LLC: Revolutionizing Gemstone Enhancement with AZOTIC Surface Enhanced Designer Gemstones

Azotic LLC is a global leader in gemstone enhancement, known for our exclusive AZOTIC Surface Enhanced Designer Gemstones. Since 1993, we've set the "GOLD STANDARD" in vapor deposition, offering patent-protected enhancements of exceptional quality and reproducibility. We enhance various gemstones, both synthetic and natural, for manufacturers, wholesalers, and distributors worldwide.

Our expertise covers Cubic Zirconia, Quartz, Topaz, Moissanite, Sapphire, Goeshenite, Zircon, and more. Founded by vacuum and materials professionals, we utilize advanced thin film deposition and surface enhancement technology. With reactive sputtering and plasma processes, we create coatings ranging from diamond-like carbon to decorative stacks, elevating gemstones to new levels of beauty.

Collaborating with esteemed institutions and experts, we recently replicated the Tavernier Blue and French Blue, replicas of the renowned Hope Diamond, in partnership with the Smithsonian Natural History Museum and gem artist John Hatleberg. Our commitment to preserving history and expertise in replication shines through these projects.

Based in Rochester, Minnesota, our Azotic LLC Gemstone Lab USA provides world-class nano coating technology. With exclusive US patents, our enhancements offer permanent durability and maintain gemstones' natural properties. We ensure an ultra-clean processing environment, vibrant colors, and remarkable clarity. Our environmentally friendly processes are radiation-free, transforming ordinary gemstones into extraordinary creations.

In summary, Azotic LLC is the industry leader in gemstone enhancement. With AZOTIC Surface Enhanced Designer Gemstones, we deliver unmatched quality and reproducibility. Trust us to elevate gemstones with excellence and create timeless beauty.

Name: The Carbon Negative Diamond Company
Description:
Welcome to the Carbon Negative Diamond Company, where we do one thing: 
Promote the sale of millions and billions of Diamonds made of carbon sequestered from greenhouse gases to reverse the effects of human-caused climate change.

The Carbon Negative Diamond company owns the USPTO registered C- (C Minus) Carbon Negative trademark. Diamonds bearing this mark are grown using renewable energy, like solar power. Every C- Diamond grown sequesters more carbon in the diamond than is released into the atmosphere, reducing carbon emissions that cause Global Warming and Climate Change. 

Carbon sequestration is the capture and secure storage of carbon that would otherwise be emitted to, or remain in, the atmosphere. (source)

Every C- Diamond converts gaseous carbon into a solid diamond, reducing the amount of atmospheric carbon by the weight of the diamond. When you purchase a C- Carbon Negative Diamond you help protect life on Earth from the effects of climate change.

Name: Cunill America Inc.
Description:
Cunill America Inc. is a family owned and operated company incorporated in January 2007 becoming the exclusive U.S. distributor of its signature brand Cunill Barcelona 1916. Since that time we've added other European luxury products as well. Being a smaller family business allows us to keep our operational costs low and our margins modest so that we can pass on unequaled quality-to-value wholesale and retail price points to the U.S. precious metal and luxury gift markets. All of the product is imported from European metal-smith artisans near the Mediterranean, factories in Italy, Spain, and Greece and stocked at our headquarters in Western Massachusetts. 

Our specialty is in high quality product that is suited to personalizing including picture frames, baby rattles, and personal accessories. We also provide fine table and bar related items, flatware, and more. Although the Cunill reputation has been built primarily on sterling silver goods over the years, we've since expanded into silver plate, gold, gold plate, and pewter. We believe our affiliate factories are the secret gems of the Mediterranean, most of them in Italy but also Spain and Greece. These hand made precious metal objects are only available to the U.S. market through Cunill America.

Name: LBJ Jewellery
Description:
Jon Davis founded LBJ Jewellery 30 years ago and has been successfully supplying independent jewellers across the UK with  jewellery ever since. All of the jewellery is carefully selected from all over the world. Due to Jon’s extensive experience within the industry, he has maintained strong relationships with his suppliers and customers. A strong commercial eye, and an in depth understanding of what his customers are looking for are the keys to his continued success.

LBJ Jewellery began life with Jon in the mid 1980’s, setting up to distribute in the UK for an overseas manufacturer of mainly gold earrings. There followed a gradual progression into silver jewellery from around the globe, and a continual expansion of the range. 

Two years ago, his daughter Annabelle joined the business, her career had formerly seen her managing fashion retail shops such as Uniqlo and Ted Baker, following a degree in Mandarin. 

With equal passion for jewellery and a shared determination, Jon and Annabelle run LBJ jewellery as a family business. Their personal service means that as a stockist you will feel part of their family too!

Name: Whitestone Jewelry
Description:
Title: Whitestone Jewelry: Crafting Timeless Stories in Precious Metals

Welcome to Whitestone Jewelry, where craftsmanship meets heritage, and dreams are woven into every creation. For over 25 years, we've been synonymous with excellence, integrity, and the celebration of life's most precious moments. As we expand our presence into the USA and Canada, we invite you to join us on a journey of elegance, luxury, and timeless beauty.

Crafting Legacies, Embracing Tradition

Founded by the visionary Ankit  Jain, Whitestone Jewelry traces its roots to the vibrant city of Patiala, Punjab—a place steeped in the rich tapestry of Indian heritage. From humble beginnings in a small workshop, Devendra's passion for precious metals and gemstones ignited a legacy of artistry and tradition. Today, his spirit lives on in every meticulously crafted piece, preserving the essence of our heritage for generations to come.

Excellence, Integrity, Innovation

At Whitestone Jewelry, our core values are more than just words—they're the guiding principles that shape everything we do. From upholding the highest standards of craftsmanship to conducting our business with honesty and transparency, we're committed to exceeding customer expectations at every turn. Embracing innovation as a catalyst for creativity, we blend traditional craftsmanship with contemporary trends, pushing the boundaries of design and innovation.

A Curated Collection of Timeless Treasures

Step into the world of Whitestone Jewelry and discover a curated selection of exquisite designs crafted from the finest materials. From the delicate sparkle of earrings to the timeless elegance of rings, each piece tells a unique story—a story of love, beauty, and the enduring power of human connection. Whether you're celebrating a milestone achievement or simply indulging in a moment of self-expression, our collection has something for every occasion.

Avec trois magasins SELFOR, SELFOR DÉCOR et SELFOR+ dans la même rue, une surface de vente de 500 m² et 9 600 références en stock, nous répondons aux besoins de plus de 10 000 clients dans 110 pays.

En 50 ans, nous avons évolué avec nos clients en restant fidèles à notre engagement : être un partenaire de confiance et de proximité pour les artisans, créateurs et commerçants qui font vivre ces métiers de savoir-faire.

At 3rd Bottle, we believe wine deserves better than a lukewarm ride.
Born from a deep love of wine, travel, and elevated experiences, 3rd Bottle is reinventing how wine journeys. Our premium insulated wine bags are designed for protection and style and are built to keep your bottles perfectly chilled for hours—no matter the destination.
Whether you're headed to a winery, weekend escape, beach picnic, or rooftop soirée, our wine travel bags go where glass usually doesn’t. With rugged elegance, interlocking freezable ice packs, and airtight zippers, we deliver durability with a twist of fun chic. It’s function meets fashion—so you can sip anywhere without compromise.
Our signature bags: 
 The Traveler – 12-bottle wine bag is for serious collectors and adventurers, RV Life, Boaters, Winery Hopping, and MORE! The Weekender – 6-bottle carryall for the casual connoisseur, concerts in the park, beach days, picnics, and more!
This isn’t just wine transport. It’s a lifestyle shift. A nod to those who believe wine is more than a drink—it’s a story, a vibe, a third bottle (or more) shared under open skies.
We’re proud to be designed in California and made for wherever your story takes you.
Let’s raise the standard with wine travel, one adventure, and bottle at a time. #ChilledFromVineToVoyage #WineWithoutLimits #3rdBottleLife #3rdBottle

Name: Fortuna Italia USA
Description:
Wholesale of custom-made jewelry imported directly from Italy.
We are proud to exclusively feature the work of two Italian jewelers/artisans:
  
Anna Barola
I created Anna Barola Italian Jewels for fun, after having fallen in love with these hand-painted ceramic balls, the fuseruole. I met them for the first time within the embroidery world, they were, in fact, used as decoration on pillows. It was love at first sight. Their bright colors, perfect roundness, but also the history and territorial tradition that carry out it is what makes them so unique.

Sanna Gioielli
Our business was born in 1981 on Giuseppe’s request, a fourth generation coral craftsman coming from Torre del Greco, who decided to move and settle his business in Oristano out of love for Anna Paola, daughter of one of the most well-known Sardinian ceramists of the 20th century.

Oristano’s coasts, despite what people think, are rich in resources and in coral history. After the fishing ban using “coralline” boats, our family mainly focussed on manufacturing, wholesale and retail coral sales and on jewelry, created with this precious material. Over the years, working with skilful colleagues, we have specialised in filigree working and in high-quality jewelry

Name: Jewellery by Juna s.r.o.
Description:
Jewellery by Juna was founded in 2014 in the south east of England in the coastal city of Brighton. In the true brightonian style the focus has been from the start on sustainability as well as design. We were lucky that the amazing brick and mortar shop The Fair started selling our pieces from the start. This was the first entirely fair trade boutique in the UK. Thanks to the we also joined an informal group of sustainable fashion businesses and activists from Sussex and London.This was one of the most important moment in our existence.

Because of all the crazy stuff in the world we moved to the Czech republic in 2020 and we shall see what happens next.

We use Fairmined certified in over 80% of our products. Unfortunately, we are not able to source chains that would be ethical and to our standards so at the moment we are working on solving this issue and our offer is limited. Some of our stockists still sell our 100% recycled ecosilver as we are slowly replacing it all with Fairmined certified. To find out more read this or just go straight to the Fairmined site.

 

INSPIRATION
We find inspiration in ancient jewellery in museums. The ones that are deformed to transcendental beauty by the passing time. It is the ultimate perfect imperfection.

Our love for the handmade that we let shine through our pieces sometimes a little bit too much is what sets us apart. It is not for everyone but that is ok, we all have our differences. We hope that our customers appreciate it!

Name: KJK JEWELRY
Description:
KJK Jewelry creates custom collections for hundreds of prestigious institutions including The White House Historical Association, The Smithsonian Institution, The Museum of Fine Arts Boston, and The American Museum of Natural History. These collections are designed to complement their exhibits. 

In addition to our custom work, KJK designs new collections each season. We search the world for authentic materials and reference materials to create designs that reflect our world’s rich cultural diversity and a variety of historical eras. Some of the most popular collections are: Botanical, Celestial, Recycled Glass, Multi-stone, and Charms. Educational inserts  are often included with our pieces to further customer understanding and appreciation. We believe it is extremely important for cultural institutions to create custom products to reflect and promote their mission. This also allows the customer to take home a piece of their museum experience and remember it whenever they put on their KJK Jewelry.

Most aspects of business, from initial design through production to shipping, occur in the New York studio. Each piece of jewelry is carefully designed by Katherine and handcrafted by her skilled artisans with the highest attention to quality and detail. 

KJK Jewelry was established in 1984 by designer Katherine J. Kornblau. In the last forty years, Katherine’s business has moved from a little red wagon by the beach on Fire Island to a Madison Avenue showroom. She has become one of the most versatile and respected jewelry designers in the museum store industry winning the prestigious Vendor of the Year Award from The Museum Store Association.  

Wholesale buyers can register to purchase KJK Jewelry on our wholesale website and we encourage you to reach out to Katherine to assist you as you curate your next big collection.

We thank those who have partnered with us along the way. It's been a great 40 years in business and we look forward to many more!

Nel corso degli anni abbiamo lavorato per distribuire diversi marchi di alta orologeria e ampliato la nostra rete di contatti in tutta Italia, dall’Alto Adige alla Sicilia, e Malta.

Ora con prodotti di indiscutibile manifattura e personalità come il mono lancetta di Meistersinger, i precisi segnatempo di Mühle-Glashütte, la storia ed il design di Junghans e la tecnologia e qualità svizzera di Victorinox, offriamo una vasta selezione di prodotti di qualità.

Dal 2019 siamo agenti ufficiali di WOLF1834, azienda anglosassone leader del mercato che crea e progetta lussuose custodie per gioielli in pelle, carica orologi e accessori da viaggio.

Dal 2023 siamo distributori ufficiali di ZRC, Herbelin e FACET.

Vår filosofi
Enkelt är vackert. Utan pråliga detaljer och överdåd levererar vi ur av högsta kvalitet till den stilmedvetne historieentusiasten.

Exklusivitet
Ett exklusivt ur ska bara nå en exklusiv skara. Endast trehundra ur finns tillverkade och är ämnade för dig som uppskattar ett historiskt unikum.

Kvalitet
Uret är utvecklat i samarbete med de bästa Schweiziska urmakarna där några av världens andra giganter tillverkas. Inget avkall på kvalitén får göras.

Description:
For over half a century and counting, the Kenneth Jay Lane jewelry line has been at the forefront of the very trends that Kenneth Jay Lane himself pioneered. A true innovator of the “Fabulous Fakes” that to this day, still convince women around the world to leave their real jewels at home…

Not only do you see the likes of contemporary icons such as Rihanna, Lady Gaga, Miley Cyrus, and Katy Perry (just to name a few) dazzling in Kenneth’s designs, but modern history’s most notable fashionistas have gravitated towards Kenneth Jay Lane since the label’s inception in 1962. Pop culture icons like Jackie Onassis Kennedy, Elizabeth Taylor, Audrey Hepburn, and even Princesses Diana and Maragret chose to wear “Kennys”, making the brand internationally sought after - and for good reason.

As Mr. Lane had said, “Elegance, luxury, and good taste never go out of style.”

Name: Kaspian Caviar Tradition
Description:
KASPIAN Caviar, a purveyor of world-class caviar, celebrates the art of taste and refinement. Our caviar, known for its generously sized grains, delivers a delicate yet robust flavor experience, featuring notes of dried fruit, nuts, and floral accents. Each grain is an embodiment of pristine waters, quality sturgeon life, and rigorous attention to the production process.

Our sturgeons thrive in the pure waters of Lake of Thousand Islands, enabling us to produce caviar of superior quality, highly acclaimed by Michelin-starred chefs and connoisseurs globally.

With a state-of-the-art facility in Dubai, we employ modern techniques to ensure production of the freshest and healthiest caviar, without compromising the environment.

KASPIAN Caviar is deeply committed to sustainability, prioritizing farming practices that safeguard the environment. We're proud to offer our customers the peace of mind that comes with making a responsible choice for their health and the planet.

Our aspiration is to strategically position KASPIAN Caviar as the quintessence of the culture of taste and the art of living, exuding opulence and refinement in every aspect. Join us on this journey of taste, refinement, and sustainability.

Name: Al Coro GmbH
Description:
Craftsmanly skill, a fascinating sensitivity for colors and shapes, and an unerring instinct for new trends in the jewelry world distinguish the Al Coro brand. Behind this is not only a love of fine jewellery and traditions handed down through the generations, but also the experience of a family-run manufactory.

The story begins in 1974, when Giuliano Corolli, a native of the jewellery city of Vicenza, discovered his passion for jewellery design and designed extravagant creations with his company Corolli. He settled in Cologne for love, where the AL CORO brand was founded in 1999 with its headquarters. Today, his son, Alexander Corolli, and his wife, Jacqueline Corolli, are the second generation to successfully run the company. Alexander has inherited the creativity and passion for jewellery and is responsible for the jewellery brand's designs. The vibrant jewellery culture of Vicenza continues to provide impetus and inspiration for Al Coro's designs.

You can feel it in every piece of jewellery: the special spirit of Vicenza, the Italian Mecca of jewellery manufacturing. Made with traditional craftsmanship and to the highest quality standards in 18-carat white, yellow and rose gold, the exquisite Mezzaluna, Serenata, La Piazza, Stretchy, Stretchy Uomo, Candy and Amori collections offer wearers artful pieces of jewellery.

 

The Corolli couple have consistently built up Al Coro and distributed it worldwide. Al Coro is now internationally recognised as a luxury brand by over 250 exclusive jewellers. Al Coro's loyalty to jewellers as sales partners is also consistently practised in the second generation. In 2022, AMICI was founded as an independent subsidiary brand, which stands for more delicate, 18-karat jewellery in entry-level price ranges and primarily appeals to customers who like it colourful.

Name: Selene Diam
Description:
SELENE, The Goddess of the Moon in Greek Mythology, stands for tranquility, brilliance, elegance, and uniqueness, which resonates perfectly well with the spirit of diamond love and romance.

Selene diamonds has been at the forefront of procuring rough diamonds, manufacturing and trading polished diamonds. What differentiates the company is its outstanding diamond manufacturing process with full attention to details at every stage from procuring, sorting, cleaving and cutting to quality control. Our heart-felt thanks and gratitude go to everyone who has always been there for us through thick and thin and provide better service and diamonds with best quality. The reason why we use the model of online self purchasing is to help customers choose their favorite diamond at anytime and in anywhere.

Our factory has a set of independent development of Diamond Grading System, called the SDGS Selene Diamond Grading System. Comparing to GIA diamond grading system,SDGS are more perfect and have more comprehensive appraisal standards and data.These data, diamond physical pictures ( through microscope) and some HD movies ( through microscope) are given to help our customers make a best choice. Continuous innovation, researches and quick adaptation to the volatile diamond market has helped us to grow bigger and stronger. It is the determination to deliver the very best that has led the company to new horizons year after year. While we take pride in our diamonds, your recognition is what we are here for and what will always sparkle in our hearts, like the brilliance of a diamond that will never fade away. With our hard work and high quality diamonds, it is our sincere wish to bring happiness and pleasure to you and your loved ones.

Name: nonu.Berlin
Description:
CONSCIOUS AND CAREFREE JEWELRY: Handgefertigt in Deutschland. Keine Hautreizungen. 100% wasserfest. Kein verfärben. Plastikfrei verpackt. Nachhaltig und fair. 

WARUM WIR NONU.BERLIN GEGRÜNDET HABEN
nonu.Berlin wurde gegründet um den hautfreundlichsten Schmuck auf verantwortungsvolle Weise herzustellen. Wir waren unzufrieden mit den bestehenden Optionen für empfindliche Haut und der sogenannten "Nachhaltigkeit" vieler Unternehmen. Entweder billig und doch nicht so hautverträglich und nachhaltig oder sehr teuer. Wir wollen keine Kompromisse mehr machen und endlich wieder bedenkenlos schönen Schmuck tragen. 

WAS MACHT UNSEREN SCHMUCK BESONDERS?
Wir nutzen für Ohrschmuck und Piercings nur reines Titan. Dieses häufig unterschätzte Metall wird meist bei medizinischen Implantaten im menschlichen Körper eingesetzt und gilt als biokompatibel. Das bedeutet, dass es keine Kontaktreaktion auslöst. Außerdem ist schon heute ein Großteil unserer Materialien recycelt und zu 100 % recycelbar. Die Nachverfolgung der Herkunft und Recyclingkette ist bei unedlen Metallen noch lange nicht da, wo sie es bei Gold oder Silber ist. Wir arbeiten mit unseren Partnern aber stetig daran so viel Transparenz wie möglich zu schaffen.

WARUM NONU.BERLIN?
Unser Name nonu. steht dabei für unsere Vision. nonu. - gesprochen “no new” (nicht neu/keine neuen). Sie richtet sich dabei auf die von uns verwendeten Materialien und verursachten Emissionen. Wir wollen so viel wie möglich recyceln, wenig Emissionen verursachen und Schäden an Mensch und Natur vermeiden. Unser Schmuck soll bewusst und bedenkenlos getragen werden. 

HANDMADE IN GERMANY
Unser Schmuck wird in Schmuckhandwerksbetrieben in Deutschland produziert und darauf sind wir verdammt stolz! Die Gründe hierfür sind vielfältig. Zum Einen sparen wir tonnenweise CO2 ein im Vergleich zu einer Produktion im Ausland, zum anderen haben wir hier herausragende und sehr faire Produktionsbedingungen. Wir haben unglaublich hohe Qualitätsstandards.

Name: Piercing&Tattoo
Description:
Fundada hace 10 años por un veterano con más de dos décadas en el sector del piercing, Piercing&Tattoo se ha establecido firmemente como un referente en calidad y diseño. 

Nuestra elección de especializarnos en piercings, dejando de lado el mundo de los tatuajes, fue motivada por la pasión por hacer una cosa "muy bien" y no dos, solo bien ;). 

Con casi 20 años de experiencia al iniciar esta empresa, el  propósito y motivación de su fundador Juan Ramón García, fueron los de elevar los estándares y ofrecer algo excepcional en el mercado.

Somos un equipo compacto y eficiente, y esta estructura nos ha permitido desarrollar una colaboración estrecha y eficaz. que se traduce en nuestra capacidad para atender pedidos y mantener una competitividad creciente.

Nuestro compromiso es seguir creciendo de manera constante y sostenible, ampliando nuestra oferta de materiales de alta calidad y diseños innovadores.

Nuestro valor añadido se basa en tres pilares: calidad excepcional, servicio personalizado y precios competitivos. 

Creemos firmemente en la importancia de construir conexiones genuinas y duraderas con nuestros clientes. Evitamos la venta directa al público, centrándonos exclusivamente en profesionales del piercing, estudios y tiendas, garantizando así una ética empresarial coherente y respetuosa.

En términos de productos, además de comercializar todos los complementos necesarios en el mundo del piercing, nos enorgullecemos de nuestras colecciones variadas y de máxima calidad que incluyen piercings de helix, daith, tragus y nuestra nueva línea de piercings de nariz, todos caracterizados por su singularidad y demanda.

Description:
The Luxe App is a free resource for businesses in the jewellery and watch industry.
*  A simple but powerful system to help keep control over your stock, our platform has been intuitively designed to save you time by allowing you to quickly add new pieces with just your phone that can be easily updated later on your computer, laptop or tablet.
* Our sync function means that all your stock can be instantly accessed, viewed and edited, from anywhere and at any time on your smartphone, tablet or laptop. Our mobile-friendly design makes it easy to navigate and interact with the platform, whether you're at an exhibition or in your office, your stock information is at your fingertips.

* You will love our pre-populated attributes. Choose from hundreds of options for metal type, categories, makers and more. Plus it's fully customisable so you can add what's important to you. You'll save even more time when you're searching for that perfect piece for your customer.
* You can really showcase your stock with the option to add multiple photos to each entry and easily share them by email or WhatsApp (and more) so your customers can see your pieces from all angles. Want to save a link to a spin file? There's a place for that too.
* You'll never be without your important documents, your certificates of authenticity, appraisals, or gemstone reports. Have full peace of mind knowing that our servers securely store all your documents along with each piece for easy viewing and sharing with your clients.
* And remember, your data is protected with the latest security technology, so you can be confident your information is absolutely safe.

Name: Mangal Chand Sons (Jewellers)
Description:
About Us- Mangal Chand Sons Jewellers Pvt Ltd
Mangal Chand Sons Jewellers Pvt Ltd stands as a beacon of heritage and exquisite craftsmanship in the world of fine jewelry. With a legacy spanning an astonishing 600 years in jewelry manufacturing, we are a true generational jeweller, deeply rooted in the rich traditions of Indian artistry.

Our headquarters are proudly located in the majestic city of Jaipur, Rajasthan, a global hub for exquisite jewelry. To cater to our discerning clientele, we have also established offices in Bikaner, Ahmedabad, and Mumbai, extending our reach and commitment to unparalleled service.

At the heart of our expertise lies the mastery of traditional and heritage Kundan, Meena, and Polki Jewellery. Our artisans, custodians of centuries-old techniques, meticulously craft each piece, ensuring it embodies the grandeur, intricate detail, and timeless elegance that these art forms demand. Every creation from Mangal Chand Sons is a testament to our unwavering dedication to preserving and evolving these precious traditions.

As a testament to our diversified offerings, we proudly present two distinguished daughter brands:

Swarn Mangal: Our retail store, designed to bring our exquisite craftsmanship closer to a broader audience, offering a diverse range of finely crafted jewelry for every occasion.

Baisa: Our high-end jewelry boutique, a sanctuary for connoisseurs seeking unparalleled artistry and exclusive, luxurious designs that truly define opulence.

Mangal Chand Sons Jewellers Pvt Ltd is a cherished family-run business, founded on principles of integrity, passion, and an enduring commitment to excellence by Mr. Ghanshyam Soni and Mr. Deepak Soni. Today, their vision is proudly carried forward by the next generation, Mr. Abhishek Soni, Mr. Mohit Soni, and Mr. Rishabh Soni, who continue to uphold our legacy while embracing innovation, ensuring Mangal Chand Sons remains at the forefront of the jewelry industry for centuries to come.

Name: Dialed By H
Description:
At Dialed By H, we specialize in sourcing, authenticating, and showcasing some of the world’s most iconic luxury timepieces. From Rolex, Audemars Piguet, and Patek Philippe to Richard Mille and beyond, our mission is to connect collectors, enthusiasts, and first-time buyers with the watches that define craftsmanship, prestige, and timeless value.

Founded by two best friends and college roommates with a shared passion for horology, Dialed By H was built on three core values: expert insight, transparency, and trust. What began as countless late-night conversations about watches quickly grew into a business dedicated to helping others experience the same excitement and appreciation for fine timepieces. We understand that every watch tells a story not just of design and engineering, but of milestones, achievements, and personal legacy. That’s why we go beyond simply selling watches. We guide clients through every step of the process, ensuring that each acquisition is informed, meaningful, and tailored to their collection.

Our extensive global network of trusted dealers, watchmakers, and collectors allows us to source rare and in-demand models that are often inaccessible on the open market. Whether it’s a stainless steel Rolex Daytona, an Audemars Piguet Royal Oak, or a limited-edition Richard Mille, we leverage our relationships and market expertise to deliver watches with authenticity and confidence.

For first-time buyers, we provide the education and insight needed to navigate the luxury watch world without feeling overwhelmed. For seasoned collectors, we act as a concierge helping expand, refine, and diversify collections with strategic acquisitions that hold both emotional and investment value.

Above all, we are dedicated to building lasting relationships in the watch community, offering an elevated experience rooted in passion, integrity, and the friendship we were founded on.

Name: Tourmaline Lanka Gem Lab
Description:
Tourmaline Lanka Gem Lab is widely recognized as one of the most trusted gemological laboratories in the gem and jewelry industry. With its commitment to excellence and expertise in gemstone analysis, Tourmaline Lanka Gem Lab has established a strong reputation for providing reliable and accurate gemstone testing results.

The lab employs a team of highly skilled and experienced gemologists who possess in-depth knowledge of gemstone identification, grading, and certification. These experts utilize state-of-the-art equipment and advanced gemological techniques to meticulously examine gemstones and provide comprehensive reports on their authenticity, quality, and characteristics.

Clients, including gemstone dealers, jewelry manufacturers, and individual collectors, rely on Tourmaline Lanka Gem Lab’s  services to ensure the integrity and value of their gemstones. The lab's reports carry immense credibility and are widely accepted in the industry, making them essential for buyers and sellers alike.

Beyond its commitment to quality and precision, Tourmaline Lanka Gem Lab also places a strong emphasis on customer satisfaction. The lab maintains a transparent and professional approach, offering personalized assistance and guidance to clients throughout the evaluation process. Whether it's a single gemstone or a large collection, Tourmaline Lanka Gem Lab is dedicated to delivering reliable, unbiased, and trustworthy gemological assessments.

Tourmaline Lanka Gem Lab is renowned for its expertise, integrity, and reliability in the gem and jewelry industry. Its commitment to providing accurate gemstone evaluations and exceptional customer service has positioned it as one of the most trusted gemological laboratories in the field.

Uzun yıllar aile işinin her aşamasında tecrübe kazanan ve babasının izinden giden oğlu, 2022 yılında yenilikçi bir adım atarak FAZ Kuyumculuk’a dijital dünyada yer açtı.  
Böylece, yarım asra yaklaşan hikayemiz Kapalıçarşı sınırlarını aştı, online mağaza satış kanalımız ile dünya çapında sağlam bir yer edindi.  
Geleneksel ile modernin birlikteliği, müşteri odaklı hizmet anlayışımız bize yeni başarı hikayeleri yazmak için güç veriyor. Aynı zamanda, geleceğe yönelik bir bakış açısıyla işimizin sürdürülebilir olarak büyümesine katkı sağlıyor. 
FAZ Kuyumculuk olarak, sadece mücevher satışı yapmanın ötesinde, bir yaşam tarzının ve stilin yansıması olmayı hedefliyoruz.

Name: Kindness Gems
Description:
Kindness Gems was created to inspire acts of kindness. Our founder Julia Freifeld worked as a crisis counselor for survivors of sexual violence at several non-profits in San Luis Obispo, California while studying business and psychology at California Polytechnic State University.  During her time there she created simple jewelry designs to raise money for these underfunded organizations by donating 10% of all proceeds back to the places she worked at. 

After realizing how incredible it feels to give back, Julia wanted to create a jewelry line that represents the kindness in each of us. After countless variations, she finally launched the first Kindness Gems collection at the 2017 Spring Craft Sale at Cal Poly where it was well received by the local community. She quickly expanded her jewelry's reach through various markets around the central coast of California promoting a simple message that when you purchase a piece of Kindness Gems jewelry you are encouraged to commit to an act of kindness.

After graduating from college, Julia moved to San Diego where she operates her business in the awesome community of Ocean Beach, California. She has since expanded her iconic jewelry line in many boutiques and chains throughout the country while maintaining the same goals of helping others by donating to charity and spreading acts of kindness with simple but elegant jewelry designs.

We always use high quality natural healing gemstones and 14k gold-filled and sterling silver materials to create our signature dainty but durable style that works with any outfit. In this way, Kindness Gems jewelry is built to be a lasting reminder to be kind and help others every day.

Name: Kay Vee Gems
Description:
Fifty years.

That’s how deep the roots go here. What started with Vallabhbhai Dholakia has grown into something much bigger—a true legacy operation now driven by Naresh, Ashish, Ranchod, Ajay, and Vishnu Dholakia. We aren't just another popup in the lab-grown space; we’ve been in this game for half a century, successfully bridging the gap between old-school diamond expertise and modern manufacturing dominance.

Here’s the thing about our process: We are HPHT purists.

You won't catch us dabbling in CVD methods. We made a strategic choice to stick exclusively to High Pressure High Temperature manufacturing because, frankly, it allows us to control quality in a way that just works for us. It’s about consistency. When you’re buying in bulk, you need to know exactly what you’re getting every single time.

And when I say bulk, I mean it. We are built for volume.

We’re currently one of the leading manufacturers in terms of pure output, designed specifically to feed the wholesale market. We know B2B. We understand that a supply chain is only as good as its reliability, so we keep the pipelines full.

So, what are we actually cutting? Our bread and butter is the Round Brilliant. It’s our forte. We produce rounds on a massive scale, ranging anywhere from tiny 0.01 pointers up to 2.00 carats. If you need volume in rounds, we’re your guys.

Sure, we do fancies too—mostly in the 0.10 to 0.50 ct range for Marquise, Ovals, Pears, and Emeralds—but the round goods are really the heartbeat of our factory.

We’re fully accredited GJEPC members (we believe in doing things by the book), operating right out of the hub at the Bharat Diamond Bourse in Mumbai—office EW1060, if you ever want to stop by for a chai. And for our friends in North America, we’ve got a dedicated sales team on the ground in New York to keep things moving in your time zone.

Name: Bezalel Gems Ltd
Description:
We are a wholesale gemstone supplier based in Hatton Garden, London. Established in 1967, we stock over 150 different precious and semi-precious gems in a diverse range of calibrated sizes, shapes and qualities.

Our business has humble beginnings...
We started out, in 1967, as one man in a room with some rough Lapis Lazuli from the mines of Afghanistan - where generations of his family descended.

That man, Martin Bezalel, grew the business with his brother Simon, in Hatton Garden, London. And we’re still a family business to this day - now a world-renowned supplier of over 150 different precious and semi-precious gems, in all calibrated sizes and shapes.

The world has changed a lot in 55 years - but our commitment and service as a wholesale gem cutter and supplier has remained the same. And, decades later, we’re based just a few doors down from our very first office.

Name: Oro di Sciacca
Description:
Fondata nel 1980, a Sciacca in Sicilia (Italia), recupera le abilità e tecniche di lavorazione orafo e corallare della tradizione siciliana, per dar vita ad una produzione artigianale di gioielli e manufatti in corallo nei quali l’eco dell’antica magnificenza si fonde con un raffinato gusto moderno.
Le creazioni Oro di Sciacca, sono realizzate in oro e corallo del Mediterraneo, della specie Corallium Rubrum, prevalentemente della varietà Sciacca, dalla caratteristica colorazione rosa salmone o dalle raffinate sfumature del fossile, e, della varietà Trapani, dal colore rosso intenso. 

Il laboratorio è in grado di eseguire tutte le fasi della lavorazione dei gioielli: dal taglio all’incisione, dalla
lucidatura alla composizione.

Il brand “Oro di Sciacca” si rivolge ad un pubblico esigente, raffinato attratto dalla straordinarietà e unicità del lavoro artistico artigianale oltre che dall’ineffabile seduzione del corallo, che si innesta in una fascia medio alta del consumatore del prodotto gioiello.
Preziosità e valore intrinseco delle materie prime utilizzate, lavorazione artigianale, unicità e la forte identità di ogni singola creazione, sono i punti di forza delle nostre produzioni e danno vita a creazioni uniche e irripetibili.

Name: Adjacent Metal-Link, Inc.
Description:
Adjacent Metal-Link, Inc. (AMLI). is specialized trader engaged in the facilitation and exchange of precious metals, wholesale/retail buying and selling of secondhand watches, and other goods, commodities and merchandise. The corporation was registered with the Securities and Exchange Commission on August 20, 2020 and led by independent trader and businessman, Mr. Erwin C. Ocampo as the majority stockholder.

Mr. Ocampo in August 2002, was initially engaged in the buying of precious metals, more specifically, platinum, in the form of old jewelries and industrial scraps, such as thermocouple wires, autocatalysts, glass electrodes and thimbles. Aside from platinum, he was also buying silver in the form of coins, which circulated during the Philippine-US commonwealth period, and silverwares.

After 2 years of trading platinum and silver, Mr. Ocampo took interest in horology and decided to engage in the buying of preowned fine Swiss watches form the local market and sell them to established buyers locally and abroad.

With the incorporation of AMLI, the company looks forward to further diversity its product lines and opening new of opportunities for business growth.

Name: AVGUSTOVA
Description:
AVGUSTOVA leather is about handmade leather goods of the highest craftsmanship, ancient traditions, refined simplicity of forms, luxurious materials and uncompromisingly supreme quality. Our craft is as art.

Time and attentiveness. We care about all the details: hand-selected hides, hand-cut parts, hand-sewn product. The slow and thoughtful process of creating each item is a luxury that we are proud of. Traditions and quality. Strong and imperfect handmade stitches is hard work. This craft is thousands of years older than we are but it is still alive in the hands of our master. Vegetable tanning is a traditional and labour-intensive method of leather manufacturing making it soft, breathable, durable and giving it a luxurious gloss. Our products carefully keep their history and tell your personal story.

The AVGUSTOVA master is one of the last keepers of this ancient craft in Germany. His incredible skills used in creation of leather goods based on centuries-old traditions of European manufacturing is our main value. We use only premium quality leather, our master can work with rare and exotic materials. Chains for our clutches are produced by a small German factory that has been making them for more than a century. Some parts of AVGUSTOVA bags are hand-minted in pure sterling silver, some are plated in gold. It is of great importance for us to preserve the exclusive and man-made quality of even the most inconspicuous parts.

AVGUSTOVA leather goods are simple form sculptures, beauty and style, over which the time has no power. We work only if we are inspired and are not confined by seasons or collections. The cost of our bags starts from 2000€. We value the exceptional result of each order — so it is impossible for us to save on time and on quality. This approach contradicts the idea of mass product, because each of our things is a unique piece of art.

Introducing The Royal Butterfly, the epitome of luxury silk flowers. We specialize in curating exquisite floral creations that redefine elegance and sophistication. From 5-star hotels to high-end restaurants, we cater to the discerning tastes of the luxury hospitality sector.

Name: Ara Collection
Description:
The story begins with two brothers and a small jeweler’s bench in Bodrum, Turkey.  Coming from a long line of artisans, the brothers developed their skills in jewelry making based on ancient techniques.  Back then, neither could have imagined that their unique designs would captivate so many.  Decades later, Ara Collection is known worldwide for its handcrafted 24 karat gold jewelry.

In 2001, Ara Collection expanded their business to the US, where the line was very well received and appreciated.  They continued to grow, opening their flagship retail store in Santa Barbara, CA in 2004.  The collection now graces hundreds of jewelry stores nationwide, as well as stores in Canada, Brazil, Costa Rica, Bermuda, St. Bart’s, Barbados, and Puerto Rico.

Ara Collection takes pride in its quality and workmanship.  Each piece is created by hand at the company’s workshop in Bodrum, Turkey.  Inspiration for the collection comes from the rich history of ancient Anatolian civilizations and the beauty of the Mediterranean and Aegean Seas.

Our Services:
Emerald Imports:
We import premium emeralds from Zambia and Colombia, known for their superior color, clarity, and cutting. Our direct relationships with miners and trusted sources ensure that every stone is ethically sourced.
Exporting to the USA & South West Asian Markets:
With a strong presence in international markets, we provide reliable and timely exports to clients across the USA and South West Asia. Our gemstones meet the needs of high-end jewelers, designers, and collectors worldwide.
Custom Orders and Consultation:
We offer bespoke gemstone sourcing and consultation services, guiding clients through the selection process based on their specific requirements.
Sustainable Sourcing:
We believe in responsible and ethical sourcing practices. Our gemstones are sourced from certified, eco-conscious mines, ensuring minimal environmental impact.

Name: PREM IMPEX
Description:
Prem Impex stands as a beacon of excellence in the diamond industry, specializing in both natural and lab-grown diamonds. With an unwavering commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction, we have established ourselves as a trusted name in the global market. Our journey from a small, passionate team to a global supplier reflects our dedication to craftsmanship, ethical practices, and the pursuit of perfection.

Our Legacy

Founded with a vision to transform the diamond industry, Prem Impex has grown steadily, driven by a passion for excellence and a commitment to delivering the finest diamonds to our clients worldwide. Our journey began with a simple yet profound goal: to provide diamonds that are not just beautiful but are also responsibly sourced and expertly crafted. Over the years, we have expanded our operations, bringing together a team of skilled professionals who share our vision and dedication.

Expertise in Natural and Lab-Grown Diamonds

At the heart of Prem Impex lies our dual expertise in both natural and lab-grown diamonds. Our collection features a wide range of diamonds, each meticulously selected and crafted to meet the highest standards of quality and brilliance. Whether you seek the timeless allure of natural diamonds or the innovative appeal of lab-grown stones, Prem Impex offers an unparalleled selection designed to cater to the diverse needs of our clients.

Our natural diamonds are sourced from some of the most reputable mines around the world, ensuring that each stone meets our stringent criteria for quality and ethical sourcing. We are committed to transparency and adhere to the highest industry standards to ensure that our diamonds are conflict-free and responsibly sourced.

Our lab-grown diamonds represent the future of the industry, offering a sustainable and ethical alternative without compromising on quality or beauty. These diamonds are created using cutting-edge technology that replicates the natural diamond formation..

Name: Tull & Co
Description:
Experienced Luxury Goods Strategist Helping Emerging Brands Achieve Success.

After 20 years in retail management, wholesale marketing, and business management for luxury brands, I decided to lean into where my talents and passions intersect. I proactively assist emerging luxury goods entrepreneurs and brands to fill the gaps in their business operations.

As a seasoned professional with expertise in retail, wholesale, and business management, I'm the partner, project manager, and sales leadership you need. I have a confident understanding of the cadence and operations of retail stores and department stores at every volume level. 

I excel at brainstorming and transforming ideas into strategic, actionable plans. My friends lovingly refer to me as the "logical simplicity guru" - I can help you navigate your challenges and determine your immediate needs and long-term goals, so you can start finding revenue quickly.

If you don't have the time or energy to be creative and strategic, or you're looking to re-imagine how you'll conduct business as you grow your brand, I'm here to help. I'm available for consulting and fractional leadership roles in the wholesale business development & retail space.

I approach my work lightheartedly, leveraging my experience in comedy performance to navigate nearly any situation with a good sense of humor, laughter, and fun. I believe success and total well-being is a lifestyle - it's yours to power up, nurture, and create magic with.

Married with one daughter, I'm based in Overland Park, Kansas, and I'm excited to partner with emerging luxury goods entrepreneurs and brands to help them thrive.

Name: Kroetz Joias
Description:
A KROETZ é uma joalheria de ateliê dedicada ao essencial: peças em ouro 18K de procedência verificada, gramagem real e acabamento premium. Trabalhamos com desenho autoral e curadoria de clássicos — anéis, alianças, brincos, colares e pulseiras — sempre com foco em proporção, conforto e durabilidade.

Nossa transparência é simples: cada peça informa peso (g), teor e características técnicas. Utilizamos fornecedores auditados, balança aferida e documentação completa. O resultado é uma joia que não depende de modismos: forma precisa, brilho contido, presença inteira.

Serviços
• Criações sob medida e personalizações (tamanho, largura, acabamento, gravação).
• Ajustes, polimento e manutenção.
• Produção para presentes, noivados e datas especiais, com prazos combinados.
• Envios com seguro e rastreio para todo o Brasil e para a Argentina (região de fronteira).

Como pensamos
Menos ruído, mais essência. Preferimos a qualidade silenciosa: materiais nobres, engenharia do detalhe e um atendimento que resolve. Sem promessas — apenas critérios, técnica e beleza de propósito.

KROETZ — Forma que permanece.

Name: Reeves & Reeves
Description:
Reeves & Reeves are, at the heart, husband and wife team Heath and Caroline, who (with a small team of like-minded individuals) work from a fantastic converted blacksmith’s forge in the idyllic grounds of Forde Abbey, in West Dorset. We are still essentially a family-run business, but with some major corporate customers, many commissioning their own ranges, and many wonderful independent stockists from the southern tip of Cornwall to the Orkneys. Name: Luxury Watch Detailer
Description:
Luxury Watch Detailer ist eine Versiegelung mit Reinigung, die auf Uhren aufgetragen wird, um ihnen eine Schutzschicht zu verleihen. Diese Schutzschicht wird aus Siliziumdioxid-Partikeln hergestellt, die auf der Oberfläche haften und eine Schutzbarriere bilden.

Das Siliziumdioxid in der Versiegelung bildet eine glatte und hydrophobe Oberfläche, die Wasser und Schmutz abweist. Dadurch ist die Oberfläche einfacher zu reinigen und bleibt länger sauber. Zudem kann es auch vor Kratzern, UV-Strahlen und chemischen Einflüssen schützen.

Name: GLW Shows
Description:
Gem & Lapidary Wholesalers Inc. (GLW Shows) operates America's most extensive wholesale gem show circuit, hosting 18 shows annually across eight U.S. markets since 1974. We connect gem and jewelry professionals with trusted exhibitors, quality products, and real business opportunities.

Our Mission
To provide a professional, relationship-focused marketplace where gem and jewelry professionals can source quality products, build trusted supplier relationships, and grow their businesses.

Our Shows
With 18 shows per year in Tucson, Franklin, Orlando, Minneapolis, Asheville, Westland, Lakeland, and West Springfield, we offer more sourcing opportunities than any other wholesale gem show circuit in America. Our flagship Tucson events feature 275+ exhibitors, while our regional shows provide convenient access to quality suppliers year-round.

Our Community
We connect over 500 exhibitors with 50,000+ qualified wholesale buyers annually, including jewelry retailers, designers, manufacturers, gemstone dealers, and online sellers. Many of our exhibitor-buyer relationships span decades—a testament to the trust and reliability that define GLW Shows.

Our Commitment
• Wholesale-Only Format: All attendees must present a valid state sales tax license, ensuring a professional environment focused on serious business
• Quality Exhibitors: Carefully curated exhibitors representing both domestic and international sources
• Premium Venues: Climate-controlled spaces with professional lighting, security, and easy access
• Proven Results: Year after year, exhibitors return for qualified buyers, strong ROI, and meaningful industry connections

What You'll Find at Our Shows
• Gemstones & Minerals
• Finished Jewelry
• Metaphysical Crystals
• Beads & Findings
• Lapidary Equipment & Supplies

Our Heritage
For over 50 years, GLW Shows has been the trusted marketplace where gem professionals connect, source, and grow. We're not the flashiest show—we're the most reliable one. Built on relationships

Whether you are looking for a festive Xmas or Easter item, a unique wedding or baptism souvenir or a stunning piece of jewellery for yourself or your loved ones, K-Boo has something for you.

- K-Boo has collaborated with prestigious institutions around Greece, such as the Benaki Museums, the Stavros Niarchos Foundation Cultural Centre. They have also created and run the shops of the successful exhibitions Van Gogh Alive and DaVinci Genius.

- K-Boo invites you to discover its amazing world of design and share its vision of happiness.

Name: VS Ventures

VS Ventures – Crafting Brilliance, Growing the Future of Diamonds 
At VS Ventures, we are revolutionizing the world of lab-grown diamonds, specializing in fancy vivid yellow , pink , green , and red  diamonds. Our passion lies in blending cutting-edge technology with exquisite craftsmanship, ensuring every diamond we create is a masterpiece of brilliance and sustainability.

 We Grow Diamonds  – Using advanced CVD & HPHT technology, we cultivate diamonds that rival nature’s finest.

 Beyond Jewelry – Diamonds for Science & Innovation
We’re not just about beauty—we’re pushing boundaries in diamond technology! Our research-driven approach has led to the development of semiconducting thin-film diamonds, including P-type & N-type diamonds, used in cutting-edge electronic & heat sink applications.

 Why Choose VS Ventures?
 Unmatched Quality – Every diamond is crafted to perfection & precision.
 Sustainability First – Ethical, conflict-free, and environmentally responsible. 
 Innovation-Driven – Pioneering new applications & possibilities in diamond technology.

At VS Ventures, we don’t just grow diamonds—we shape the future of luxury & innovation. Let’s connect and create something extraordinary!

Name: Une Georges à Evolène
Description:
Transmettre, honorer, réinventer… Voilà ce qui anime Une Georges à Évolène . Bien plus qu'une marque de bijoux, c'est une passerelle entre passé et présent, entre tradition et modernité.

Issue d'un savoir-faire joaillier de plus de 13 ans, chaque création est une pièce unique, façonnée avec minutie et imprégnée d'histoire. Nos bijoux sont réalisés à partir des rubans du costume traditionnel d'Évolène , véritables témoins d'un patrimoine riche et vivant. En les transformant en accessoires contemporains, nous leur offrons une seconde vie, un nouvel éclat, sans jamais trahir leur essence.

Dans un monde où tout va vite, les racines sont essentielles . Elles nous rappellent d'où nous venons, elles nous ancrent et nous guident. Porter un bijou Une Georges à Évolène , c'est choisir de valoriser un héritage , de préserver un artisanat unique, tout en affirmant sa singularité à travers un accessoire qui traverse le temps.

Mais la tradition ne doit jamais être figée. C'est pourquoi nous repensons ces éléments anciens à travers des designs modernes et élégants , adaptés aux femmes d'aujourd'hui, audacieuses et fières de leur histoire. Chaque bijou raconte une mémoire, un instant, une émotion… Il devient un repère, un symbole, une affirmation de soi .

Aujourd'hui, nous cherchons à collaborer avec des boutiques haut de gamme, des concept stores, des créateurs de mode et des événements prestigieux pour faire rayonner cet artisanat et lui donner toute la place qu'il mérite. Vous êtes un professionnel du secteur et souhaitez mettre en avant un artisanat unique chargé d'histoire ? Parlons-fr !

 Basée à Évolène, en Suisse
 Contact : georges.heloise07@gmail.com
 www.heloise-georges.com

Name: Earthyon LLC
Description:
Discover the Timeless Elegance of Earthyon: A Gateway to the World’s Finest Gems and Jewelry.

Welcome to Earthyon, where the legacy of the world’s most exquisite gems meets modern craftsmanship. Founded on a family tradition that spans over five decades, Earthyon has established itself as a premier destination in the global jewelry market, specializing in an exceptional array of emeralds from the heart of Panjshir, Afghanistan—a region celebrated for its rich deposits and exquisite gemstones.

Our journey in gemology began over fifty years ago, with our founder’s father at the helm, traveling the world to bring together rare and vibrant gems. Today, we honor this legacy by continuing to source the highest quality gemstones, focusing on the lush, verdant emeralds of Panjshir Valley. Mined with the utmost care and respect for sustainability, these gems are renowned for their unmatched clarity and color.

Why choose Earthyon? We are more than just a jewelry brand. We are custodians of a rich family legacy, providing our customers with not only luxury items but also a piece of Earth’s hidden treasures. Our commitment to ethical sourcing and environmental responsibility ensures that our practices contribute positively to the local communities and honor the legacy that our family has built.

Explore our exclusive collections and experience the allure of Earthyon’s gems. Whether you are looking to invest in a timeless piece of jewelry or seeking a unique gift, Earthyon promises unmatched quality and authenticity, backed by a family tradition of excellence in gemology.

Visit us at www.earthyon.com or our linked in page to view our latest collections and learn more about our sustainable practices. Connect with Earthyon, where elegance, ethical responsibility, and a rich family heritage meet to create everlasting beauty.

Name: Solatrex International Ltd. t/a CALCUL
Description:
Our company, Calcul, was established in Shannon, Ireland in 1974 with a focus on sales of electronic calculators on the Irish market. Two years later, we started a separate export company, Solatrex, in the Shannon Free Zone, offering electronics items like video games and calculators. Around the same time, we started to move into the burgeoning new electronic watch industry which would later become the core of the business.

Over the years, the two companies operated together, with Solatrex responsible for exports and Calcul selling the same products to retailers on the domestic Irish market. In 2012, operations of Calcul and Solatrex were merged into one entity for simplicity. To provide a seamless transition for customers, Solatrex continues to use the trading name "Calcul" in Ireland, operating from our original location in Shannon Free Zone.

Name: TESSILE b2b
Description:
At Tessile.eu, we redefine the way sustainable luxury fashion reaches Europe’s most refined boutiques. We are not a simple distributor, nor an open marketplace – but rather a discreet bridge between designers who create responsibly and independent retailers seeking exclusivity and authentic value.

Our mission is to build partnerships based on trust, transparency, and performance, offering intelligent, curated distribution. We combine human curation – carefully selecting brands that prioritize natural fibers, international certifications, and ethical production – with digital intelligence, enabling precise placement in real time, tailored to each boutique’s needs and market demand.

Through our private digital portal, we provide an efficient and discreet way to present collections. There are no public catalogs or unnecessary exposure; instead, every collaboration is designed to protect the identity of the brand and the uniqueness of the boutique.

We exclusively partner with brands committed to sustainability – from GOTS- and RWS-certified natural fibers to responsible production processes. At the same time, we empower European boutiques with boutique-exclusive placement, eliminating overlap and ensuring a unique offer for their final clients.

Tessile.eu is not just about distribution. It is about building the future ecosystem of sustainable luxury fashion: discreet, data-driven, relationship-based, and responsible. We believe the future of luxury retail lies in the balance between refinement and responsibility – and our role is to make that transition possible, step by step, for every selected boutique across Europe.

Name: Barbara Goyri Jewellery
Description:
Barbara Goyri Jewellery is a brand created in 2012 and established in Oporto, Portugal. The love for collecting and the knowledge that breathes through her memories provided the perfect setting for Barbara to start her own designer brand, exclusively dedicated to the creation of contemporary jewellery.
Inspired by nature and life experiences, Barbara Goyri Jewellery presents us collections filled with little treasures, that harmoniously match the ancestral Portuguese know-how with the contemporary design, immersed in temporal, visual and geometric contrasts. 
There is no pursuit of perfection. Instead, this work is about the imperfection of natural textures in connection with the structural geometry of each piece. Simplicity is the keyword behind her art and expertise, which also defines the cosmopolitan woman that brings her refined jewellery to life, day after day.
Combining contemporaneity with the national handcraft, the pieces that are born from experiences in her work bench, gain a human dimension through the dynamics among Portuguese suppliers and artisans. The search for detail and finesse in the quality of the finishings are fundamental in the creative process of each collection and personalized requests, providing little stories in the shape of jewellery, that are uniquely designed for each of her costumers.

Name: 925.pl
Description:
Firma 925.pl Marek Piątkowski istnieje na polskim rynku od 2008 roku. Zajmujemy się produkcją oraz sprzedażą półfabrykatów srebrnych do wykonywania biżuterii.

W naszej ofercie znajdziecie Państwo szeroki wybór bigli do kolczyków, zapięć, zawieszek, szpilek, kulek, ogniw, oraz wiele innych. Jesteśmy producentem większości z nich.

Współpracujemy z renomowanymi markami jubilerskimi.

Posiadamy własne biuro projektowe oparte na programie „Rhinoceros” oraz „RhinoGold”, dzięki czemu możemy stale poszerzać nasz asortyment o nowoczesne i unikatowe wzory.

Od 2009 roku uruchomiona została nowoczesna linia odlewnicza. Dokładamy wszelkich starań dążąc do usprawnienia procesu odlewania oraz nieustannego podnoszenia jakości naszych półfabrykatów.

W 2010 roku otworzyliśmy własną galwanizernię, dzięki czemu większość półwyrobów dostępna jest w trzech wersjach kolorystycznych. Wśród naszych usług znajduje się także grawerowanie oraz wycinanie elementów płaskich przez frezarki CNC.

Naszym najnowszym nabytkiem jest znakowarka laserowa , dzięki której możemy oferować Państwu szeroką gamę usług w zakresie wycinania elementów jeszcze bardziej szczegółowych oraz wzorów na indywidualne zamówienia.

Zapraszamy do współpracy.

Shanghai Jiuwubudind is the Authorization of "National Intangible Cultural Heritage Representative" of gold and silver craftsmanship. The charm of intangible cultural heritage, the soul of culture. https://www.jiuwubuding.com/

The gold and silver craftsmanship is a traditional metal handicraft in my country. It is made of gold and silver as the main materials. It is used for indoor decoration and appreciation and has practical functions. Because of the excellent ductility of the material, it can be as thin as a cicada's wing and as fine as a hair. Therefore, the techniques used are very complicated and delicate, including hammering, disc, engraving, engraving, filigree, inlaying, blasting beads, gilding, and dozens of other techniques.

We offer all kinds of gold and silver antique crafts. All are made by skilled manual workers, exquisite and sophisticated. We support OBM model cooperation.

Our commitment is to provide superior items at budget-friendly prices and to cultivate lasting partnerships with reliable associates for mutual success.

Name: Jewelrita LLC
Description:
Jewelrita LLC is pioneering a new generation of gold jewelry by masterfully combining 14k gold with 925 sterling silver. Our innovative approach enables us to create stunning, durable, and more accessible pieces that challenge traditional jewelry-making methods.
At the core of our offering is our unique gold-on-silver technology. This proprietary method meticulously bonds a layer of genuine 14k gold onto a solid 925 sterling silver base. The result is jewelry with the luxurious look and feel of solid gold, offering enhanced durability and resistance to tarnishing, all while remaining more lightweight and affordably priced.
Our collections feature:
- Necklaces that showcase the brilliant luster of 14k gold.
- Earrings designed for everyday elegance, combining strength with sophisticated style.
- Bracelets that offer the rich warmth of gold without the premium weight.
- Rings that stand out with their unique blend of precious metals, crafted for lasting beauty.
Jewelrita LLC is committed to innovation, quality, and conscious craftsmanship. We're redefining what's possible in fine jewelry, providing pieces that are not only beautiful but also smart. Discover the future of gold jewelry with Jewelrita.

Name: Yuma Fashion Group
Description:
YUMA Eyewear Co. es una marca colombiana de lentes de sol premium creada para ofrecer productos de alta calidad con un enfoque completamente orientado al canal mayorista. Nuestro propósito es conectar diseño, valor y rentabilidad, brindándole a ópticas, tiendas especializadas, boutiques de moda y vendedores independientes una línea de lentes que combina estilo, sostenibilidad y excelentes márgenes comerciales.

Nuestros modelos están fabricados con materiales seleccionados, incluyendo monturas de bambú sostenible y acetatos de alta resistencia, ofreciendo ligereza, durabilidad y una estética moderna que se adapta a diferentes perfiles de consumidores. Cada producto se desarrolla bajo estándares de calidad pensados para competir con marcas establecidas, pero manteniendo una estructura de precios que permite a nuestros aliados obtener márgenes superiores.

En YUMA creemos en las relaciones comerciales de largo plazo. Por eso trabajamos con distribuidores y puntos de venta que buscan marcas que respalden su operación. Brindamos acompañamiento directo, soporte comercial, materiales promocionales, fotos profesionales, manuales de ventas, entrenamientos para vendedores y asesoría para estructurar exhibiciones que ayuden a rotar inventarios rápidamente.

Nuestro modelo de negocio se fundamenta en una cadena mayorista sólida, transparente y rentable. Ofrecemos precios escalonados por volumen y oportunidades de exclusividad por zona.

La visión de YUMA Eyewear Co. es posicionarse como una marca referente en el mercado colombiano y latinoamericano, consolidando una red de aliados que puedan crecer con nosotros, ampliar su portafolio y diversificar sus ingresos en un sector que evoluciona constantemente.

Si eres óptica, tienda de moda, distribuidor, representante comercial o deseas expandir tu oferta con un producto premium de alta rotación, será un gusto conversar contigo. Estamos en etapa de expansión y abiertos a nuevas alianzas estratégicas en todo el país.

Description:
Sea Leather Wear began in 2005, in association with a Calgary based company, Mermaid Leather International, which pioneered the technology for tanning fish, which removed the fish odor and scales as part of this process. 

There are 4 types of fish leather skins that are being marketed - carp, perch, salmon and sea bass. Each type of fish has its own distinctive shape and natural scale pattern. Most of our stock features carp and salmon, available in a firm glazed finish (carp) or a supple suede finish (all types), with a wide range of vibrant colors.

Our fish leather is trusted by designers and artisans worldwide for footwear, handbags, small leather goods, jewelry, costumes, and bookbinding. Discover a sustainable, exotic alternative to traditional leather for your next custom creation.

Description:
We specialize in handcrafted silver jewelry, infused with the elegance and timeless beauty of European history and heritage. Each piece is a celebration of artistry — thoughtfully designed and meticulously made, from the first sketch to the final cast.

Our process is fully in-house, allowing us to maintain exceptional quality and attention to detail at every step. Inspired by classic forms, organic textures, and the richness of cultural legacy, our jewelry blends traditional craftsmanship with a modern, luxurious aesthetic.

Every creation tells a story — shaped by imagination, guided by heritage, and finished with care. Whether you're looking for a signature piece or a meaningful gift, our collections are designed to be worn, cherished, and remembered.

Our Story
Silivero is a family-owned company with a history that dates back to the end of 1922. It was founded by our great-grandfather, 

In 1988, the company relocated to Poland, establishing its new base in Krakow, where it expanded its production and sales of silver jewelry. In Krakow, Silivero has built a recognizable brand, offering a wide range of original designs characterized by unique style and quality craftsmanship. With its own foundry and team of designers, Silivero can fulfill custom, artistic orders, creating jewelry that transcends conventional patterns and embodies a creative approach to jewelry making.

Gemlux SARL est une société spécialisée dans la fourniture de pierres précieuses et le développement de créations sur mesure pour les acteurs exigeants des univers de la joaillerie et de l’horlogerie.

Notre expertise s’articule autour de quatre domaines clés :

 Approvisionnement en pierres de couleur en mêlée : Sélection rigoureuse de saphirs, rubis, émeraudes et autres gemmes fines, calibrées et triées pour répondre aux exigences esthétiques et techniques des créateurs et horlogers.

 Diamants mêlés et polyformes : Une offre complète de diamants en mêlée (blancs et fancy colors) et de formes variées, pour toutes les applications de pavage et de monture complexe.

 Création de bagues de fiançailles personnalisées : Accompagnement des particuliers dans la conception et la réalisation de bijoux uniques, sur mesure, du choix des pierres à la fabrication finale.

 Sertissage de précision pour les professionnels : Services de sertissage haut de gamme, dédiés aux ateliers de joaillerie et d’horlogerie, avec un haut niveau de finition.

 Engagement pour une traçabilité responsable
Chez Gemlux SARL, la traçabilité n’est pas une option. Nous sélectionnons nos pierres auprès de fournisseurs engagés, respectant les standards internationaux en matière d’éthique, de durabilité et de commerce équitable. Chaque pierre peut faire l’objet d’un suivi d’origine, garantissant à nos clients une transparence totale sur la chaîne d’approvisionnement.

Gemlux SARL est le partenaire privilégié des maisons de joaillerie, horlogers indépendants, créateurs et particuliers recherchant l’excellence, la confiance et un service sur mesure.

Name: Ara Collection 24K
Description:
The story begins with two brothers and a small jeweler’s bench in Bodrum, Turkey.  Coming from a long line of artisans, the brothers developed their skills in jewelry making based on ancient techniques.  Back then, neither could have imagined that their unique designs would captivate so many.  Decades later, Ara Collection is known worldwide for its handcrafted 24 karat gold jewelry.

In 2001, Ara Collection expanded their business to the US, where the line was very well received and appreciated.  They continued to grow, opening their flagship retail store in Santa Barbara, CA in 2004.  The collection now graces hundreds of jewelry stores nationwide, as well as stores in Canada, Brazil, Costa Rica, Bermuda, St. Bart’s, Barbados, and Puerto Rico.

Ara Collection takes pride in its quality and workmanship.  Each piece is created by hand at the company’s workshop in Bodrum, Turkey.  Inspiration for the collection comes from the rich history of ancient Anatolian civilizations and the beauty of the Mediterranean and Aegean Seas.

Name: Namu Baru
Description:
Namu Baru is a unique brand that brings a thoughtful blend of traditional craftsmanship and mindful living to the modern world. Founded by Chris Overholt after extensive travels across Asia, Namu Baru is deeply inspired by the artisanal and spiritual traditions of countries like Nepal, India, Korea, and Japan. Overholt’s encounters with handmade malas, gemstone jewelry, and Zen-inspired woodcrafts shaped Namu Baru’s vision: to create a collection that embodies both the aesthetics and spiritual significance of these ancient cultures while meeting the needs of contemporary life.

Namu Baru offers a distinctive selection of handcrafted gemstone and wood malas, bracelets, and prayer beads. These pieces range from versatile gemstone malas with materials like Amethyst, Rose Quartz, and Aventurine, to wooden Zen malas crafted from rare and aromatic woods such as Purpleheart, Dragon Blood, and Korean Cedar. Each item is curated to honor the rich heritage of prayer beads and malas, offering customers a way to incorporate mindfulness, spiritual connection, and natural beauty into their lives.

A key aspect of Namu Baru's appeal is its focus on quality and variety. The brand's gemstone and wood bracelets come in sizes that suit all wearers, from children's wrists to large adult wrists, making them an accessible tool for meditation or as a beautiful, everyday reminder of inner peace. Namu Baru also offers specialty items, like cedar bracelets engraved with Korean Hanja characters that encourage a focus on intention and perseverance.

With a commitment to preserving tradition and promoting wellness, Namu Baru has become a trusted source for meaningful, authentic jewelry that bridges the gap between East and West. Each piece not only reflects timeless artistry but also supports users on their journey toward mindfulness and balance. For those seeking to integrate the East’s spiritual and cultural richness into their lives, Namu Baru provides thoughtfully crafted collection.

Name: Adajio LLC
Description:
Adajio is dedicated to the pursuit of progressivity.  Our passion lies in modern metals that break away from traditionalism.  Jewelry that resists everyday wear and tear while retaining a superior polished finish is what we believe a new generation of consumers desire.    

Our tungsten carbide watches and Black Diamond Ceramic rings boast a 9 on Mohs’ hardness scale and are guaranteed to retain their deep, pure finish.  We’ve mastered the art of Tungsten Carbide with our innovative Swiss movement watch styles.  We also lead the industry with our new high-tech Black Diamond Ceramic rings.   This product line shares the same scratch resilience as Tungsten Carbide at half the weight and is 100% pure non-plated.  

Vitalium is our newest patent pending high-tech alloy. It is the most technologically advanced   material in the jewelry industry today. It is twice as hard as Cobalt Chromium, and can be removed safely and easily in seconds. In contrast, most contemporary rings can only be removed using a high speed, high heat, abrasive cutting blade (i.e. diamond blade). We developed Vitalium with this safety issue as our number one concern. Vitalium is the whitest colored contemporary metal almost identical to white gold and platinum.
