Name: Ishaan International Inc
Description:
Ishaan International Inc. is a family owned business that began crafting fine jewelry by hand decades ago. Our mission is to provide our customers with the highest quality diamonds and fine jewelry through ethically sourced and conflict-free diamond standards. As our passion for creating high quality fine jewelry grew, so did our family. Now in our 4th generation, we continue to craft elegant fine jewelry using genuine mined and lab-grown diamonds, precious gemstones, and even offer full service custom design. Knowing each final piece of jewelry is more than a purchase, it's a lifetime legacy of symbolism and love, and just like our family, it continues to grow. 

Our commitment to traditional craftsmanship runs deep, and we believe that the art of creating jewelry with skilled hands is an invaluable tradition worth preserving. We are proud to continue the legacy of making jewelry by hand, where each piece is carefully assembled by our expert gemologists in our Los Angeles, California headquarters. Our designs and craftsmanship are skills learned through mastering the industry's techniques and every order is truly unique and made to order. Our commitment to crafting jewelry in-house means we can ensure our product can be delivered without delay.

We are a multifaceted company that sells both Wholesale and D2C via our two eCommerce platforms; DiamondStuds.com and DiamondWish.com. We pride ourselves on providing exceptional customer service and crafting heirloom-quality pieces. We are a close-knit team passionate about the art of jewelry and dedicated to creating a memorable experience for every client.

Name: Walter Gropius
Description:
Bauhaus Walter Gropius Uhren stehen für die Prinzipien des Bauhauses wie keine andere Marke. Ihre Gestaltung orientiert sich an der Architektur des Bauhauses in Dessau sowie den Arbeiten bedeutender Bauhaus-Schüler und Dozenten. Die Maxime „Form Follows Function“ wird dabei durch spielerische Neuinterpretationen zu „Form Follows Fantasy and Fiction“ erweitert und lädt dazu ein, Zeit bewusster zu erleben und zu gestalten.

Die Uhren, die im Geiste des Bauhauses entworfen werden, verkörpern dessen Essenz mit ihrem klaren Design und hoher Funktionalität. Diese Zeitmesser sind mehr als bloße Gebrauchsgegenstände; sie sind stilvolle Accessoires, die das Erbe von Gropius und seine Philosophie fortführen. Sie vereinen Ästhetik und Funktionalität in einer Weise, die sowohl Liebhaber des klassischen Bauhaus-Stils als auch moderne Uhrenfreunde anspricht. 

Das Design der Uhren ahmt nicht den Gestaltungsstil von Gropius nach, sondern interpretiert ihn neu. Bauhaus steht allgemein für zeitloses Design, Einfachheit, vor allem aber auch für das Experimentelle. Das Design der Bauhaus Walter Gropius Uhren macht den neugierigen  und spielerischen Aspekt am Bauhaus sichtbar. Poppige Farben, basierend auf den Grundfarben Blau, Gelb und Rot, farbige Zeiger sowie grafische Zifferblätter sind charakteristisch für die Uhrenkollektion.

Das Design der Bauhaus Walter Gropius Uhren stammt aus der Feder des renommierten Objekt- und Industriedesigners Daniel Eltner. Der deutsche Industriedesigner, der in München studierte, war schon früh durch seine Familie stark vom Bauhaus beeinflusst. Er arbeitete exklusiv für renommierte Marken wie Rosenthal, WMF, Robbe & Berking sowie Cappellini. Eine enge Zusammenarbeit verband ihn mit dem italienischen Designer Lino Sabattini und dem Architekten Alessandro Mendini, mit dem er das gemeinsame Label M.A.D.E. gründete. Durch die Zusammenarbeit mit Daniel Eltner entstehen außergewöhnliche Zeitmesser, die in Design und Qualität einzigartig sind.

Name: Aurora Diamonds
Description:
Fundada por Gabriela Rodrigues no ano de 2020 em Belo Horizonte - MG, a Aurora Diamonds surgiu em resposta aos acontecimentos recentes no meio ambiente e à emergência de uma nova geração preocupada com a sustentabilidade e consciente em suas escolhas de consumo. Com isso foi identificada uma ausencia de inovação no mercado de joias brasileiro e então surgiu a Aurora.

Diante do avanço da tecnologia, agora é possível produzir pedras preciosas com qualidade e beleza iguais às da natureza, reduzindo significativamente o impacto ambiental. Nossa visão é construir um futuro no qual a preservação da natureza seja a principal prioridade na indústria de joias, e é para isso que a Aurora Diamonds nasceu.

Comprometidos com a sustentabilidade em cada etapa de produção, a cada compra realizada por nossos clientes, financiamos o plantio de uma árvore por meio do projeto Pomar. Esse projeto tem como objetivo plantar árvores frutíferas em Belo Horizonte - MG e ensinar como isso pode ser feito também nas principais capitais do Brasil, contribuindo para o equilíbrio ecológico e a promoção da biodiversidade. Na Aurora Diamonds, acreditamos que é possível unir a beleza das joias à responsabilidade ambiental, proporcionando aos nossos clientes uma experiência única e consciente.

Name: Colonial Chronos
Description:
At Colonial Chronos, we specialize in sourcing, authenticating, and showcasing some of the world’s most iconic luxury timepieces. From Rolex, Audemars Piguet, and Patek Philippe to Richard Mille and beyond, our mission is to connect collectors, enthusiasts, and first-time buyers with the watches that define craftsmanship, prestige, and timeless value.

Founded by two best friends and college roommates with a shared passion for horology, Colonial Chronos was built on three core values: expert insight, transparency, and trust. What began as countless late-night conversations about watches quickly grew into a business dedicated to helping others experience the same excitement and appreciation for fine timepieces. We understand that every watch tells a story not just of design and engineering, but of milestones, achievements, and personal legacy. That’s why we go beyond simply selling watches. We guide clients through every step of the process, ensuring that each acquisition is informed, meaningful, and tailored to their collection.

Our extensive global network of trusted dealers, watchmakers, and collectors allows us to source rare and in-demand models that are often inaccessible on the open market. Whether it’s a stainless steel Rolex Daytona, an Audemars Piguet Royal Oak, or a limited-edition Richard Mille, we leverage our relationships and market expertise to deliver watches with authenticity and confidence.

For first-time buyers, we provide the education and insight needed to navigate the luxury watch world without feeling overwhelmed. For seasoned collectors, we act as a concierge helping expand, refine, and diversify collections with strategic acquisitions that hold both emotional and investment value.

Above all, we are dedicated to building lasting relationships in the watch community, offering an elevated experience rooted in passion, integrity, and the friendship we were founded on.

Name: Asgard diamond
Description:
Asgard Diamond - Işıltının Şövalyesi

Zarafetin, asaletin ve ışıltının mükemmel bir uyumla buluştuğu Asgard Diamond, lüks mücevher dünyasına yeni bir soluk getiriyor. Her bir parça, eşsiz tasarım anlayışı ve özenle seçilmiş değerli taşlarla, ihtişamın sembolü olmaya aday.

Asgard Diamond’un koleksiyonları, sadece bir mücevher değil, aynı zamanda hayatınızdaki unutulmaz anların eşsiz birer yansımasıdır. Usta zanaatkârların ellerinden çıkan bu eserler, geçmişin ihtişamını modern bir zarafetle birleştirerek size sunar.

Neden Asgard Diamond?
	•	Eşsiz Tasarımlar: Her biri özenle tasarlanmış, özgün ve zamansız parçalar.
	•	En Yüksek Kalite: Doğanın en saf armağanı olan elmas ve değerli taşlar, en yüksek standartlarda işlenir.
	•	Sürdürülebilir Lüks: Çevreye duyarlı ve etik kaynaklardan elde edilen malzemelerle üretilmiştir.
	•	Zarafetin Anlamı: Özel anlarınız için sadece bir mücevher değil, aynı zamanda hayat boyu sürecek bir miras.

Asgard Diamond, ışıltısını sadece dış güzellikten değil, taşıdığı hikâyelerden alır. Her bir tasarım, sizi kendi eşsiz yolculuğunuza davet eder ve bu yolculukta yanınızda olmanın onurunu taşır.

Işıltının Şövalyesi olmaya hazır mısınız? Asgard Diamond ile unutulmaz anlarınızı taçlandırın. Şimdi keşfedin, zarafeti yaşayın!

Name: G&A Jewels
Description:
G&A Jewels | Fine Jewelry for Modern Souls

G&A Jewels is an independent fine jewelry brand based in Turkey, founded upon over 10 years of experience in the jewelry industry. Drawing from years of active participation in world-renowned trade shows such as JCK Las Vegas, the brand combines deep industry knowledge with a global perspective to craft timeless, elegant, and meaningful pieces.

Our collections blend high-quality materials such as 14K gold, sterling silver, and natural stones, all thoughtfully curated into wearable art.

Our Collections
 Galia Collection – Delicate and meaningful designs crafted from 14K gold and sterling silver, exclusively for women
 Aksel Collection – Strong, contemporary jewelry designs tailored for men using bold lines and fine materials

Our Vision

Name: Azario 1873
Description:
L'azienda nasce nel 1873 in un piccolo paese delle Prealpi Biellesi dove Giovanni Battista Azario circondato da un paesaggio incontaminato ed una splendida vista si inserisce con il suo piccolo laboratorio di orologeria proprio nel cuore di un famoso distretto tessile.

E' un'attività distante da tutto ciò che la circonda ma il tempo e la grande passione diedero ragione a Giovanni.

La nostra è infatti una storia che fonde il passato e la storia degli oltre 150 anni di attività ad una visione futura, la grande tradizione in unione alle più innovative soluzioni tecnologiche offerte dal mondo contemporaneo.

Se la destinazione determina la qualità del viaggio ad oggi è per noi fonte imprescindibile per il successo di ogni attività di Azario, un percorso dove l'attenzione ed il rispetto nei confronti del pianeta ci ha portato in terre lontane e tra suggestioni del passato ed una costante ricerca di innovazione ci proietta ogni giorno verso nuove scoperte.

Oggi è Andrea a guidare le attività di Azario 1873, con un'attenzione particolare alla sostenibilità e nel pieno rispetto delle antiche tradizioni.

Name: Gemmoprice
Description:
Gemmoprice is an independent data collecting business aiming to empower diamonds and gemstones dealers and jewellery appraisers through comparison of auctions sales records, and to provide fact-based support for pricing diamonds and gemstones as an asset class.
The need to build a reliable source database to tackle problems such as valuing diamonds weighting more than 5 carats arose from a close collaboration with many world's leading appraisers and jewellery consultants who has valued important diamonds and gemstones weighing more than 100 carat. After years of research and data collecting, the work has been organised and kept regularly updated in a series of databases that can be fully sorted according to a particular requirement.
Tens of filters allow you to get exhaustive answers to your questions. After you can sort them according to different criteria.
We give all the diamond and gemstone details with a direct link to the item picture and all the available sale information.
On ourdatabase you wil find : hammer price and sold price with buyer premium, sold price per carat and auction estimate.
You’ll have acess to: sale date, auction house name, item type, shape, carat colour grade, clarity grade, GIA certificate number and relevant notes.

Name: Dhanora by Dhani
Description:
From Workshops to World Markets: The Story Behind Dhanora by Dhani Jewellers

In 2013, we started not with a storefront—but with a workbench, a vision, and a love for craft.

Dhani Jewellers was born in a modest unit focused on bold, intricate hip-hop designs—long before global exports and showroom shelves came calling. Back then, it was about mastering the metal, studying the stones, and honoring the art.

What followed was a journey that few could predict.
From the streets of Surat to the showrooms of South India and the cities of the U.S., our jewelry became more than design—it became a name trusted across wholesale and retail alike.

But trust evolves. And so did we.

As the next generation of customers sought not just sparkle but substance, transparency, and truth, we listened.

That’s how Dhanora was born—a Direct-to-Consumer (D2C) leap into the future, where every piece carries a story, every stone is IGI-certified, and every product reflects both ethics and elegance.

We didn’t just want to sell jewelry—we wanted to honor heritage, emotion, and investment.
Because natural diamonds, formed over billions of years, are more than gems—they’re milestones. Symbols. Memories.

Dhanora is our answer to modern desires without compromising on traditional values.

We don’t do trends.
We do timeless.
We do trust.

So whether you’re a first-time buyer or a lifelong collector, our promise remains the same:

Real diamonds. Real value. Real meaning.

Name: iriswonderland
Description:
Sobre Mim – O Despertar da Iriswonderland 

Desde pequena que sempre vivi rodeada de brilho — bijuterias, acessórios, maquilhagem… tudo aquilo que me deixava brincar com a minha identidade. Depois, a vida levou-me por outros caminhos e tornei-me uma “maria rapaz”. A minha feminidade adormeceu, mas nunca desapareceu — ficou apenas à espera do momento certo para acordar. 

A Iriswonderland nasceu dessa necessidade de não parar, de criar com as mãos, de sentir que cada peça passa por mim e fala por mim. Enquanto o @PernasPraAndar alimenta o meu lado criativo, aqui eu expresso aquilo que sinto com o coração. 

Neste espaço sou pura e sem filtros.
 Se a alma pede o lado dark e gótico… deixo fluir.
 Se pede luz, anjos e espiritualidade… também deixo acontecer.

A Iriswonderland é o meu caminho, a minha aprendizagem, o meu reflexo.
Cada peça nasce da intuição, com intenção e verdade. Imagino o que quero mostrar ao mundo, mas deixo as mãos serem guiadas pelo que o coração já decidiu. 
E o mais especial de tudo?
É ver que, quando alguém escolhe uma criação minha, ela se torna uma extensão da essência dessa pessoa. Um pedacinho dela. 

Este projeto tem-me ajudado a libertar preconceitos, a abraçar o místico, a conhecer-me profundamente e a deixar de ter medo de ser quem sou — sem receios do que possam pensar. 

E o futuro?
Vejo-o a crescer com calma, propósito e magia.
Quero ir além das bijuterias e explorar outras partes de mim —
 maquilhagem,
 roupa,
 skincare.
Devagar, mas sempre em frente. Sempre com alma. 

Bem-vindos ao meu universo —
um lugar onde o mágico encontra o real,
e onde cada criação leva consigo um pedacinho de mim.

Name: M/S Ravi Prakash And Sons
Description:
Founded nearly a century ago in Dhampur, Uttar Pradesh, M/S Ravi Prakash And Sons is a legacy family enterprise engaged primarily in the wholesale trade of gold and silver jewelry, with a presence in retail space as well. Over the years, the firm has earned trust across regions through consistent quality, grounded operations, and long-standing business ties.

Beyond jewelry, the company has a diverse history. In its earlier years, it operated a sugar manufacturing unit, which was closed in 1985 due to limited long-term viability. The firm also ran a microfinancing vertical serving local communities, which had to be discontinued following changes in regulatory policy.

Agriculture has remained a steady pillar—focused on crops like sugarcane, wheat, and rice. In recent years, a pilot initiative into horticulture has been launched, exploring sustainable diversification.

Today, as the younger generation steps into leadership, the firm is carefully expanding into stock market trading to manage family assets—blending traditional values with a data-led approach to financial markets.

M/S Ravi Prakash And Sons continues to grow with quiet resilience, balancing heritage with thoughtful innovation.
